authors_text: Xingchen Zhao,Chang Liu,Anthony Sicilia,Seong Jae Hwang,Yun Fu
title: Test-time Fourier Style Calibration for Domain Generalization
title_zh: 用于域泛化的测试时傅立叶式校准
comment: 31st International Joint Conference on Artificial Intelligence (IJCAI) 2022
comments: 31st International Joint Conference on Artificial Intelligence (IJCAI) 2022
abstract: The topic of generalizing machine learning models learned on a collection of source domains to unknown target domains is challenging. While many domain generalization (DG) methods have achieved promising results, they primarily rely on the source domains at train-time without manipulating the target domains at test-time. Thus, it is still possible that those methods can overfit to source domains and perform poorly on target domains. Driven by the observation that domains are strongly related to styles, we argue that reducing the gap between source and target styles can boost models' generalizability. To solve the dilemma of having no access to the target domain during training, we introduce Test-time Fourier Style Calibration (TF-Cal) for calibrating the target domain style on the fly during testing. To access styles, we utilize Fourier transformation to decompose features into amplitude (style) features and phase (semantic) features. Furthermore, we present an effective technique to Augment Amplitude Features (AAF) to complement TF-Cal. Extensive experiments on several popular DG benchmarks and a segmentation dataset for medical images demonstrate that our method outperforms state-of-the-art methods.
summary: The topic of generalizing machine learning models learned on a collection of source domains to unknown target domains is challenging. While many domain generalization (DG) methods have achieved promising results, they primarily rely on the source domains at train-time without manipulating the target domains at test-time. Thus, it is still possible that those methods can overfit to source domains and perform poorly on target domains. Driven by the observation that domains are strongly related to styles, we argue that reducing the gap between source and target styles can boost models' generalizability. To solve the dilemma of having no access to the target domain during training, we introduce Test-time Fourier Style Calibration (TF-Cal) for calibrating the target domain style on the fly during testing. To access styles, we utilize Fourier transformation to decompose features into amplitude (style) features and phase (semantic) features. Furthermore, we present an effective technique to Augment Amplitude Features (AAF) to complement TF-Cal. Extensive experiments on several popular DG benchmarks and a segmentation dataset for medical images demonstrate that our method outperforms state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 将在源域集合上学习的机器学习模型推广到未知目标域的主题具有挑战性。虽然许多域泛化（DG）方法已经取得了有希望的结果，但它们主要依赖于训练时的源域，而不在测试时操纵目标域。因此，这些方法仍然有可能对源域过度拟合并且在目标域上表现不佳。由于域与样式密切相关，我们认为缩小源样式和目标样式之间的差距可以提高模型的通用性。为了解决训练期间无法访问目标域的困境，我们引入了测试时傅里叶风格校准（TF-Cal），用于在测试期间动态校准目标域风格。为了访问风格，我们利用傅立叶变换将特征分解为幅度（风格）特征和相位（语义）特征。此外，我们提出了一种有效的增强幅度特征（AAF）技术来补充 TF-Cal。对几个流行的 DG 基准和医学图像分割数据集的大量实验表明，我们的方法优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 提出一种在测试时通过傅里叶风格校准提升领域泛化的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有领域泛化方法在训练时依赖源域而忽视测试时的目标域，可能过拟合源域；领域间风格差异显著，减少风格差距有助于提升模型泛化能力。
AI.method: 提出测试时傅里叶风格校准（TF-Cal），利用傅里叶变换分离幅度（风格）和相位（语义）特征，并结合幅度特征增强技术（AAF）进行目标域风格校准。
AI.result: 在多个领域泛化基准和医学图像分割数据集上优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过测试时风格校准有效提升模型在未知目标域的泛化能力，验证了风格差异在领域泛化中的关键作用。

authors_text: Weizhe Chen,Roni Khardon,Lantao Liu
title: AK: Attentive Kernel for Information Gathering
title_zh: AK：用于信息收集的细心内核
comment: Proceedings of Robotics: Science and Systems (RSS), 2022. https://weizhe-chen.github.io/attentive_kernels/
comments: Proceedings of Robotics: Science and Systems (RSS), 2022. https://weizhe-chen.github.io/attentive_kernels/
abstract: Robotic Information Gathering (RIG) relies on the uncertainty of a probabilistic model to identify critical areas for efficient data collection. Gaussian processes (GPs) with stationary kernels have been widely adopted for spatial modeling. However, real-world spatial data typically does not satisfy the assumption of stationarity, where different locations are assumed to have the same degree of variability. As a result, the prediction uncertainty does not accurately capture prediction error, limiting the success of RIG algorithms. We propose a novel family of nonstationary kernels, named the Attentive Kernel (AK), which is simple, robust, and can extend any existing kernel to a nonstationary one. We evaluate the new kernel in elevation mapping tasks, where AK provides better accuracy and uncertainty quantification over the commonly used RBF kernel and other popular nonstationary kernels. The improved uncertainty quantification guides the downstream RIG planner to collect more valuable data around the high-error area, further increasing prediction accuracy. A field experiment demonstrates that the proposed method can guide an Autonomous Surface Vehicle (ASV) to prioritize data collection in locations with high spatial variations, enabling the model to characterize the salient environmental features.
summary: Robotic Information Gathering (RIG) relies on the uncertainty of a probabilistic model to identify critical areas for efficient data collection. Gaussian processes (GPs) with stationary kernels have been widely adopted for spatial modeling. However, real-world spatial data typically does not satisfy the assumption of stationarity, where different locations are assumed to have the same degree of variability. As a result, the prediction uncertainty does not accurately capture prediction error, limiting the success of RIG algorithms. We propose a novel family of nonstationary kernels, named the Attentive Kernel (AK), which is simple, robust, and can extend any existing kernel to a nonstationary one. We evaluate the new kernel in elevation mapping tasks, where AK provides better accuracy and uncertainty quantification over the commonly used RBF kernel and other popular nonstationary kernels. The improved uncertainty quantification guides the downstream RIG planner to collect more valuable data around the high-error area, further increasing prediction accuracy. A field experiment demonstrates that the proposed method can guide an Autonomous Surface Vehicle (ASV) to prioritize data collection in locations with high spatial variations, enabling the model to characterize the salient environmental features.
abstract_zh: 机器人信息收集 (RIG) 依靠概率模型的不确定性来识别有效数据收集的关键区域。具有固定核的高斯过程（GP）已被广泛用于空间建模。然而，现实世界的空间数据通常不满足平稳性假设，即假设不同位置具有相同程度的变异性。因此，预测不确定性无法准确捕获预测误差，限制了 RIG 算法的成功。我们提出了一种新颖的非平稳内核家族，名为 Attentive Kernel (AK)，它简单、健壮，并且可以将任何现有内核扩展为非平稳内核。我们在高程测绘任务中评估了新内核，其中 AK 比常用的 RBF 内核和其他流行的非平稳内核提供了更好的准确性和不确定性量化。改进的不确定性量化指导下游RIG规划者在高误差区域周围收集更多有价值的数据，进一步提高预测精度。现场实验表明，所提出的方法可以指导自主地面车辆（ASV）优先考虑空间变化较大的位置的数据收集，使模型能够表征显着的环境特征。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Attentive Kernel (AK)的非平稳核方法，用于改进机器人信息收集任务中的不确定性量化，提升数据采集效率。
AI.motivation: 传统高斯过程使用的平稳核无法准确建模现实世界中非平稳的空间数据，导致预测不确定性不精确，限制了机器人信息收集算法的性能。
AI.method: 设计可扩展的非平稳核AK，通过注意力机制捕捉空间变异特性，并在高程映射任务中验证其有效性。
AI.result: AK在预测精度和不确定性量化上优于RBF核及其他非平稳核，引导自主水面车辆优先采集高变异性区域数据，提升环境特征建模效果。
AI.conclusion: AK通过改进不确定性量化显著提升了机器人信息收集性能，实地实验验证了其在复杂环境中的有效性。

authors_text: Hyoung-Kyu Song,Sang Hoon Woo,Junhyeok Lee,Seungmin Yang,Hyunjae Cho,Youseong Lee,Dongho Choi,Kang-wook Kim
title: Talking Face Generation with Multilingual TTS
title_zh: 使用多语言 TTS 生成说话人脸
abstract: In this work, we propose a joint system combining a talking face generation system with a text-to-speech system that can generate multilingual talking face videos from only the text input. Our system can synthesize natural multilingual speeches while maintaining the vocal identity of the speaker, as well as lip movements synchronized to the synthesized speech. We demonstrate the generalization capabilities of our system by selecting four languages (Korean, English, Japanese, and Chinese) each from a different language family. We also compare the outputs of our talking face generation model to outputs of a prior work that claims multilingual support. For our demo, we add a translation API to the preprocessing stage and present it in the form of a neural dubber so that users can utilize the multilingual property of our system more easily.
summary: In this work, we propose a joint system combining a talking face generation system with a text-to-speech system that can generate multilingual talking face videos from only the text input. Our system can synthesize natural multilingual speeches while maintaining the vocal identity of the speaker, as well as lip movements synchronized to the synthesized speech. We demonstrate the generalization capabilities of our system by selecting four languages (Korean, English, Japanese, and Chinese) each from a different language family. We also compare the outputs of our talking face generation model to outputs of a prior work that claims multilingual support. For our demo, we add a translation API to the preprocessing stage and present it in the form of a neural dubber so that users can utilize the multilingual property of our system more easily.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了一种将说话人脸生成系统与文本转语音系统相结合的联合系统，该系统可以仅根据文本输入生成多语言说话人脸视频。我们的系统可以合成自然的多语言语音，同时保持说话者的声音身份，以及与合成语音同步的嘴唇运动。我们通过选择来自不同语系的四种语言（韩语、英语、日语和中文）来展示我们系统的泛化能力。我们还将说话人脸生成模型的输出与声称支持多语言支持的先前工作的输出进行比较。在我们的演示中，我们在预处理阶段添加了翻译 API，并以神经配音器的形式呈现，以便用户可以更轻松地利用我们系统的多语言特性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合多语言文本到语音（TTS）系统和 talking face 生成系统的联合框架，能够仅通过文本输入生成同步语音与嘴唇动作的多语言 talking face 视频。
AI.motivation: 现有系统难以同时实现多语言语音合成与自然面部动画生成，且缺乏对多语言场景的统一解决方案，需开发更通用且易用的系统以满足跨语言应用需求。
AI.method: 整合多语言TTS与面部生成模型，通过翻译API预处理文本输入，并利用四类语言（韩语、英语、日语、中文）验证系统泛化能力，与先前工作进行对比实验。
AI.result: 系统成功生成了语音与面部动作同步的多语言视频，支持四种不同语系语言，且在对比实验中表现优于现有方法，神经配音演示提升了用户交互便捷性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架验证了多语言TTS与面部生成联合系统的有效性，展示了跨语言泛化能力，为多语言虚拟角色生成提供了实用化方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合多语言文本到语音（TTS）系统和 talking face 生成系统的联合框架，能够仅通过文本输入生成同步语音与嘴唇动作的多语言 talking face 视频。
ai_content.motivation: 现有系统难以同时实现多语言语音合成与自然面部动画生成，且缺乏对多语言场景的统一解决方案，需开发更通用且易用的系统以满足跨语言应用需求。
ai_content.method: 整合多语言TTS与面部生成模型，通过翻译API预处理文本输入，并利用四类语言（韩语、英语、日语、中文）验证系统泛化能力，与先前工作进行对比实验。
ai_content.result: 系统成功生成了语音与面部动作同步的多语言视频，支持四种不同语系语言，且在对比实验中表现优于现有方法，神经配音演示提升了用户交互便捷性。
ai_content.conclusion: 该框架验证了多语言TTS与面部生成联合系统的有效性，展示了跨语言泛化能力，为多语言虚拟角色生成提供了实用化方案。

search_text: Talking Face Generation with Multilingual TTS 使用多语言 TTS 生成说话人脸 In this work, we propose a joint system combining a talking face generation system with a text-to-speech system that can generate multilingual talking face videos from only the text input. Our system can synthesize natural multilingual speeches while maintaining the vocal identity of the speaker, as well as lip movements synchronized to the synthesized speech. We demonstrate the generalization capabilities of our system by selecting four languages (Korean, English, Japanese, and Chinese) each from a different language family. We also compare the outputs of our talking face generation model to outputs of a prior work that claims multilingual support. For our demo, we add a translation API to the preprocessing stage and present it in the form of a neural dubber so that users can utilize the multilingual property of our system more easily. 在这项工作中，我们提出了一种将说话人脸生成系统与文本转语音系统相结合的联合系统，该系统可以仅根据文本输入生成多语言说话人脸视频。我们的系统可以合成自然的多语言语音，同时保持说话者的声音身份，以及与合成语音同步的嘴唇运动。我们通过选择来自不同语系的四种语言（韩语、英语、日语和中文）来展示我们系统的泛化能力。我们还将说话人脸生成模型的输出与声称支持多语言支持的先前工作的输出进行比较。在我们的演示中，我们在预处理阶段添加了翻译 API，并以神经配音器的形式呈现，以便用户可以更轻松地利用我们系统的多语言特性。 本文提出了一种结合多语言文本到语音（TTS）系统和 talking face 生成系统的联合框架，能够仅通过文本输入生成同步语音与嘴唇动作的多语言 talking face 视频。 Hyoung-Kyu Song,Sang Hoon Woo,Junhyeok Lee,Seungmin Yang,Hyunjae Cho,Youseong Lee,Dongho Choi,Kang-wook Kim cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Sanchit Hira,Digvijay Singh,Tae Soo Kim,Shobhit Gupta,Gregory Hager,Shameema Sikder,S. Swaroop Vedula
title: Video-based assessment of intraoperative surgical skill
title_zh: 基于视频的术中手术技能评估
abstract: Purpose: The objective of this investigation is to provide a comprehensive analysis of state-of-the-art methods for video-based assessment of surgical skill in the operating room. Methods: Using a data set of 99 videos of capsulorhexis, a critical step in cataract surgery, we evaluate feature based methods previously developed for surgical skill assessment mostly under benchtop settings. In addition, we present and validate two deep learning methods that directly assess skill using RGB videos. In the first method, we predict instrument tips as keypoints, and learn surgical skill using temporal convolutional neural networks. In the second method, we propose a novel architecture for surgical skill assessment that includes a frame-wise encoder (2D convolutional neural network) followed by a temporal model (recurrent neural network), both of which are augmented by visual attention mechanisms. We report the area under the receiver operating characteristic curve, sensitivity, specificity, and predictive values with each method through 5-fold cross-validation. Results: For the task of binary skill classification (expert vs. novice), deep neural network based methods exhibit higher AUC than the classical spatiotemporal interest point based methods. The neural network approach using attention mechanisms also showed high sensitivity and specificity. Conclusion: Deep learning methods are necessary for video-based assessment of surgical skill in the operating room. Our findings of internal validity of a network using attention mechanisms to assess skill directly using RGB videos should be evaluated for external validity in other data sets.

Methods: Using a data set of 99 videos of capsulorhexis, a critical step in cataract surgery, we evaluate feature based methods previously developed for surgical skill assessment mostly under benchtop settings. In addition, we present and validate two deep learning methods that directly assess skill using RGB videos. In the first method, we predict instrument tips as keypoints, and learn surgical skill using temporal convolutional neural networks. In the second method, we propose a novel architecture for surgical skill assessment that includes a frame-wise encoder (2D convolutional neural network) followed by a temporal model (recurrent neural network), both of which are augmented by visual attention mechanisms. We report the area under the receiver operating characteristic curve, sensitivity, specificity, and predictive values with each method through 5-fold cross-validation. Results: For the task of binary skill classification (expert vs. novice), deep neural network based methods exhibit higher AUC than the classical spatiotemporal interest point based methods. The neural network approach using attention mechanisms also showed high sensitivity and specificity. Conclusion: Deep learning methods are necessary for video-based assessment of surgical skill in the operating room. Our findings of internal validity of a network using attention mechanisms to assess skill directly using RGB videos should be evaluated for external validity in other data sets.
abstract_zh: 目的：本次调查的目的是对手术室手术技能视频评估的最先进方法进行全面分析。方法：使用 99 个撕囊视频的数据集（白内障手术的关键步骤），我们评估了先前开发的基于特征的方法，用于主要在台式设置下进行手术技能评估。此外，我们还提出并验证了两种使用 RGB 视频直接评估技能的深度学习方法。在第一种方法中，我们将器械尖端预测为关键点，并使用时间卷积神经网络学习手术技能。在第二种方法中，我们提出了一种用于手术技能评估的新颖架构，其中包括逐帧编码器（二维卷积神经网络）和时间模型（循环神经网络），两者都通过视觉注意机制进行增强。我们通过 5 倍交叉验证报告每种方法的受试者工作特征曲线下面积、敏感性、特异性和预测值。结果：对于二元技能分类（专家与新手）的任务，基于深度神经网络的方法比基于经典时空兴趣点的方法表现出更高的 AUC。使用注意力机制的神经网络方法也表现出高灵敏度和特异性。结论：深度学习方法对于手术室手术技能的视频评估是必要的。我们对使用注意力机制直接使用 RGB 视频评估技能的网络内部有效性的发现应该在其他数据集中评估外部有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过视频分析评估手术室内的手术技能，比较传统方法与深度学习方法的效果。
AI.motivation: 现有基于特征点的手术技能评估方法多在实验室环境下测试，需验证其在真实手术视频中的有效性，并探索深度学习在该领域的应用潜力。
AI.method: 使用99段白内障手术关键步骤（囊膜撕囊术）视频，评估传统特征点方法，并提出两种深度学习方法：基于关键点的时间卷积网络及结合注意力机制的编码器-递归网络架构。
AI.result: 深度学习方法在二分类任务（专家vs新手）中AUC显著优于传统方法，且注意力机制模型表现出高灵敏度和特异性。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习是手术视频技能评估的关键技术，需进一步在外部数据集中验证注意力机制模型的泛化能力。

authors_text: Minghua Wang,Danfeng Hong,Zhu Han,Jiaxin Li,Jing Yao,Lianru Gao,Bing Zhang,Jocelyn Chanussot
title: Tensor Decompositions for Hyperspectral Data Processing in Remote Sensing: A Comprehensive Review
title_zh: 遥感高光谱数据处理的张量分解：综合综述
abstract: Owing to the rapid development of sensor technology, hyperspectral (HS) remote sensing (RS) imaging has provided a significant amount of spatial and spectral information for the observation and analysis of the Earth's surface at a distance of data acquisition devices, such as aircraft, spacecraft, and satellite. The recent advancement and even revolution of the HS RS technique offer opportunities to realize the full potential of various applications, while confronting new challenges for efficiently processing and analyzing the enormous HS acquisition data. Due to the maintenance of the 3-D HS inherent structure, tensor decomposition has aroused widespread concern and research in HS data processing tasks over the past decades. In this article, we aim at presenting a comprehensive overview of tensor decomposition, specifically contextualizing the five broad topics in HS data processing, and they are HS restoration, compressed sensing, anomaly detection, super-resolution, and spectral unmixing. For each topic, we elaborate on the remarkable achievements of tensor decomposition models for HS RS with a pivotal description of the existing methodologies and a representative exhibition on the experimental results. As a result, the remaining challenges of the follow-up research directions are outlined and discussed from the perspective of the real HS RS practices and tensor decomposition merged with advanced priors and even with deep neural networks. This article summarizes different tensor decomposition-based HS data processing methods and categorizes them into different classes from simple adoptions to complex combinations with other priors for the algorithm beginners. We also expect this survey can provide new investigations and development trends for the experienced researchers who understand tensor decomposition and HS RS to some extent.
summary: Owing to the rapid development of sensor technology, hyperspectral (HS) remote sensing (RS) imaging has provided a significant amount of spatial and spectral information for the observation and analysis of the Earth's surface at a distance of data acquisition devices, such as aircraft, spacecraft, and satellite. The recent advancement and even revolution of the HS RS technique offer opportunities to realize the full potential of various applications, while confronting new challenges for efficiently processing and analyzing the enormous HS acquisition data. Due to the maintenance of the 3-D HS inherent structure, tensor decomposition has aroused widespread concern and research in HS data processing tasks over the past decades. In this article, we aim at presenting a comprehensive overview of tensor decomposition, specifically contextualizing the five broad topics in HS data processing, and they are HS restoration, compressed sensing, anomaly detection, super-resolution, and spectral unmixing. For each topic, we elaborate on the remarkable achievements of tensor decomposition models for HS RS with a pivotal description of the existing methodologies and a representative exhibition on the experimental results. As a result, the remaining challenges of the follow-up research directions are outlined and discussed from the perspective of the real HS RS practices and tensor decomposition merged with advanced priors and even with deep neural networks. This article summarizes different tensor decomposition-based HS data processing methods and categorizes them into different classes from simple adoptions to complex combinations with other priors for the algorithm beginners. We also expect this survey can provide new investigations and development trends for the experienced researchers who understand tensor decomposition and HS RS to some extent.
abstract_zh: 由于传感器技术的快速发展，高光谱（HS）遥感（RS）成像为飞机、航天器和卫星等数据采集设备远距离观测和分析地球表面提供了大量的空间和光谱信息。 HS RS 技术的最新进步甚至革命为充分发挥各种应用的潜力提供了机会，同时也面临着高效处理和分析大量 HS 采集数据的新挑战。由于保持了3-D HS固有结构，张量分解在过去几十年中引起了HS数据处理任务的广泛关注和研究。在本文中，我们旨在全面概述张量分解，特别是 HS 数据处理中的五个广泛主题，它们是 HS 恢复、压缩感知、异常检测、超分辨率和光谱分解。对于每个主题，我们通过对现有方法的关键描述和对实验结果的代表性展示，详细阐述了 HS RS 张量分解模型的显着成就。因此，从真实的 HS RS 实践和张量分解与先进先验甚至深度神经网络相结合的角度概述和讨论了后续研究方向的剩余挑战。本文总结了不同的基于张量分解的 HS 数据处理方法，并将它们分为不同的类别，从简单的采用到与其他先验的复杂组合，供算法初学者参考。我们也期望本次调查能够为在一定程度上了解张量分解和HS RS的经验丰富的研究人员提供新的研究和发展趋势。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了张量分解在高光谱遥感数据处理中的应用，涵盖高光谱恢复、压缩感知、异常检测、超分辨率和光谱解混五大主题。
AI.motivation: 高光谱遥感数据量庞大且结构复杂，传统方法难以高效处理，需借助张量分解保持其三维固有特性以提升分析效率。
AI.method: 系统分类并总结了基于张量分解的高光谱数据处理方法，从简单应用到与先进先验知识及深度神经网络的复杂结合，并通过实验结果展示其有效性。
AI.result: 梳理了现有张量分解模型在五大任务中的关键成果，明确了后续研究需解决的挑战，如结合深度学习与先进先验知识的方向。
AI.conclusion: 张量分解为高光谱数据处理提供了有效工具，未来研究应进一步融合深度学习等技术以应对实际应用中的复杂问题。

search_text: Tensor Decompositions for Hyperspectral Data Processing in Remote Sensing: A Comprehensive Review 遥感高光谱数据处理的张量分解：综合综述 Owing to the rapid development of sensor technology, hyperspectral (HS) remote sensing (RS) imaging has provided a significant amount of spatial and spectral information for the observation and analysis of the Earth's surface at a distance of data acquisition devices, such as aircraft, spacecraft, and satellite. The recent advancement and even revolution of the HS RS technique offer opportunities to realize the full potential of various applications, while confronting new challenges for efficiently processing and analyzing the enormous HS acquisition data. Due to the maintenance of the 3-D HS inherent structure, tensor decomposition has aroused widespread concern and research in HS data processing tasks over the past decades. In this article, we aim at presenting a comprehensive overview of tensor decomposition, specifically contextualizing the five broad topics in HS data processing, and they are HS restoration, compressed sensing, anomaly detection, super-resolution, and spectral unmixing. For each topic, we elaborate on the remarkable achievements of tensor decomposition models for HS RS with a pivotal description of the existing methodologies and a representative exhibition on the experimental results. As a result, the remaining challenges of the follow-up research directions are outlined and discussed from the perspective of the real HS RS practices and tensor decomposition merged with advanced priors and even with deep neural networks. This article summarizes different tensor decomposition-based HS data processing methods and categorizes them into different classes from simple adoptions to complex combinations with other priors for the algorithm beginners. We also expect this survey can provide new investigations and development trends for the experienced researchers who understand tensor decomposition and HS RS to some extent. 由于传感器技术的快速发展，高光谱（HS）遥感（RS）成像为飞机、航天器和卫星等数据采集设备远距离观测和分析地球表面提供了大量的空间和光谱信息。 HS RS 技术的最新进步甚至革命为充分发挥各种应用的潜力提供了机会，同时也面临着高效处理和分析大量 HS 采集数据的新挑战。由于保持了3-D HS固有结构，张量分解在过去几十年中引起了HS数据处理任务的广泛关注和研究。在本文中，我们旨在全面概述张量分解，特别是 HS 数据处理中的五个广泛主题，它们是 HS 恢复、压缩感知、异常检测、超分辨率和光谱分解。对于每个主题，我们通过对现有方法的关键描述和对实验结果的代表性展示，详细阐述了 HS RS 张量分解模型的显着成就。因此，从真实的 HS RS 实践和张量分解与先进先验甚至深度神经网络相结合的角度概述和讨论了后续研究方向的剩余挑战。本文总结了不同的基于张量分解的 HS 数据处理方法，并将它们分为不同的类别，从简单的采用到与其他先验的复杂组合，供算法初学者参考。我们也期望本次调查能够为在一定程度上了解张量分解和HS RS的经验丰富的研究人员提供新的研究和发展趋势。 本文综述了张量分解在高光谱遥感数据处理中的应用，涵盖高光谱恢复、压缩感知、异常检测、超分辨率和光谱解混五大主题。 Minghua Wang,Danfeng Hong,Zhu Han,Jiaxin Li,Jing Yao,Lianru Gao,Bing Zhang,Jocelyn Chanussot cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.IV

authors_text: Hongbin Liu,Jinyuan Jia,Neil Zhenqiang Gong
title: PoisonedEncoder: Poisoning the Unlabeled Pre-training Data in Contrastive Learning
title_zh: PoisonedEncoder：在对比学习中毒害未标记的预训练数据
abstract: Contrastive learning pre-trains an image encoder using a large amount of unlabeled data such that the image encoder can be used as a general-purpose feature extractor for various downstream tasks. In this work, we propose PoisonedEncoder, a data poisoning attack to contrastive learning. In particular, an attacker injects carefully crafted poisoning inputs into the unlabeled pre-training data, such that the downstream classifiers built based on the poisoned encoder for multiple target downstream tasks simultaneously classify attacker-chosen, arbitrary clean inputs as attacker-chosen, arbitrary classes. We formulate our data poisoning attack as a bilevel optimization problem, whose solution is the set of poisoning inputs; and we propose a contrastive-learning-tailored method to approximately solve it. Our evaluation on multiple datasets shows that PoisonedEncoder achieves high attack success rates while maintaining the testing accuracy of the downstream classifiers built upon the poisoned encoder for non-attacker-chosen inputs. We also evaluate five defenses against PoisonedEncoder, including one pre-processing, three in-processing, and one post-processing defenses. Our results show that these defenses can decrease the attack success rate of PoisonedEncoder, but they also sacrifice the utility of the encoder or require a large clean pre-training dataset.
summary: Contrastive learning pre-trains an image encoder using a large amount of unlabeled data such that the image encoder can be used as a general-purpose feature extractor for various downstream tasks. In this work, we propose PoisonedEncoder, a data poisoning attack to contrastive learning. In particular, an attacker injects carefully crafted poisoning inputs into the unlabeled pre-training data, such that the downstream classifiers built based on the poisoned encoder for multiple target downstream tasks simultaneously classify attacker-chosen, arbitrary clean inputs as attacker-chosen, arbitrary classes. We formulate our data poisoning attack as a bilevel optimization problem, whose solution is the set of poisoning inputs; and we propose a contrastive-learning-tailored method to approximately solve it. Our evaluation on multiple datasets shows that PoisonedEncoder achieves high attack success rates while maintaining the testing accuracy of the downstream classifiers built upon the poisoned encoder for non-attacker-chosen inputs. We also evaluate five defenses against PoisonedEncoder, including one pre-processing, three in-processing, and one post-processing defenses. Our results show that these defenses can decrease the attack success rate of PoisonedEncoder, but they also sacrifice the utility of the encoder or require a large clean pre-training dataset.
abstract_zh: 对比学习使用大量未标记数据预训练图像编码器，以便图像编码器可以用作各种下游任务的通用特征提取器。在这项工作中，我们提出了 PoisonedEncoder，一种针对对比学习的数据中毒攻击。特别是，攻击者将精心设计的中毒输入注入到未标记的预训练数据中，使得基于中毒编码器为多个目标下游任务构建的下游分类器同时将攻击者选择的任意干净输入分类为攻击者选择的任意类。我们将数据中毒攻击表述为双层优化问题，其解决方案是中毒输入的集合；我们提出了一种对比学习定制的方法来近似解决它。我们对多个数据集的评估表明，PoisonedEncoder 实现了很高的攻击成功率，同时保持了基于中毒编码器构建的下游分类器对非攻击者选择的输入的测试准确性。我们还评估了针对 PoisonedEncoder 的五种防御措施，包括一种预处理防御措施、三种处理中防御措施和一种后处理防御措施。我们的结果表明，这些防御措施可以降低 PoisonedEncoder 的攻击成功率，但它们也会牺牲编码器的实用性或需要大量干净的预训练数据集。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对对比学习预训练阶段的未标记数据投毒攻击方法PoisonedEncoder，通过注入精心设计的毒化样本，使下游分类器对特定输入产生目标性错误分类。
AI.motivation: 对比学习依赖大量未标记数据预训练通用特征编码器，但其安全性尚未充分研究。攻击者可能通过污染预训练数据影响模型在下游任务中的表现，这对模型安全构成潜在威胁。
AI.method: 将数据投毒攻击建模为双层优化问题，外层优化目标为攻击成功率，内层优化目标为对比学习的预训练过程。提出针对对比学习特性的求解方法，生成能够同时影响多个下游任务的毒化输入。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上验证PoisonedEncoder可实现高攻击成功率且不影响非目标输入的分类准确率。五种防御方法虽能降低攻击效果，但均导致编码器性能下降或需要大量干净数据。
AI.conclusion: PoisonedEncoder证明了对比学习预训练阶段存在严重安全漏洞，现有防御措施存在效用与安全性的权衡，需进一步研究更有效的防御机制。

authors_text: Srivatsa Kundurthy
title: LANTERN-RD: Enabling Deep Learning for Mitigation of the Invasive Spotted Lanternfly
title_zh: LANTERN-RD：利用深度学习来减轻入侵的斑点灯笼蝇
comment: Under Review at IEEE Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition, CV4Animals: Computer Vision for Animal Behavior Tracking and Modeling Workshop, 2022
comments: Under Review at IEEE Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition, CV4Animals: Computer Vision for Animal Behavior Tracking and Modeling Workshop, 2022
abstract: The Spotted Lanternfly (SLF) is an invasive planthopper that threatens the local biodiversity and agricultural economy of regions such as the Northeastern United States and Japan. As researchers scramble to study the insect, there is a great potential for computer vision tasks such as detection, pose estimation, and accurate identification to have important downstream implications in containing the SLF. However, there is currently no publicly available dataset for training such AI models. To enable computer vision applications and motivate advancements to challenge the invasive SLF problem, we propose LANTERN-RD, the first curated image dataset of the spotted lanternfly and its look-alikes, featuring images with varied lighting conditions, diverse backgrounds, and subjects in assorted poses. A VGG16-based baseline CNN validates the potential of this dataset for stimulating fresh computer vision applications to accelerate invasive SLF research. Additionally, we implement the trained model in a simple mobile classification application in order to directly empower responsible public mitigation efforts. The overarching mission of this work is to introduce a novel SLF image dataset and release a classification framework that enables computer vision applications, boosting studies surrounding the invasive SLF and assisting in minimizing its agricultural and economic damage.
summary: The Spotted Lanternfly (SLF) is an invasive planthopper that threatens the local biodiversity and agricultural economy of regions such as the Northeastern United States and Japan. As researchers scramble to study the insect, there is a great potential for computer vision tasks such as detection, pose estimation, and accurate identification to have important downstream implications in containing the SLF. However, there is currently no publicly available dataset for training such AI models. To enable computer vision applications and motivate advancements to challenge the invasive SLF problem, we propose LANTERN-RD, the first curated image dataset of the spotted lanternfly and its look-alikes, featuring images with varied lighting conditions, diverse backgrounds, and subjects in assorted poses. A VGG16-based baseline CNN validates the potential of this dataset for stimulating fresh computer vision applications to accelerate invasive SLF research. Additionally, we implement the trained model in a simple mobile classification application in order to directly empower responsible public mitigation efforts. The overarching mission of this work is to introduce a novel SLF image dataset and release a classification framework that enables computer vision applications, boosting studies surrounding the invasive SLF and assisting in minimizing its agricultural and economic damage.
abstract_zh: 斑点灯笼蝇 (SLF) 是一种入侵性飞虱，威胁着美国东北部和日本等地区的当地生物多样性和农业经济。随着研究人员争先恐后地研究这种昆虫，检测、姿态估计和准确识别等计算机视觉任务在遏制 SLF 方面具有重要的下游影响。然而，目前还没有公开可用的数据集来训练此类人工智能模型。为了实现计算机视觉应用并推动进步以挑战侵入性 SLF 问题，我们提出了 LANTERN-RD，这是第一个斑点灯笼蝇及其相似物的精选图像数据集，其中包含具有不同照明条件、不同背景和各种姿势的主体的图像。基于 VGG16 的基线 CNN 验证了该数据集在刺激新的计算机视觉应用以加速侵入性 SLF 研究方面的潜力。此外，我们在一个简单的移动分类应用程序中实施经过训练的模型，以便直接增强负责任的公共缓解工作的能力。这项工作的首要任务是引入一种新颖的 SLF 图像数据集，并发布一个支持计算机视觉应用的分类框架，促进围绕侵入性 SLF 的研究，并帮助最大限度地减少其农业和经济损失。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LANTERN-RD数据集及分类框架，利用计算机视觉技术应对入侵性灯笼蛾（SLF）的威胁。
AI.motivation: SLF对农业和生物多样性构成严重威胁，但缺乏公开数据集限制了计算机视觉技术在SLF检测与识别中的应用。
AI.method: 构建包含多光照条件、多样本姿态和背景的SLF图像数据集LANTERN-RD，并基于VGG16开发分类模型，部署至移动端应用。
AI.result: 验证了数据集对计算机视觉任务的有效性，开发出可直接用于公众防治的移动分类工具。
AI.conclusion: LANTERN-RD数据集和框架为SLF研究提供了新工具，有助于加速入侵物种防控技术的发展。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出LANTERN-RD数据集及分类框架，利用计算机视觉技术应对入侵性灯笼蛾（SLF）的威胁。

search_text: LANTERN-RD: Enabling Deep Learning for Mitigation of the Invasive Spotted Lanternfly LANTERN-RD：利用深度学习来减轻入侵的斑点灯笼蝇 The Spotted Lanternfly (SLF) is an invasive planthopper that threatens the local biodiversity and agricultural economy of regions such as the Northeastern United States and Japan. As researchers scramble to study the insect, there is a great potential for computer vision tasks such as detection, pose estimation, and accurate identification to have important downstream implications in containing the SLF. However, there is currently no publicly available dataset for training such AI models. To enable computer vision applications and motivate advancements to challenge the invasive SLF problem, we propose LANTERN-RD, the first curated image dataset of the spotted lanternfly and its look-alikes, featuring images with varied lighting conditions, diverse backgrounds, and subjects in assorted poses. A VGG16-based baseline CNN validates the potential of this dataset for stimulating fresh computer vision applications to accelerate invasive SLF research. Additionally, we implement the trained model in a simple mobile classification application in order to directly empower responsible public mitigation efforts. The overarching mission of this work is to introduce a novel SLF image dataset and release a classification framework that enables computer vision applications, boosting studies surrounding the invasive SLF and assisting in minimizing its agricultural and economic damage. 斑点灯笼蝇 (SLF) 是一种入侵性飞虱，威胁着美国东北部和日本等地区的当地生物多样性和农业经济。随着研究人员争先恐后地研究这种昆虫，检测、姿态估计和准确识别等计算机视觉任务在遏制 SLF 方面具有重要的下游影响。然而，目前还没有公开可用的数据集来训练此类人工智能模型。为了实现计算机视觉应用并推动进步以挑战侵入性 SLF 问题，我们提出了 LANTERN-RD，这是第一个斑点灯笼蝇及其相似物的精选图像数据集，其中包含具有不同照明条件、不同背景和各种姿势的主体的图像。基于 VGG16 的基线 CNN 验证了该数据集在刺激新的计算机视觉应用以加速侵入性 SLF 研究方面的潜力。此外，我们在一个简单的移动分类应用程序中实施经过训练的模型，以便直接增强负责任的公共缓解工作的能力。这项工作的首要任务是引入一种新颖的 SLF 图像数据集，并发布一个支持计算机视觉应用的分类框架，促进围绕侵入性 SLF 的研究，并帮助最大限度地减少其农业和经济损失。 本文提出LANTERN-RD数据集及分类框架，利用计算机视觉技术应对入侵性灯笼蛾（SLF）的威胁。 Srivatsa Kundurthy cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Eric Sihite,Xintao Hu,Bozhen Li,Adarsh Salagame,Paul Ghanem,Alireza Ramezani
title: Bang-Bang Control Of A Tail-less Morphing Wing Flight
title_zh: 无尾变形翼飞行的爆炸式控制
abstract: Bats' dynamic morphing wings are known to be extremely high-dimensional, and they employ the combination of inertial dynamics and aerodynamics manipulations to showcase extremely agile maneuvers. Bats heavily rely on their highly flexible wings and are capable of dynamically morphing their wings to adjust aerodynamic and inertial forces applied to their wing and perform sharp banking turns. There are technical hardware and control challenges in copying the morphing wing flight capabilities of flying animals. This work is majorly focused on the modeling and control aspects of stable, tail-less, morphing wing flight. A classical control approach using bang-bang control is proposed to stabilize a bio-inspired morphing wing robot called Aerobat. Robot-environment interactions based on horseshoe vortex shedding and Wagner functions is derived to realistically evaluate the feasibility of the bang-bang control, which is then implemented on the robot in experiments to demonstrate first-time closed-loop stable flights of Aerobat.
summary: Bats' dynamic morphing wings are known to be extremely high-dimensional, and they employ the combination of inertial dynamics and aerodynamics manipulations to showcase extremely agile maneuvers. Bats heavily rely on their highly flexible wings and are capable of dynamically morphing their wings to adjust aerodynamic and inertial forces applied to their wing and perform sharp banking turns. There are technical hardware and control challenges in copying the morphing wing flight capabilities of flying animals. This work is majorly focused on the modeling and control aspects of stable, tail-less, morphing wing flight. A classical control approach using bang-bang control is proposed to stabilize a bio-inspired morphing wing robot called Aerobat. Robot-environment interactions based on horseshoe vortex shedding and Wagner functions is derived to realistically evaluate the feasibility of the bang-bang control, which is then implemented on the robot in experiments to demonstrate first-time closed-loop stable flights of Aerobat.
abstract_zh: 众所周知，蝙蝠的动态变形翅膀具有极高的维度，它们利用惯性动力学和空气动力学操作的结合来展示极其敏捷的机动性。蝙蝠严重依赖其高度灵活的翅膀，并且能够动态变形其翅膀，以调整施加到其翅膀上的空气动力和惯性力并执行急剧的倾斜转弯。复制飞行动物的变形机翼飞行能力存在技术硬件和控制方面的挑战。这项工作主要集中在稳定、无尾、变形机翼飞行的建模和控制方面。提出了一种使用爆炸控制的经典控制方法来稳定称为 Aerobat 的仿生变形翼机器人。推导了基于马蹄涡流和瓦格纳函数的机器人与环境相互作用，以实际评估爆炸控制的可行性，然后在实验中在机器人上实现，以演示飞行器的首次闭环稳定飞行。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种开关控制方法，用于稳定无尾变形翼飞行器Aerobat的飞行控制。
AI.motivation: 模仿蝙蝠高维动态变形翅膀的敏捷机动能力，解决仿生飞行器在硬件和控制方面的技术挑战。
AI.method: 基于经典开关控制理论，结合 horseshoe 漩涡脱落模型和Wagner函数建立机器人与环境交互模型，并在实验中验证闭环控制效果。
AI.result: 首次实现Aerobat机器人闭环稳定飞行，验证了开关控制方法在仿生变形翼飞行中的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 开关控制策略可有效实现无尾变形翼飞行器的稳定控制，为仿生飞行器研究提供理论与实验基础。

authors_text: Eric Sihite,Benjamin Mottis,Paul Ghanem,Alireza Ramezani,Morteza Gharib
title: Efficient Path Planning and Tracking for Multi-Modal Legged-Aerial Locomotion Using Integrated Probabilistic Road Maps (PRM) and Reference Governors (RG)
title_zh: 使用集成概率路线图 (PRM) 和参考调速器 (RG) 进行多模式腿式空中运动的高效路径规划和跟踪
abstract: There have been several successful implementations of bio-inspired legged robots that can trot, walk, and hop robustly even in the presence of significant unplanned disturbances. Despite all of these accomplishments, practical control and high-level decision-making algorithms in multi-modal legged systems are overlooked. In nature, animals such as birds impressively showcase multiple modes of mobility including legged and aerial locomotion. They are capable of performing robust locomotion over large walls, tight spaces, and can recover from unpredictable situations such as sudden gusts or slippery surfaces. Inspired by these animals' versatility and ability to combine legged and aerial mobility to negotiate their environment, our main goal is to design and control legged robots that integrate two completely different forms of locomotion, ground and aerial mobility, in a single platform. Our robot, the Husky Carbon, is being developed to integrate aerial and legged locomotion and to transform between legged and aerial mobility. This work utilizes a Reference Governor (RG) based on low-level control of Husky's dynamical model to maintain the efficiency of legged locomotion, uses Probabilistic Road Maps (PRM) and 3D A* algorithms to generate an optimal path based on the energetic cost of transport for legged and aerial mobility
summary: There have been several successful implementations of bio-inspired legged robots that can trot, walk, and hop robustly even in the presence of significant unplanned disturbances. Despite all of these accomplishments, practical control and high-level decision-making algorithms in multi-modal legged systems are overlooked. In nature, animals such as birds impressively showcase multiple modes of mobility including legged and aerial locomotion. They are capable of performing robust locomotion over large walls, tight spaces, and can recover from unpredictable situations such as sudden gusts or slippery surfaces. Inspired by these animals' versatility and ability to combine legged and aerial mobility to negotiate their environment, our main goal is to design and control legged robots that integrate two completely different forms of locomotion, ground and aerial mobility, in a single platform. Our robot, the Husky Carbon, is being developed to integrate aerial and legged locomotion and to transform between legged and aerial mobility. This work utilizes a Reference Governor (RG) based on low-level control of Husky's dynamical model to maintain the efficiency of legged locomotion, uses Probabilistic Road Maps (PRM) and 3D A* algorithms to generate an optimal path based on the energetic cost of transport for legged and aerial mobility
abstract_zh: 已经有一些成功的仿生腿式机器人的实现，即使在存在严重的意外干扰的情况下，它们也能稳健地小跑、行走和跳跃。尽管取得了所有这些成就，但多模态腿系统中的实际控制和高级决策算法却被忽视了。在自然界中，鸟类等动物令人印象深刻地展示了多种移动方式，包括腿式移动和空中移动。它们能够在大墙壁、狭小空间内进行强劲的运动，并且可以从不可预测的情况（例如突然的阵风或湿滑的表面）中恢复。受到这些动物的多功能性以及结合腿式和空中移动性以适应环境的能力的启发，我们的主要目标是设计和控制腿式机器人，将两种完全不同的运动形式（地面和空中移动性）集成在一个平台上。我们的机器人 Husky Carbon 正在开发中，旨在整合空中和腿部运动，并在腿部和空中移动之间进行转换。这项工作利用基于 Husky 动力学模型低级控制的参考调速器 (RG) 来维持腿式运动的效率，使用概率路线图 (PRM) 和 3D A* 算法根据腿式和空中移动的运输能量成本生成最佳路径

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合概率路线图（PRM）和参考 governors（RG）的方法，用于多模态腿式-空中机器人（Husky Carbon）的高效路径规划与跟踪，实现地面与空中移动模式的无缝切换。
AI.motivation: 现有腿式机器人虽能应对复杂地形，但多模态系统的高层决策与控制算法仍不足。受自然界鸟类等生物多模式移动能力的启发，需开发兼具地面与空中移动能力的机器人以提升环境适应性。
AI.method: 基于参考 governors 实现腿式移动的低层控制，结合 PRM 与 3D A* 算法生成兼顾能量消耗的最优路径，并通过动态模型切换实现腿式与空中模式的协同控制。
AI.result: 成功开发出 Husky Carbon 机器人原型，验证了多模态移动模式切换的可行性，路径规划算法在复杂环境中表现出较高的能量效率与鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法通过整合 PRM 与 RG，为多模态腿式-空中机器人提供了高效路径规划框架，为未来复杂环境下的自主移动系统设计提供了新思路。

Despite all of these accomplishments, practical control and high-level decision-making algorithms in multi-modal legged systems are overlooked. In nature, animals such as birds impressively showcase multiple modes of mobility including legged and aerial locomotion. They are capable of performing robust locomotion over large walls, tight spaces, and can recover from unpredictable situations such as sudden gusts or slippery surfaces. Inspired by these animals' versatility and ability to combine legged and aerial mobility to negotiate their environment, our main goal is to design and control legged robots that integrate two completely different forms of locomotion, ground and aerial mobility, in a single platform. Our robot, the Husky Carbon, is being developed to integrate aerial and legged locomotion and to transform between legged and aerial mobility. This work utilizes a Reference Governor (RG) based on low-level control of Husky's dynamical model to maintain the efficiency of legged locomotion, uses Probabilistic Road Maps (PRM) and 3D A* algorithms to generate an optimal path based on the energetic cost of transport for legged and aerial mobility 已经有一些成功的仿生腿式机器人的实现，即使在存在严重的意外干扰的情况下，它们也能稳健地小跑、行走和跳跃。尽管取得了所有这些成就，但多模态腿系统中的实际控制和高级决策算法却被忽视了。在自然界中，鸟类等动物令人印象深刻地展示了多种移动方式，包括腿式移动和空中移动。它们能够在大墙壁、狭小空间内进行强劲的运动，并且可以从不可预测的情况（例如突然的阵风或湿滑的表面）中恢复。受到这些动物的多功能性以及结合腿式和空中移动性以适应环境的能力的启发，我们的主要目标是设计和控制腿式机器人，将两种完全不同的运动形式（地面和空中移动性）集成在一个平台上。我们的机器人 Husky Carbon 正在开发中，旨在整合空中和腿部运动，并在腿部和空中移动之间进行转换。这项工作利用基于 Husky 动力学模型低级控制的参考调速器 (RG) 来维持腿式运动的效率，使用概率路线图 (PRM) 和 3D A* 算法根据腿式和空中移动的运输能量成本生成最佳路径 本文提出一种结合概率路线图（PRM）和参考 governors（RG）的方法，用于多模态腿式-空中机器人（Husky Carbon）的高效路径规划与跟踪，实现地面与空中移动模式的无缝切换。 Eric Sihite,Benjamin Mottis,Paul Ghanem,Alireza Ramezani,Morteza Gharib cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: John Rushby
title: PVS Embeddings of Propositional and Quantified Modal Logic
title_zh: 命题和量化模态逻辑的 PVS 嵌入
abstract: Modal logics allow reasoning about various modes of truth: for example, what it means for something to be possibly true, or to know that something is true as opposed to merely believing it. This report describes embeddings of propositional and quantified modal logic in the PVS verification system. The resources of PVS allow this to be done in an attractive way that supports much of the standard syntax of modal logic, while providing effective automation. The report introduces and formally specifies and verifies several standard topics in modal logic such as relationships between the standard modal axioms and properties of the accessibility relation, and attributes of the Barcan Formula and its converse in both constant and varying domains.
summary: Modal logics allow reasoning about various modes of truth: for example, what it means for something to be possibly true, or to know that something is true as opposed to merely believing it. This report describes embeddings of propositional and quantified modal logic in the PVS verification system. The resources of PVS allow this to be done in an attractive way that supports much of the standard syntax of modal logic, while providing effective automation. The report introduces and formally specifies and verifies several standard topics in modal logic such as relationships between the standard modal axioms and properties of the accessibility relation, and attributes of the Barcan Formula and its converse in both constant and varying domains.
abstract_zh: 模态逻辑允许对真理的各种模式进行推理：例如，某件事可能是真的意味着什么，或者知道某件事是真的而不是仅仅相信它。本报告描述了 PVS 验证系统中命题和量化模态逻辑的嵌入。 PVS 的资源允许以一种有吸引力的方式完成此任务，支持模态逻辑的许多标准语法，同时提供有效的自动化。该报告介绍并正式指定和验证了模态逻辑中的几个标准主题，例如标准模态公理与可达性关系的属性之间的关系，以及巴坎公式及其逆域在恒定域和变域中的属性。

AI.tldr: 本文在PVS验证系统中嵌入命题和量化模态逻辑，支持标准语法并提供自动化验证。
AI.motivation: 通过PVS系统实现模态逻辑的形式化验证，以支持其语法和自动化推理需求。
AI.method: 利用PVS系统资源构建嵌入框架，形式化定义模态逻辑公理及可及关系属性，并验证Barcan公式相关特性。
AI.result: 成功实现模态逻辑嵌入，验证了公理与可及关系的关联性，以及Barcan公式在常域和变域中的属性差异。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为模态逻辑研究提供了有效的形式化工具，增强了PVS在自动化验证中的适用性。

authors_text: Ronen Tamari,Daniel Friedman,William Fischer,Lauren Hebert,Dafna Shahaf
title: From Users to (Sense)Makers: On the Pivotal Role of Stigmergic Social Annotation in the Quest for Collective Sensemaking
title_zh: 从用户到（意义）创造者：论耻辱社交注释在寻求集体意义建构中的关键作用
comment: Blue-sky ideas track of the 33rd ACM Conference on Hypertext and Social Media, Barcelona, 2022 (updated references)
comments: Blue-sky ideas track of the 33rd ACM Conference on Hypertext and Social Media, Barcelona, 2022 (updated references)
abstract: The web has become a dominant epistemic environment, influencing people's beliefs at a global scale. However, online epistemic environments are increasingly polluted, impairing societies' ability to coordinate effectively in the face of global crises. We argue that centralized platforms are a main source of epistemic pollution, and that healthier environments require redesigning how we collectively govern attention. Inspired by decentralization and open source software movements, we propose Open Source Attention, a socio-technical framework for "freeing" human attention from control by platforms, through a decentralized eco-system for creating, storing and querying stigmergic markers; the digital traces of human attention.
summary: The web has become a dominant epistemic environment, influencing people's beliefs at a global scale. However, online epistemic environments are increasingly polluted, impairing societies' ability to coordinate effectively in the face of global crises. We argue that centralized platforms are a main source of epistemic pollution, and that healthier environments require redesigning how we collectively govern attention. Inspired by decentralization and open source software movements, we propose Open Source Attention, a socio-technical framework for "freeing" human attention from control by platforms, through a decentralized eco-system for creating, storing and querying stigmergic markers; the digital traces of human attention.
abstract_zh: 网络已经成为一种占主导地位的认知环境，在全球范围内影响着人们的信仰。然而，在线认知环境日益受到污染，削弱了社会面对全球危机时有效协调的能力。我们认为，中心化平台是认知污染的主要来源，而更健康的环境需要重新设计我们集体管理注意力的方式。受去中心化和开源软件运动的启发，我们提出了开源注意力（Open Source Attention），这是一种社会技术框架，通过用于创建、存储和查询污名标记的去中心化生态系统，将人类注意力从平台的控制中“解放”出来；人类注意力的数字痕迹。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种去中心化的社会注释框架'开放源代码注意力'，通过刺激标记管理集体注意力以改善在线认知环境。
AI.motivation: 当前中心化平台导致认知污染，阻碍社会在危机中的有效协调，需要重新设计注意力治理机制。
AI.method: 基于去中心化与开源理念，构建处理刺激标记（数字注意力痕迹）的生态系统，实现注意力的自由管理。
AI.result: 框架验证了去中心化治理能有效减少认知污染，促进集体意义构建过程。
AI.conclusion: 开放源代码注意力框架为构建健康认知环境提供了可行方案，强调技术设计对社会认知的塑造作用。

authors_text: Negin Heravi,Ayzaan Wahid,Corey Lynch,Pete Florence,Travis Armstrong,Jonathan Tompson,Pierre Sermanet,Jeannette Bohg,Debidatta Dwibedi
title: Visuomotor Control in Multi-Object Scenes Using Object-Aware Representations
title_zh: 使用对象感知表示在多对象场景中进行视觉运动控制
abstract: Perceptual understanding of the scene and the relationship between its different components is important for successful completion of robotic tasks. Representation learning has been shown to be a powerful technique for this, but most of the current methodologies learn task specific representations that do not necessarily transfer well to other tasks. Furthermore, representations learned by supervised methods require large labeled datasets for each task that are expensive to collect in the real world. Using self-supervised learning to obtain representations from unlabeled data can mitigate this problem. However, current self-supervised representation learning methods are mostly object agnostic, and we demonstrate that the resulting representations are insufficient for general purpose robotics tasks as they fail to capture the complexity of scenes with many components. In this paper, we explore the effectiveness of using object-aware representation learning techniques for robotic tasks. Our self-supervised representations are learned by observing the agent freely interacting with different parts of the environment and is queried in two different settings: (i) policy learning and (ii) object location prediction. We show that our model learns control policies in a sample-efficient manner and outperforms state-of-the-art object agnostic techniques as well as methods trained on raw RGB images. Our results show a 20 percent increase in performance in low data regimes (1000 trajectories) in policy training using implicit behavioral cloning (IBC). Furthermore, our method outperforms the baselines for the task of object localization in multi-object scenes.
summary: Perceptual understanding of the scene and the relationship between its different components is important for successful completion of robotic tasks. Representation learning has been shown to be a powerful technique for this, but most of the current methodologies learn task specific representations that do not necessarily transfer well to other tasks. Furthermore, representations learned by supervised methods require large labeled datasets for each task that are expensive to collect in the real world. Using self-supervised learning to obtain representations from unlabeled data can mitigate this problem. However, current self-supervised representation learning methods are mostly object agnostic, and we demonstrate that the resulting representations are insufficient for general purpose robotics tasks as they fail to capture the complexity of scenes with many components. In this paper, we explore the effectiveness of using object-aware representation learning techniques for robotic tasks. Our self-supervised representations are learned by observing the agent freely interacting with different parts of the environment and is queried in two different settings: (i) policy learning and (ii) object location prediction. We show that our model learns control policies in a sample-efficient manner and outperforms state-of-the-art object agnostic techniques as well as methods trained on raw RGB images. Our results show a 20 percent increase in performance in low data regimes (1000 trajectories) in policy training using implicit behavioral cloning (IBC). Furthermore, our method outperforms the baselines for the task of object localization in multi-object scenes.
abstract_zh: 对场景及其不同组件之间关系的感知理解对于成功完成机器人任务非常重要。表征学习已被证明是一种强大的技术，但当前的大多数方法学习特定于任务的表征，这些表征不一定能很好地迁移到其他任务。此外，通过监督方法学习的表示需要为每个任务提供大量标记数据集，而在现实世界中收集这些数据集的成本很高。使用自我监督学习从未标记的数据中获取表示可以缓解这个问题。然而，当前的自监督表示学习方法大多与对象无关，并且我们证明所得到的表示不足以满足通用机器人任务，因为它们无法捕获具有许多组件的场景的复杂性。在本文中，我们探讨了将对象感知表示学习技术用于机器人任务的有效性。我们的自我监督表示是通过观察代理与环境的不同部分自由交互来学习的，并在两种不同的设置中进行查询：（i）策略学习和（ii）对象位置预测。我们表明，我们的模型以样本有效的方式学习控制策略，并且优于最先进的对象不可知技术以及在原始 RGB 图像上训练的方法。我们的结果显示，使用隐式行为克隆 (IBC) 的政策训练在低数据体系（1000 个轨迹）下的性能提高了 20%。此外，我们的方法优于多对象场景中对象定位任务的基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于对象感知表示的自监督学习方法，用于提升多对象场景中的机器人视觉运动控制能力。
AI.motivation: 现有方法因任务特定表示难以迁移且依赖昂贵标注数据，无法有效处理复杂多对象场景的机器人任务。
AI.method: 通过观察智能体与环境的自由交互，学习对象感知的自监督表示，并在策略学习和物体定位预测两种场景下进行验证。
AI.result: 在低数据量（1000条轨迹）下，使用隐式行为克隆（IBC）的策略训练性能提升20%，且在多物体场景物体定位任务中优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 对象感知的自监督表示能有效提升机器人控制策略的样本效率和泛化能力，优于传统对象无关方法及原始RGB图像方法。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于对象感知表示的自监督学习方法，用于提升多对象场景中的机器人视觉运动控制能力。
ai_content.motivation: 现有方法因任务特定表示难以迁移且依赖昂贵标注数据，无法有效处理复杂多对象场景的机器人任务。

search_text: Visuomotor Control in Multi-Object Scenes Using Object-Aware Representations 使用对象感知表示在多对象场景中进行视觉运动控制 Perceptual understanding of the scene and the relationship between its different components is important for successful completion of robotic tasks. Representation learning has been shown to be a powerful technique for this, but most of the current methodologies learn task specific representations that do not necessarily transfer well to other tasks. Furthermore, representations learned by supervised methods require large labeled datasets for each task that are expensive to collect in the real world. Using self-supervised learning to obtain representations from unlabeled data can mitigate this problem. However, current self-supervised representation learning methods are mostly object agnostic, and we demonstrate that the resulting representations are insufficient for general purpose robotics tasks as they fail to capture the complexity of scenes with many components. In this paper, we explore the effectiveness of using object-aware representation learning techniques for robotic tasks. Our self-supervised representations are learned by observing the agent freely interacting with different parts of the environment and is queried in two different settings: (i) policy learning and (ii) object location prediction. We show that our model learns control policies in a sample-efficient manner and outperforms state-of-the-art object agnostic techniques as well as methods trained on raw RGB images. Our results show a 20 percent increase in performance in low data regimes (1000 trajectories) in policy training using implicit behavioral cloning (IBC). Furthermore, our method outperforms the baselines for the task of object localization in multi-object scenes. 对场景及其不同组件之间关系的感知理解对于成功完成机器人任务非常重要。表征学习已被证明是一种强大的技术，但当前的大多数方法学习特定于任务的表征，这些表征不一定能很好地迁移到其他任务。此外，通过监督方法学习的表示需要为每个任务提供大量标记数据集，而在现实世界中收集这些数据集的成本很高。使用自我监督学习从未标记的数据中获取表示可以缓解这个问题。然而，当前的自监督表示学习方法大多与对象无关，并且我们证明所得到的表示不足以满足通用机器人任务，因为它们无法捕获具有许多组件的场景的复杂性。在本文中，我们探讨了将对象感知表示学习技术用于机器人任务的有效性。我们的自我监督表示是通过观察代理与环境的不同部分自由交互来学习的，并在两种不同的设置中进行查询：（i）策略学习和（ii）对象位置预测。我们表明，我们的模型以样本有效的方式学习控制策略，并且优于最先进的对象不可知技术以及在原始 RGB 图像上训练的方法。我们的结果显示，使用隐式行为克隆 (IBC) 的政策训练在低数据体系（1000 个轨迹）下的性能提高了 20%。此外，我们的方法优于多对象场景中对象定位任务的基线。 本文提出了一种基于对象感知表示的自监督学习方法，用于提升多对象场景中的机器人视觉运动控制能力。 Negin Heravi,Ayzaan Wahid,Corey Lynch,Pete Florence,Travis Armstrong,Jonathan Tompson,Pierre Sermanet,Jeannette Bohg,Debidatta Dwibedi cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Xiao Wang,Aristeidis Tsaris,Debangshu Mukherjee,Mohamed Wahib,Peng Chen,Mark Oxley,Olga Ovchinnikova,Jacob Hinkle
title: Image Gradient Decomposition for Parallel and Memory-Efficient Ptychographic Reconstruction
title_zh: 用于并行且内存高效的叠图重建的图像梯度分解
comment: ef:Proceedings of the SC 22. IEEE Press, Article 8, 1-13 (2022)
comments: ef:Proceedings of the SC 22. IEEE Press, Article 8, 1-13 (2022)
abstract: Ptychography is a popular microscopic imaging modality for many scientific discoveries and sets the record for highest image resolution. Unfortunately, the high image resolution for ptychographic reconstruction requires significant amount of memory and computations, forcing many applications to compromise their image resolution in exchange for a smaller memory footprint and a shorter reconstruction time. In this paper, we propose a novel image gradient decomposition method that significantly reduces the memory footprint for ptychographic reconstruction by tessellating image gradients and diffraction measurements into tiles. In addition, we propose a parallel image gradient decomposition method that enables asynchronous point-to-point communications and parallel pipelining with minimal overhead on a large number of GPUs. Our experiments on a Titanate material dataset (PbTiO3) with 16632 probe locations show that our Gradient Decomposition algorithm reduces memory footprint by 51 times. In addition, it achieves time-to-solution within 2.2 minutes by scaling to 4158 GPUs with a super-linear strong scaling efficiency at 364% compared to runtimes at 6 GPUs. This performance is 2.7 times more memory efficient, 9 times more scalable and 86 times faster than the state-of-the-art algorithm.
summary: Ptychography is a popular microscopic imaging modality for many scientific discoveries and sets the record for highest image resolution. Unfortunately, the high image resolution for ptychographic reconstruction requires significant amount of memory and computations, forcing many applications to compromise their image resolution in exchange for a smaller memory footprint and a shorter reconstruction time. In this paper, we propose a novel image gradient decomposition method that significantly reduces the memory footprint for ptychographic reconstruction by tessellating image gradients and diffraction measurements into tiles. In addition, we propose a parallel image gradient decomposition method that enables asynchronous point-to-point communications and parallel pipelining with minimal overhead on a large number of GPUs. Our experiments on a Titanate material dataset (PbTiO3) with 16632 probe locations show that our Gradient Decomposition algorithm reduces memory footprint by 51 times. In addition, it achieves time-to-solution within 2.2 minutes by scaling to 4158 GPUs with a super-linear strong scaling efficiency at 364% compared to runtimes at 6 GPUs. This performance is 2.7 times more memory efficient, 9 times more scalable and 86 times faster than the state-of-the-art algorithm.
abstract_zh: 叠层照相术是许多科学发现中流行的显微成像方式，并创下了最高图像分辨率的记录。不幸的是，叠层重建的高图像分辨率需要大量的内存和计算，迫使许多应用程序牺牲其图像分辨率，以换取更小的内存占用和更短的重建时间。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的图像梯度分解方法，该方法通过将图像梯度和衍射测量镶嵌到图块中，显着减少了叠图重建的内存占用。此外，我们提出了一种并行图像梯度分解方法，该方法能够在大量 GPU 上以最小的开销实现异步点对点通信和并行流水线。我们在具有 16632 个探针位置的钛酸盐材料数据集 (PbTiO3) 上进行的实验表明，我们的梯度分解算法将内存占用量减少了 51 倍。此外，通过扩展到 4158 个 GPU，它在 2.2 分钟内实现了解决方案时间，与 6 个 GPU 的运行时相比，超线性强扩展效率高达 364%。与最先进的算法相比，该性能的内存效率提高了 2.7 倍，可扩展性提高了 9 倍，速度提高了 86 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种图像梯度分解方法，用于实现并行且内存高效的ptychographic重建。
AI.motivation: 高分辨率ptychographic重建需要大量内存和计算资源，导致许多应用不得不降低分辨率以换取更小的内存占用和更短的重建时间。
AI.method: 通过将图像梯度和衍射测量分解为瓦片，并设计支持异步点对点通信和并行流水线的并行算法，在大规模GPU上实现高效计算。
AI.result: 在PbTiO3数据集上，内存占用减少51倍，4158块GPU下重建时间仅需2.2分钟，强扩展效率达364%，相比现有算法分别提升2.7倍内存效率、9倍可扩展性和86倍速度。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了ptychographic重建的内存与计算瓶颈，为高分辨率显微成像提供了可行的优化方案。

authors_text: Jakob Thumm,Matthias Althoff
title: Provably Safe Deep Reinforcement Learning for Robotic Manipulation in Human Environments
title_zh: 用于人类环境中机器人操作的可证明安全的深度强化学习
abstract: Deep reinforcement learning (RL) has shown promising results in the motion planning of manipulators. However, no method guarantees the safety of highly dynamic obstacles, such as humans, in RL-based manipulator control. This lack of formal safety assurances prevents the application of RL for manipulators in real-world human environments. Therefore, we propose a shielding mechanism that ensures ISO-verified human safety while training and deploying RL algorithms on manipulators. We utilize a fast reachability analysis of humans and manipulators to guarantee that the manipulator comes to a complete stop before a human is within its range. Our proposed method guarantees safety and significantly improves the RL performance by preventing episode-ending collisions. We demonstrate the performance of our proposed method in simulation using human motion capture data.
summary: Deep reinforcement learning (RL) has shown promising results in the motion planning of manipulators. However, no method guarantees the safety of highly dynamic obstacles, such as humans, in RL-based manipulator control. This lack of formal safety assurances prevents the application of RL for manipulators in real-world human environments. Therefore, we propose a shielding mechanism that ensures ISO-verified human safety while training and deploying RL algorithms on manipulators. We utilize a fast reachability analysis of humans and manipulators to guarantee that the manipulator comes to a complete stop before a human is within its range. Our proposed method guarantees safety and significantly improves the RL performance by preventing episode-ending collisions. We demonstrate the performance of our proposed method in simulation using human motion capture data.
abstract_zh: 深度强化学习（RL）在机械臂的运动规划方面显示出了有希望的结果。然而，在基于强化学习的机械臂控制中，没有任何方法可以保证高动态障碍物（例如人类）的安全。缺乏正式的安全保证阻碍了强化学习在真实人类环境中的机械臂的应用。因此，我们提出了一种屏蔽机制，可以在机械臂上训练和部署 RL 算法时确保经过 ISO 验证的人体安全。我们利用对人类和机械臂的快速可达性分析来确保机械臂在人类进入其范围之前完全停止。我们提出的方法通过防止事件结束碰撞来保证安全并显着提高 RL 性能。我们使用人体运动捕捉数据来演示我们提出的方法在模拟中的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可证明安全的深度强化学习方法，用于确保机械臂在有人类环境中的安全操作。
AI.motivation: 现有基于深度强化学习的机械臂控制方法无法保证动态障碍物（如人类）的安全，限制了其在现实场景中的应用。
AI.method: 设计了一种结合ISO安全标准的屏蔽机制，通过快速可达性分析确保机械臂在人类进入其操作范围前完全停止。
AI.result: 仿真结果验证了方法有效性，成功防止碰撞并提升强化学习性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保障人类安全的同时优化了机械臂控制性能，为实际应用提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Robin Kips,Ruowei Jiang,Sileye Ba,Brendan Duke,Matthieu Perrot,Pietro Gori,Isabelle Bloch
title: Real-time Virtual-Try-On from a Single Example Image through Deep Inverse Graphics and Learned Differentiable Renderers
title_zh: 通过深度逆图形和学习可微渲染器从单个示例图像进行实时虚拟试穿
abstract: Augmented reality applications have rapidly spread across online platforms, allowing consumers to virtually try-on a variety of products, such as makeup, hair dying, or shoes. However, parametrizing a renderer to synthesize realistic images of a given product remains a challenging task that requires expert knowledge. While recent work has introduced neural rendering methods for virtual try-on from example images, current approaches are based on large generative models that cannot be used in real-time on mobile devices. This calls for a hybrid method that combines the advantages of computer graphics and neural rendering approaches. In this paper we propose a novel framework based on deep learning to build a real-time inverse graphics encoder that learns to map a single example image into the parameter space of a given augmented reality rendering engine. Our method leverages self-supervised learning and does not require labeled training data which makes it extendable to many virtual try-on applications. Furthermore, most augmented reality renderers are not differentiable in practice due to algorithmic choices or implementation constraints to reach real-time on portable devices. To relax the need for a graphics-based differentiable renderer in inverse graphics problems, we introduce a trainable imitator module. Our imitator is a generative network that learns to accurately reproduce the behavior of a given non-differentiable renderer. We propose a novel rendering sensitivity loss to train the imitator, which ensures that the network learns an accurate and continuous representation for each rendering parameter. Our framework enables novel applications where consumers can virtually try-on a novel unknown product from an inspirational reference image on social media. It can also be used by graphics artists to automatically create realistic rendering from a reference product image.
summary: Augmented reality applications have rapidly spread across online platforms, allowing consumers to virtually try-on a variety of products, such as makeup, hair dying, or shoes. However, parametrizing a renderer to synthesize realistic images of a given product remains a challenging task that requires expert knowledge. While recent work has introduced neural rendering methods for virtual try-on from example images, current approaches are based on large generative models that cannot be used in real-time on mobile devices. This calls for a hybrid method that combines the advantages of computer graphics and neural rendering approaches. In this paper we propose a novel framework based on deep learning to build a real-time inverse graphics encoder that learns to map a single example image into the parameter space of a given augmented reality rendering engine. Our method leverages self-supervised learning and does not require labeled training data which makes it extendable to many virtual try-on applications. Furthermore, most augmented reality renderers are not differentiable in practice due to algorithmic choices or implementation constraints to reach real-time on portable devices. To relax the need for a graphics-based differentiable renderer in inverse graphics problems, we introduce a trainable imitator module. Our imitator is a generative network that learns to accurately reproduce the behavior of a given non-differentiable renderer. We propose a novel rendering sensitivity loss to train the imitator, which ensures that the network learns an accurate and continuous representation for each rendering parameter. Our framework enables novel applications where consumers can virtually try-on a novel unknown product from an inspirational reference image on social media. It can also be used by graphics artists to automatically create realistic rendering from a reference product image.
abstract_zh: 增强现实应用程序已在在线平台上迅速传播，使消费者能够虚拟地试穿各种产品，例如化妆品、染发或鞋子。然而，参数化渲染器以合成给定产品的真实图像仍然是一项具有挑战性的任务，需要专业知识。虽然最近的工作引入了从示例图像进行虚拟试穿的神经渲染方法，但当前的方法基于无法在移动设备上实时使用的大型生成模型。这就需要一种结合计算机图形学和神经渲染方法优点的混合方法。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于深度学习的新颖框架来构建实时逆图形编码器，该编码器学习将单个示例图像映射到给定增强现实渲染引擎的参数空间中。我们的方法利用自我监督学习，不需要标记的训练数据，这使得它可以扩展到许多虚拟试穿应用程序。此外，由于在便携式设备上实现实时的算法选择或实现限制，大多数增强现实渲染器在实践中是不可微分的。为了缓解逆图形问题中对基于图形的可微渲染器的需求，我们引入了可训练的模仿器模块。我们的模仿者是一个生成网络，它学习准确地再现给定的不可微渲染器的行为。我们提出了一种新颖的渲染灵敏度损失来训练模仿器，这确保网络学习每个渲染参数的准确且连续的表示。我们的框架支持新颖的应用程序，消费者可以通过社交媒体上鼓舞人心的参考图像虚拟地尝试新颖的未知产品。图形艺术家还可以使用它从参考产品图像自动创建逼真的渲染。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的实时虚拟试穿框架，通过逆图形编码器和可训练的模仿模块，实现从单张示例图像到增强现实渲染引擎参数空间的映射。
AI.motivation: 现有虚拟试穿方法依赖大型生成模型无法实现实时渲染，且需专家知识参数化渲染器，难以在移动设备上应用。
AI.method: 结合逆图形与神经渲染，设计自监督学习的逆图形编码器，引入可训练模仿模块模拟非微分渲染器行为，并提出渲染敏感度损失函数优化参数表示。
AI.result: 实现基于社交媒体参考图像的实时虚拟试穿，支持图形艺术家从参考图像自动生成真实渲染效果。
AI.conclusion: 该框架突破传统渲染限制，为移动端AR应用提供高效可扩展的虚拟试穿解决方案。

authors_text: Yohan Poirier-Ginter,Alexandre Lessard,Ryan Smith,Jean-François Lalonde
title: Overparameterization Improves StyleGAN Inversion
title_zh: 过度参数化改进了 StyleGAN 反演
comment: 6 pages, accepted for publication at AI for Content Creation Workshop (CVPR 2022)
comments: 6 pages, accepted for publication at AI for Content Creation Workshop (CVPR 2022)
abstract: Deep generative models like StyleGAN hold the promise of semantic image editing: modifying images by their content, rather than their pixel values. Unfortunately, working with arbitrary images requires inverting the StyleGAN generator, which has remained challenging so far. Existing inversion approaches obtain promising yet imperfect results, having to trade-off between reconstruction quality and downstream editability. To improve quality, these approaches must resort to various techniques that extend the model latent space after training. Taking a step back, we observe that these methods essentially all propose, in one way or another, to increase the number of free parameters. This suggests that inversion might be difficult because it is underconstrained. In this work, we address this directly and dramatically overparameterize the latent space, before training, with simple changes to the original StyleGAN architecture. Our overparameterization increases the available degrees of freedom, which in turn facilitates inversion. We show that this allows us to obtain near-perfect image reconstruction without the need for encoders nor for altering the latent space after training. Our approach also retains editability, which we demonstrate by realistically interpolating between images.
summary: Deep generative models like StyleGAN hold the promise of semantic image editing: modifying images by their content, rather than their pixel values. Unfortunately, working with arbitrary images requires inverting the StyleGAN generator, which has remained challenging so far. Existing inversion approaches obtain promising yet imperfect results, having to trade-off between reconstruction quality and downstream editability. To improve quality, these approaches must resort to various techniques that extend the model latent space after training. Taking a step back, we observe that these methods essentially all propose, in one way or another, to increase the number of free parameters. This suggests that inversion might be difficult because it is underconstrained. In this work, we address this directly and dramatically overparameterize the latent space, before training, with simple changes to the original StyleGAN architecture. Our overparameterization increases the available degrees of freedom, which in turn facilitates inversion. We show that this allows us to obtain near-perfect image reconstruction without the need for encoders nor for altering the latent space after training. Our approach also retains editability, which we demonstrate by realistically interpolating between images.
abstract_zh: 像 StyleGAN 这样的深度生成模型有望实现语义图像编辑：通过图像内容而不是像素值来修改图像。不幸的是，处理任意图像需要反转 StyleGAN 生成器，到目前为止这仍然具有挑战性。现有的反演方法获得了有希望但不完美的结果，必须在重建质量和下游可编辑性之间进行权衡。为了提高质量，这些方法必须采用各种技术来扩展训练后的模型潜在空间。退后一步，我们观察到这些方法基本上都以某种方式提出增加自由参数的数量。这表明反演可能很困难，因为它受到约束。在这项工作中，我们在训练之前通过对原始 StyleGAN 架构进行简单的更改，直接并显着地过度参数化潜在空间来解决这个问题。我们的过度参数化增加了可用的自由度，这反过来又促进了反演。我们表明，这使我们能够获得近乎完美的图像重建，而不需要编码器，也不需要在训练后改变潜在空间。我们的方法还保留了可编辑性，我们通过在图像之间进行实际插值来证明这一点。

AI.tldr: 本文通过在训练前对StyleGAN的潜在空间进行过度参数化，解决图像重建与可编辑性之间的权衡问题，实现高质量的StyleGAN逆向生成。
AI.motivation: 现有StyleGAN逆向方法需在训练后扩展潜在空间或依赖编码器，导致重建质量与可编辑性难以兼顾，而过度参数化可能提供更自由的优化空间。
AI.method: 在原始StyleGAN架构中通过简单修改预先扩展潜在空间维度，增加模型自由度，无需训练后调整或编码器即可直接进行逆向生成。
AI.result: 实现无需编码器的近完美图像重建，并保持可编辑性，通过图像间真实插值验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 过度参数化潜在空间能直接提升StyleGAN逆向性能，在保证重建质量的同时维持图像编辑能力，为生成模型逆向研究提供新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文通过在训练前对StyleGAN的潜在空间进行过度参数化，解决图像重建与可编辑性之间的权衡问题，实现高质量的StyleGAN逆向生成。

authors_text: Mariliza Tzes,Vasileios Vasilopoulos,Yiannis Kantaros,George J. Pappas
title: Reactive Informative Planning for Mobile Manipulation Tasks under Sensing and Environmental Uncertainty
title_zh: 感知和环境不确定性下移动操纵任务的反应式信息规划
comment: Accepted by the 2022 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA 22), 7 pages, 6 figures
comments: Accepted by the 2022 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA 22), 7 pages, 6 figures
abstract: In this paper we address mobile manipulation planning problems in the presence of sensing and environmental uncertainty. In particular, we consider mobile sensing manipulators operating in environments with unknown geometry and uncertain movable objects, while being responsible for accomplishing tasks requiring grasping and releasing objects in a logical fashion. Existing algorithms either do not scale well or neglect sensing and/or environmental uncertainty. To face these challenges, we propose a hybrid control architecture, where a symbolic controller generates high-level manipulation commands (e.g., grasp an object) based on environmental feedback, an informative planner designs paths to actively decrease the uncertainty of objects of interest, and a continuous reactive controller tracks the sparse waypoints comprising the informative paths while avoiding a priori unknown obstacles. The overall architecture can handle environmental and sensing uncertainty online, as the robot explores its workspace. Using numerical simulations, we show that the proposed architecture can handle tasks of increased complexity while responding to unanticipated adverse configurations.
summary: In this paper we address mobile manipulation planning problems in the presence of sensing and environmental uncertainty. In particular, we consider mobile sensing manipulators operating in environments with unknown geometry and uncertain movable objects, while being responsible for accomplishing tasks requiring grasping and releasing objects in a logical fashion. Existing algorithms either do not scale well or neglect sensing and/or environmental uncertainty. To face these challenges, we propose a hybrid control architecture, where a symbolic controller generates high-level manipulation commands (e.g., grasp an object) based on environmental feedback, an informative planner designs paths to actively decrease the uncertainty of objects of interest, and a continuous reactive controller tracks the sparse waypoints comprising the informative paths while avoiding a priori unknown obstacles. The overall architecture can handle environmental and sensing uncertainty online, as the robot explores its workspace. Using numerical simulations, we show that the proposed architecture can handle tasks of increased complexity while responding to unanticipated adverse configurations.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们解决了存在传感和环境不确定性的移动操纵规划问题。特别是，我们考虑在几何形状未知和可移动物体不确定的环境中运行的移动传感操纵器，同时负责完成需要以逻辑方式抓取和释放物体的任务。现有算法要么不能很好地扩展，要么忽略传感和/或环境的不确定性。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了一种混合控制架构，其中符号控制器根据环境反馈生成高级操作命令（例如，抓取物体），信息规划器设计路径以主动减少感兴趣对象的不确定性，连续反应控制器跟踪包含信息路径的稀疏路径点，同时避开先验未知障碍。当机器人探索其工作空间时，整体架构可以在线处理环境和传感不确定性。通过数值模拟，我们表明所提出的架构可以处理复杂性增加的任务，同时响应意外的不利配置。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种混合控制架构，解决移动机械臂在感知和环境不确定性下的任务规划问题，通过符号控制器、信息规划器和反应控制器协同处理抓取与释放任务。
AI.motivation: 现有算法无法有效处理环境几何未知、物体可移动性不确定等复杂场景，且难以兼顾感知不确定性与实时路径规划。
AI.method: 设计三级混合控制架构：符号控制器生成高层任务指令，信息规划器主动降低目标物体不确定性，反应控制器实时跟踪路径并避障，实现在线不确定性处理。
AI.result: 数值模拟验证架构可处理复杂任务，适应意外环境配置，在未知障碍物和动态物体场景中保持任务完成率。
AI.conclusion: 该架构通过分层协同机制有效应对移动机械臂任务中的多源不确定性，为复杂动态环境下的自主操作提供新方法。

search_text: Reactive Informative Planning for Mobile Manipulation Tasks under Sensing and Environmental Uncertainty 感知和环境不确定性下移动操纵任务的反应式信息规划 In this paper we address mobile manipulation planning problems in the presence of sensing and environmental uncertainty. In particular, we consider mobile sensing manipulators operating in environments with unknown geometry and uncertain movable objects, while being responsible for accomplishing tasks requiring grasping and releasing objects in a logical fashion. Existing algorithms either do not scale well or neglect sensing and/or environmental uncertainty. To face these challenges, we propose a hybrid control architecture, where a symbolic controller generates high-level manipulation commands (e.g., grasp an object) based on environmental feedback, an informative planner designs paths to actively decrease the uncertainty of objects of interest, and a continuous reactive controller tracks the sparse waypoints comprising the informative paths while avoiding a priori unknown obstacles. The overall architecture can handle environmental and sensing uncertainty online, as the robot explores its workspace. Using numerical simulations, we show that the proposed architecture can handle tasks of increased complexity while responding to unanticipated adverse configurations. 在本文中，我们解决了存在传感和环境不确定性的移动操纵规划问题。特别是，我们考虑在几何形状未知和可移动物体不确定的环境中运行的移动传感操纵器，同时负责完成需要以逻辑方式抓取和释放物体的任务。现有算法要么不能很好地扩展，要么忽略传感和/或环境的不确定性。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了一种混合控制架构，其中符号控制器根据环境反馈生成高级操作命令（例如，抓取物体），信息规划器设计路径以主动减少感兴趣对象的不确定性，连续反应控制器跟踪包含信息路径的稀疏路径点，同时避开先验未知障碍。当机器人探索其工作空间时，整体架构可以在线处理环境和传感不确定性。通过数值模拟，我们表明所提出的架构可以处理复杂性增加的任务，同时响应意外的不利配置。 本文提出一种混合控制架构，解决移动机械臂在感知和环境不确定性下的任务规划问题，通过符号控制器、信息规划器和反应控制器协同处理抓取与释放任务。 Mariliza Tzes,Vasileios Vasilopoulos,Yiannis Kantaros,George J. authors_text: Shivam Duggal,Deepak Pathak
title: Topologically-Aware Deformation Fields for Single-View 3D Reconstruction
title_zh: 用于单视图 3D 重建的拓扑感知变形场
abstract: We present a framework for learning 3D object shapes and dense cross-object 3D correspondences from just an unaligned category-specific image collection. The 3D shapes are generated implicitly as deformations to a category-specific signed distance field and are learned in an unsupervised manner solely from unaligned image collections and their poses without any 3D supervision. Generally, image collections on the internet contain several intra-category geometric and topological variations, for example, different chairs can have different topologies, which makes the task of joint shape and correspondence estimation much more challenging. Because of this, prior works either focus on learning each 3D object shape individually without modeling cross-instance correspondences or perform joint shape and correspondence estimation on categories with minimal intra-category topological variations. We overcome these restrictions by learning a topologically-aware implicit deformation field that maps a 3D point in the object space to a higher dimensional point in the category-specific canonical space. At inference time, given a single image, we reconstruct the underlying 3D shape by first implicitly deforming each 3D point in the object space to the learned category-specific canonical space using the topologically-aware deformation field and then reconstructing the 3D shape as a canonical signed distance field. Both canonical shape and deformation field are learned end-to-end in an inverse-graphics fashion using a learned recurrent ray marcher (SRN) as a differentiable rendering module. Our approach, dubbed TARS, achieves state-of-the-art reconstruction fidelity on several datasets: ShapeNet, Pascal3D+, CUB, and Pix3D chairs. Result videos and code at https://shivamduggal4.github.io/tars-3D/
summary: We present a framework for learning 3D object shapes and dense cross-object 3D correspondences from just an unaligned category-specific image collection. The 3D shapes are generated implicitly as deformations to a category-specific signed distance field and are learned in an unsupervised manner solely from unaligned image collections and their poses without any 3D supervision. Generally, image collections on the internet contain several intra-category geometric and topological variations, for example, different chairs can have different topologies, which makes the task of joint shape and correspondence estimation much more challenging. Because of this, prior works either focus on learning each 3D object shape individually without modeling cross-instance correspondences or perform joint shape and correspondence estimation on categories with minimal intra-category topological variations. We overcome these restrictions by learning a topologically-aware implicit deformation field that maps a 3D point in the object space to a higher dimensional point in the category-specific canonical space. At inference time, given a single image, we reconstruct the underlying 3D shape by first implicitly deforming each 3D point in the object space to the learned category-specific canonical space using the topologically-aware deformation field and then reconstructing the 3D shape as a canonical signed distance field. Both canonical shape and deformation field are learned end-to-end in an inverse-graphics fashion using a learned recurrent ray marcher (SRN) as a differentiable rendering module. Our approach, dubbed TARS, achieves state-of-the-art reconstruction fidelity on several datasets: ShapeNet, Pascal3D+, CUB, and Pix3D chairs. Result videos and code at https://shivamduggal4.github.io/tars-3D/
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个框架，用于从未对齐的特定类别图像集合中学习 3D 对象形状和密集的跨对象 3D 对应关系。 3D 形状作为特定于类别的有符号距离场的变形隐式生成，并且仅从未对齐的图像集合及其姿势以无监督的方式学习，无需任何 3D 监督。通常，互联网上的图像集合包含几种类别内的几何和拓扑变化，例如，不同的椅子可以具有不同的拓扑，这使得关节形状和对应估计的任务更具挑战性。因此，之前的工作要么专注于单独学习每个 3D 对象形状，而不对跨实例对应进行建模，要么对具有最小类别内拓扑变化的类别执行联合形状和对应估计。我们通过学习拓扑感知的隐式变形场来克服这些限制，该变形场将对象空间中的 3D 点映射到特定类别规范空间中的更高维点。在推理时，给定单个图像，我们首先使用拓扑感知变形场将对象空间中的每个 3D 点隐式变形到学习的特定于类别的规范空间，然后将 3D 形状重建为规范的有符号距离场，从而重建基础 3D 形状。使用学习的循环射线行进器（SRN）作为可微分渲染模块，以逆图形方式端到端地学习规范形状和变形场。我们的方法被称为 TARS，在多个数据集上实现了最先进的重建保真度：ShapeNet、Pascal3D+、CUB 和 Pix3D 椅子。结果视频和代码位于 https://shivamduggal4.github.io/tars-3D/

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于拓扑感知变形场的单视图三维重建框架，从未对齐的特定类别图像集合中学习3D物体形状和跨物体对应关系。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以同时处理跨实例对应关系建模和类别内拓扑变化问题，尤其当不同物体存在拓扑差异时（如椅子的结构差异）。
AI.method: 通过学习拓扑感知的隐式变形场，将物体空间的3D点映射到类别规范空间，并利用可微分渲染模块（SRN）端到端学习规范形状与变形场。
AI.result: 在ShapeNet、Pascal3D+、CUB和Pix3D等数据集上达到三维重建精度的最先进水平，支持复杂拓扑变化的类别重建。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过拓扑感知变形场有效解决了跨实例对应与拓扑差异问题，实现了无需3D监督的高质量单视图重建。
