authors_text: Yue Zhao,Yantao Shen,Yuanjun Xiong,Shuo Yang,Wei Xia,Zhuowen Tu,Bernt Schiele,Stefano Soatto
title: ELODI: Ensemble Logit Difference Inhibition for Positive-Congruent Training
title_zh: ELODI：用于正一致性训练的集成 Logit 差异抑制
comment: Accepted as a Regular Paper in TPAMI. Code is at https://github.com/amazon-science/regression-constraint-model-upgrade
comments: Accepted as a Regular Paper in TPAMI. Code is at https://github.com/amazon-science/regression-constraint-model-upgrade
abstract: Negative flips are errors introduced in a classification system when a legacy model is updated. Existing methods to reduce the negative flip rate (NFR) either do so at the expense of overall accuracy by forcing a new model to imitate the old models, or use ensembles, which multiply inference cost prohibitively. We analyze the role of ensembles in reducing NFR and observe that they remove negative flips that are typically not close to the decision boundary, but often exhibit large deviations in the distance among their logits. Based on the observation, we present a method, called Ensemble Logit Difference Inhibition (ELODI), to train a classification system that achieves paragon performance in both error rate and NFR, at the inference cost of a single model. The method distills a homogeneous ensemble to a single student model which is used to update the classification system. ELODI also introduces a generalized distillation objective, Logit Difference Inhibition (LDI), which only penalizes the logit difference of a subset of classes with the highest logit values. On multiple image classification benchmarks, model updates with ELODI demonstrate superior accuracy retention and NFR reduction.
summary: Negative flips are errors introduced in a classification system when a legacy model is updated. Existing methods to reduce the negative flip rate (NFR) either do so at the expense of overall accuracy by forcing a new model to imitate the old models, or use ensembles, which multiply inference cost prohibitively. We analyze the role of ensembles in reducing NFR and observe that they remove negative flips that are typically not close to the decision boundary, but often exhibit large deviations in the distance among their logits. Based on the observation, we present a method, called Ensemble Logit Difference Inhibition (ELODI), to train a classification system that achieves paragon performance in both error rate and NFR, at the inference cost of a single model. The method distills a homogeneous ensemble to a single student model which is used to update the classification system. ELODI also introduces a generalized distillation objective, Logit Difference Inhibition (LDI), which only penalizes the logit difference of a subset of classes with the highest logit values. On multiple image classification benchmarks, model updates with ELODI demonstrate superior accuracy retention and NFR reduction.
abstract_zh: 负翻转是更新遗留模型时在分类系统中引入的错误。现有的降低负翻转率 (NFR) 的方法要么通过强制新模型模仿旧模型来牺牲整体准确性，要么使用集成，这会极大地增加推理成本。我们分析了集成在减少 NFR 中的作用，并观察到它们消除了通常不接近决策边界的负翻转，但通常在其逻辑之间的距离上表现出较大的偏差。基于观察结果，我们提出了一种称为集成 Logit 差异抑制 (ELODI) 的方法，用于训练分类系统，以单个模型的推理成本实现错误率和 NFR 方面的典范性能。该方法将同质集成提炼为单个学生模型，用于更新分类系统。 ELODI 还引入了广义蒸馏目标，Logit 差异抑制 (LDI)，它仅惩罚具有最高 Logit 值的类子集的 Logit 差异。在多个图像分类基准上，使用 ELODI 进行的模型更新展示了卓越的准确性保留和 NFR 降低。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ELODI方法，在保持分类系统整体准确性的同时有效降低负翻转率（NFR），且推理成本仅为单模型。
AI.motivation: 现有减少NFR的方法或牺牲整体准确率，或依赖集成模型导致推理成本过高，亟需兼顾性能与效率的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过蒸馏同质集成模型至单学生模型，设计Logit Difference Inhibition（LDI）目标函数，仅对最高logit值类别间的差异进行惩罚。
AI.result: 在多个图像分类基准测试中，ELODI在模型更新时展现出更优的准确率保持能力和NFR降低效果。
AI.conclusion: ELODI通过创新性蒸馏机制和LDI目标，在单模型推理成本下实现了兼顾低NFR与高准确率的分类系统更新方案。

search_text: ELODI: Ensemble Logit Difference Inhibition for Positive-Congruent Training ELODI：用于正一致性训练的集成 Logit 差异抑制 Negative flips are errors introduced in a classification system when a legacy model is updated. Existing methods to reduce the negative flip rate (NFR) either do so at the expense of overall accuracy by forcing a new model to imitate the old models, or use ensembles, which multiply inference cost prohibitively. We analyze the role of ensembles in reducing NFR and observe that they remove negative flips that are typically not close to the decision boundary, but often exhibit large deviations in the distance among their logits. Based on the observation, we present a method, called Ensemble Logit Difference Inhibition (ELODI), to train a classification system that achieves paragon performance in both error rate and NFR, at the inference cost of a single model. The method distills a homogeneous ensemble to a single student model which is used to update the classification system. ELODI also introduces a generalized distillation objective, Logit Difference Inhibition (LDI), which only penalizes the logit difference of a subset of classes with the highest logit values. On multiple image classification benchmarks, model updates with ELODI demonstrate superior accuracy retention and NFR reduction. 负翻转是更新遗留模型时在分类系统中引入的错误。现有的降低负翻转率 (NFR) 的方法要么通过强制新模型模仿旧模型来牺牲整体准确性，要么使用集成，这会极大地增加推理成本。我们分析了集成在减少 NFR 中的作用，并观察到它们消除了通常不接近决策边界的负翻转，但通常在其逻辑之间的距离上表现出较大的偏差。基于观察结果，我们提出了一种称为集成 Logit 差异抑制 (ELODI) 的方法，用于训练分类系统，以单个模型的推理成本实现错误率和 NFR 方面的典范性能。该方法将同质集成提炼为单个学生模型，用于更新分类系统。 ELODI 还引入了广义蒸馏目标，Logit 差异抑制 (LDI)，它仅惩罚具有最高 Logit 值的类子集的 Logit 差异。在多个图像分类基准上，使用 ELODI 进行的模型更新展示了卓越的准确性保留和 NFR 降低。 本文提出ELODI方法，在保持分类系统整体准确性的同时有效降低负翻转率（NFR），且推理成本仅为单模型。 Yue Zhao,Yantao Shen,Yuanjun Xiong,Shuo Yang,Wei Xia,Zhuowen Tu,Bernt Schiele,Stefano Soatto cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Javier Segovia-Aguas,Sergio Jiménez,Anders Jonsson
title: Computing Programs for Generalized Planning as Heuristic Search
title_zh: 作为启发式搜索的广义规划计算程序
comment: Extended abstract accepted at IJCAI-22 Sister Conferences Best Paper Track. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2103.14434
comments: Extended abstract accepted at IJCAI-22 Sister Conferences Best Paper Track. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2103.14434
abstract: Although heuristic search is one of the most successful approaches to classical planning, this planning paradigm does not apply straightforwardly to Generalized Planning (GP). This paper adapts the planning as heuristic search paradigm to the particularities of GP, and presents the first native heuristic search approach to GP. First, the paper defines a program-based solution space for GP that is independent of the number of planning instances in a GP problem, and the size of these instances. Second, the paper defines the BFGP algorithm for GP, that implements a best-first search in our program-based solution space, and that is guided by different evaluation and heuristic functions.
summary: Although heuristic search is one of the most successful approaches to classical planning, this planning paradigm does not apply straightforwardly to Generalized Planning (GP). This paper adapts the planning as heuristic search paradigm to the particularities of GP, and presents the first native heuristic search approach to GP. First, the paper defines a program-based solution space for GP that is independent of the number of planning instances in a GP problem, and the size of these instances. Second, the paper defines the BFGP algorithm for GP, that implements a best-first search in our program-based solution space, and that is guided by different evaluation and heuristic functions.
abstract_zh: 尽管启发式搜索是经典规划最成功的方法之一，但这种规划范式并不直接适用于广义规划（GP）。本文将规划作为启发式搜索范式适应 GP 的特殊性，并提出了第一个针对 GP 的本地启发式搜索方法。首先，本文为 GP 定义了一个基于程序的解决方案空间，该空间独立于 GP 问题中规划实例的数量以及这些实例的大小。其次，本文定义了 GP 的 BFGP 算法，该算法在我们基于程序的解决方案空间中实现最佳优先搜索，并由不同的评估和启发式函数引导。

AI.tldr: 将启发式搜索范式应用于广义规划，提出基于程序的解空间和BFGP算法
AI.motivation: 经典规划中的启发式搜索无法直接用于广义规划，需要新的方法来处理不同实例数量和规模的问题
AI.method: 定义独立于实例数量和规模的程序解空间，并设计BFGP算法，采用最佳优先搜索策略，结合多种评估和启发函数
AI.result: 实现了首个针对广义规划的原生启发式搜索方法，能在不同规模实例中有效寻找程序解
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法为广义规划提供了有效的解决方案，扩展了启发式搜索在复杂规划问题中的应用

authors_text: Qianqian Wang,Zhengqi Li,David Salesin,Noah Snavely,Brian Curless,Janne Kontkanen
title: 3D Moments from Near-Duplicate Photos
title_zh: 近乎重复的照片中的 3D 瞬间
abstract: We introduce 3D Moments, a new computational photography effect. As input we take a pair of near-duplicate photos, i.e., photos of moving subjects from similar viewpoints, common in people's photo collections. As output, we produce a video that smoothly interpolates the scene motion from the first photo to the second, while also producing camera motion with parallax that gives a heightened sense of 3D. To achieve this effect, we represent the scene as a pair of feature-based layered depth images augmented with scene flow. This representation enables motion interpolation along with independent control of the camera viewpoint. Our system produces photorealistic space-time videos with motion parallax and scene dynamics, while plausibly recovering regions occluded in the original views. We conduct extensive experiments demonstrating superior performance over baselines on public datasets and in-the-wild photos. Project page: https://3d-moments.github.io/
summary: We introduce 3D Moments, a new computational photography effect. As input we take a pair of near-duplicate photos, i.e., photos of moving subjects from similar viewpoints, common in people's photo collections. As output, we produce a video that smoothly interpolates the scene motion from the first photo to the second, while also producing camera motion with parallax that gives a heightened sense of 3D. To achieve this effect, we represent the scene as a pair of feature-based layered depth images augmented with scene flow. This representation enables motion interpolation along with independent control of the camera viewpoint. Our system produces photorealistic space-time videos with motion parallax and scene dynamics, while plausibly recovering regions occluded in the original views. We conduct extensive experiments demonstrating superior performance over baselines on public datasets and in-the-wild photos. Project page: https://3d-moments.github.io/
abstract_zh: 我们引入了 3D Moments，一种新的计算摄影效果。作为输入，我们拍摄了两张几乎重复的照片，即从相似角度拍摄的移动主体的照片，这在人们的照片集中很常见。作为输出，我们生成一个视频，将场景运动从第一张照片平滑地插值到第二张照片，同时还生成具有视差的相机运动，从而增强 3D 感。为了实现这种效果，我们将场景表示为一对基于特征的分层深度图像，并通过场景流进行增强。这种表示方式可以实现运动插值以及相机视点的独立控制。我们的系统生成具有运动视差和场景动态的逼真时空视频，同时合理地恢复原始视图中被遮挡的区域。我们进行了大量的实验，证明了在公共数据集和野外照片上的性能优于基线。项目页面：https://3d-moments.github.io/

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种从近似重复照片中生成具有3D效果的视频的新方法，通过运动插值和相机视差增强场景的立体感。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以从近似重复照片中生成具有真实感和运动视差的3D视频，而这类照片在用户相册中普遍存在。
AI.method: 基于特征的分层深度图像与场景流表示，结合运动插值和独立相机视角控制，生成时空连续的逼真视频。
AI.result: 在公开数据集和真实照片中优于基线方法，生成视频具有运动视差、场景动态及遮挡区域的合理恢复。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效实现了高质量3D视频生成，为计算摄影提供了新的视角和实用工具。

Our system produces photorealistic space-time videos with motion parallax and scene dynamics, while plausibly recovering regions occluded in the original views. We conduct extensive experiments demonstrating superior performance over baselines on public datasets and in-the-wild photos. Project page: https://3d-moments.github.io/ 我们引入了 3D Moments，一种新的计算摄影效果。作为输入，我们拍摄了两张几乎重复的照片，即从相似角度拍摄的移动主体的照片，这在人们的照片集中很常见。作为输出，我们生成一个视频，将场景运动从第一张照片平滑地插值到第二张照片，同时还生成具有视差的相机运动，从而增强 3D 感。为了实现这种效果，我们将场景表示为一对基于特征的分层深度图像，并通过场景流进行增强。这种表示方式可以实现运动插值以及相机视点的独立控制。我们的系统生成具有运动视差和场景动态的逼真时空视频，同时合理地恢复原始视图中被遮挡的区域。我们进行了大量的实验，证明了在公共数据集和野外照片上的性能优于基线。项目页面：https://3d-moments.github.io/ 本文提出了一种从近似重复照片中生成具有3D效果的视频的新方法，通过运动插值和相机视差增强场景的立体感。 Qianqian Wang,Zhengqi Li,David Salesin,Noah Snavely,Brian Curless,Janne Kontkanen cs.CV

authors_text: Enric Corona,Gerard Pons-Moll,Guillem Alenyà,Francesc Moreno-Noguer
title: Learned Vertex Descent: A New Direction for 3D Human Model Fitting
title_zh: 学习顶点下降：3D人体模型拟合的新方向
abstract: We propose a novel optimization-based paradigm for 3D human model fitting on images and scans. In contrast to existing approaches that directly regress the parameters of a low-dimensional statistical body model (e.g. SMPL) from input images, we train an ensemble of per-vertex neural fields network. The network predicts, in a distributed manner, the vertex descent direction towards the ground truth, based on neural features extracted at the current vertex projection. At inference, we employ this network, dubbed LVD, within a gradient-descent optimization pipeline until its convergence, which typically occurs in a fraction of a second even when initializing all vertices into a single point. An exhaustive evaluation demonstrates that our approach is able to capture the underlying body of clothed people with very different body shapes, achieving a significant improvement compared to state-of-the-art. LVD is also applicable to 3D model fitting of humans and hands, for which we show a significant improvement to the SOTA with a much simpler and faster method.
summary: We propose a novel optimization-based paradigm for 3D human model fitting on images and scans. In contrast to existing approaches that directly regress the parameters of a low-dimensional statistical body model (e.g. SMPL) from input images, we train an ensemble of per-vertex neural fields network. The network predicts, in a distributed manner, the vertex descent direction towards the ground truth, based on neural features extracted at the current vertex projection. At inference, we employ this network, dubbed LVD, within a gradient-descent optimization pipeline until its convergence, which typically occurs in a fraction of a second even when initializing all vertices into a single point. An exhaustive evaluation demonstrates that our approach is able to capture the underlying body of clothed people with very different body shapes, achieving a significant improvement compared to state-of-the-art. LVD is also applicable to 3D model fitting of humans and hands, for which we show a significant improvement to the SOTA with a much simpler and faster method.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的基于优化的范例，用于在图像和扫描上拟合 3D 人体模型。与直接从输入图像回归低维统计身体模型（例如 SMPL）的参数的现有方法相比，我们训练每顶点神经场网络的集合。网络根据当前顶点投影提取的神经特征，以分布式方式预测朝向地面真实情况的顶点下降方向。在推理时，我们在梯度下降优化管道中使用这个被称为 LVD 的网络，直到其收敛，即使将所有顶点初始化为单个点，收敛通常也会在不到一秒的时间内发生。详尽的评估表明，我们的方法能够捕捉体型截然不同的穿着衣服的人的底层身体，与最先进的技术相比，取得了显着的进步。 LVD 还适用于人体和手的 3D 模型拟合，为此我们通过更简单、更快速的方法展示了对 SOTA 的显着改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于神经网络的优化方法LVD，用于从图像和扫描数据中拟合3D人体模型。
AI.motivation: 现有方法直接回归低维统计模型参数存在局限，难以有效处理不同体型的穿着人，且计算效率较低。
AI.method: 训练分布式顶点神经场网络预测顶点下降方向，结合梯度下降优化框架实现快速收敛，初始化时所有顶点可从单点开始。
AI.result: 在多种人体和手部3D模型拟合任务中显著优于现有方法，且计算更高效，尤其擅长处理穿着衣物的复杂体型。
AI.conclusion: LVD通过神经网络引导的优化流程，为3D人体建模提供了更高效准确的新范式，具有广泛的应用潜力。

authors_text: David M. Chan,Austin Myers,Sudheendra Vijayanarasimhan,David A. Ross,Bryan Seybold,John F. Canny
title: What's in a Caption? Dataset-Specific Linguistic Diversity and Its Effect on Visual Description Models and Metrics
title_zh: 标题中包含什么内容？数据集特定的语言多样性及其对视觉描述模型和指标的影响
comment: The 1st Workshop on Vision Datasets Understanding, IEEE / CVF Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition Conference (CVPR), 2022
comments: The 1st Workshop on Vision Datasets Understanding, IEEE / CVF Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition Conference (CVPR), 2022
abstract: While there have been significant gains in the field of automated video description, the generalization performance of automated description models to novel domains remains a major barrier to using these systems in the real world. Most visual description methods are known to capture and exploit patterns in the training data leading to evaluation metric increases, but what are those patterns? In this work, we examine several popular visual description datasets, and capture, analyze, and understand the dataset-specific linguistic patterns that models exploit but do not generalize to new domains. At the token level, sample level, and dataset level, we find that caption diversity is a major driving factor behind the generation of generic and uninformative captions. We further show that state-of-the-art models even outperform held-out ground truth captions on modern metrics, and that this effect is an artifact of linguistic diversity in datasets. Understanding this linguistic diversity is key to building strong captioning models, we recommend several methods and approaches for maintaining diversity in the collection of new data, and dealing with the consequences of limited diversity when using current models and metrics.
summary: While there have been significant gains in the field of automated video description, the generalization performance of automated description models to novel domains remains a major barrier to using these systems in the real world. Most visual description methods are known to capture and exploit patterns in the training data leading to evaluation metric increases, but what are those patterns? In this work, we examine several popular visual description datasets, and capture, analyze, and understand the dataset-specific linguistic patterns that models exploit but do not generalize to new domains. At the token level, sample level, and dataset level, we find that caption diversity is a major driving factor behind the generation of generic and uninformative captions. We further show that state-of-the-art models even outperform held-out ground truth captions on modern metrics, and that this effect is an artifact of linguistic diversity in datasets. Understanding this linguistic diversity is key to building strong captioning models, we recommend several methods and approaches for maintaining diversity in the collection of new data, and dealing with the consequences of limited diversity when using current models and metrics.
abstract_zh: 尽管自动视频描述领域取得了显着的进展，但自动描述模型对新领域的泛化性能仍然是在现实世界中使用这些系统的主要障碍。众所周知，大多数视觉描述方法都会捕获和利用训练数据中的模式，从而导致评估指标增加，但这些模式是什么？在这项工作中，我们检查了几个流行的视觉描述数据集，并捕获、分析和理解模型利用但不推广到新领域的数据集特定的语言模式。在标记级别、样本级别和数据集级别，我们发现字幕多样性是生成通用和无信息字幕的主要驱动因素。我们进一步表明，最先进的模型甚至优于现代指标上保留的地面真实描述，并且这种效果是数据集中语言多样性的产物。了解这种语言多样性是构建强大的字幕模型的关键，我们推荐了几种方法和途径来保持新数据收集的多样性，并在使用当前模型和指标时处理有限多样性的后果。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了视觉描述数据集中的语言多样性对模型性能和评估指标的影响，揭示了模型依赖数据集特定模式而非泛化能力的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉描述模型在新领域泛化能力不足，且依赖训练数据模式提升指标，但未明确这些模式的具体影响，需深入理解数据集语言特性。
AI.method: 通过分析多个主流数据集，在词元级、样本级和数据集级层面量化caption多样性，评估模型生成质量与数据集语言特征的关系。
AI.result: 发现caption多样性导致模型生成通用化描述，且先进模型在指标上超越真实标注，此现象源于数据集语言分布偏差而非模型真实能力提升。
AI.conclusion: 数据集语言多样性是影响模型性能的关键因素，需在数据收集和评估体系设计中主动维护多样性以提升模型泛化能力。

authors_text: Amol Aggarwal,Josh Alman
title: Optimal-Degree Polynomial Approximations for Exponentials and Gaussian Kernel Density Estimation
title_zh: 指数和高斯核密度估计的最优次数多项式近似
comment: 27 pages, to appear in the 37th Computational Complexity Conference (CCC 2022)
comments: 27 pages, to appear in the 37th Computational Complexity Conference (CCC 2022)
abstract: For any real numbers $B \ge 1$ and $δ\in (0, 1)$ and function $f: [0, B] \rightarrow \mathbb{R}$, let $d_{B; δ} (f) \in \mathbb{Z}_{> 0}$ denote the minimum degree of a polynomial $p(x)$ satisfying $\sup_{x \in [0, B]} \big| p(x) - f(x) \big| < δ$. In this paper, we provide precise asymptotics for $d_{B; δ} (e^{-x})$ and $d_{B; δ} (e^{x})$ in terms of both $B$ and $δ$, improving both the previously known upper bounds and lower bounds. In particular, we show $$d_{B; δ} (e^{-x}) = Θ\left( \max \left\{ \sqrt{B \log(δ^{-1})}, \frac{\log(δ^{-1}) }{ \log(B^{-1} \log(δ^{-1}))} \right\}\right), \text{ and}$$ $$d_{B; δ} (e^{x}) = Θ\left( \max \left\{ B, \frac{\log(δ^{-1}) }{ \log(B^{-1} \log(δ^{-1}))} \right\}\right).$$ Polynomial approximations for $e^{-x}$ and $e^x$ have applications to the design of algorithms for many problems, and our degree bounds show both the power and limitations of these algorithms. We focus in particular on the Batch Gaussian Kernel Density Estimation problem for $n$ sample points in $Θ(\log n)$ dimensions with error $δ= n^{-Θ(1)}$. We show that the running time one can achieve depends on the square of the diameter of the point set, $B$, with a transition at $B = Θ(\log n)$ mirroring the corresponding transition in $d_{B; δ} (e^{-x})$: - When $B=o(\log n)$, we give the first algorithm running in time $n^{1 + o(1)}$. - When $B = κ\log n$ for a small constant $κ>0$, we give an algorithm running in time $n^{1 + O(\log \log κ^{-1} /\log κ^{-1})}$. The $\log \log κ^{-1} /\log κ^{-1}$ term in the exponent comes from analyzing the behavior of the leading constant in our computation of $d_{B; δ} (e^{-x})$. - When $B = ω(\log n)$, we show that time $n^{2 - o(1)}$ is necessary assuming SETH.
summary: For any real numbers $B \ge 1$ and $δ\in (0, 1)$ and function $f: [0, B] \rightarrow \mathbb{R}$, let $d_{B; δ} (f) \in \mathbb{Z}_{> 0}$ denote the minimum degree of a polynomial $p(x)$ satisfying $\sup_{x \in [0, B]} \big| p(x) - f(x) \big| < δ$. In this paper, we provide precise asymptotics for $d_{B; δ} (e^{-x})$ and $d_{B; δ} (e^{x})$ in terms of both $B$ and $δ$, improving both the previously known upper bounds and lower bounds. In particular, we show $$d_{B; δ} (e^{-x}) = Θ\left( \max \left\{ \sqrt{B \log(δ^{-1})}, \frac{\log(δ^{-1}) }{ \log(B^{-1} \log(δ^{-1}))} \right\}\right), \text{ and}$$ $$d_{B; δ} (e^{x}) = Θ\left( \max \left\{ B, \frac{\log(δ^{-1}) }{ \log(B^{-1} \log(δ^{-1}))} \right\}\right).$$ Polynomial approximations for $e^{-x}$ and $e^x$ have applications to the design of algorithms for many problems, and our degree bounds show both the power and limitations of these algorithms. We focus in particular on the Batch Gaussian Kernel Density Estimation problem for $n$ sample points in $Θ(\log n)$ dimensions with error $δ= n^{-Θ(1)}$. We show that the running time one can achieve depends on the square of the diameter of the point set, $B$, with a transition at $B = Θ(\log n)$ mirroring the corresponding transition in $d_{B; δ} (e^{-x})$: - When $B=o(\log n)$, we give the first algorithm running in time $n^{1 + o(1)}$. - When $B = κ\log n$ for a small constant $κ>0$, we give an algorithm running in time $n^{1 + O(\log \log κ^{-1} /\log κ^{-1})}$. The $\log \log κ^{-1} /\log κ^{-1}$ term in the exponent comes from analyzing the behavior of the leading constant in our computation of $d_{B; δ} (e^{-x})$. - When $B = ω(\log n)$, we show that time $n^{2 - o(1)}$ is necessary assuming SETH.
abstract_zh: 对于任何实数 $B \ge 1$ 和 $δ\in (0, 1)$ 以及函数 $f: [0, B] \rightarrow \mathbb{R}$，令 $d_{B; δ} (f) \in \mathbb{Z}_{> 0}$ 表示满足 $\sup_{x \in [0, B]} \big| 的多项式 $p(x)$ 的最小次数p(x) - f(x) \big| <δ$。在本文中，我们为 $d_{B; 提供精确的渐近。 δ} (e^{-x})$ 和 $d_{B; δ} (e^{x})$ 就 $B$ 和 $δ$ 而言，改进了先前已知的上限和下限。特别是，我们显示 $$d_{B; δ} (e^{-x}) = θ\left( \max \left\{ \sqrt{B \log(δ^{-1})}, \frac{\log(δ^{-1}) }{ \log(B^{-1} \log(δ^{-1}))} \right\}\right), \text{ 和}$$ $$d_{B; δ} (e^{x}) = θ\left( \max \left\{ B, \frac{\log(δ^{-1}) }{ \log(B^{-1} \log(δ^{-1}))} \right\}\right)。$$ $e^{-x}$ 和 $e^x$ 的多项式近似可应用于许多问题的算法设计，我们的度界显示了这些算法的强大功能和局限性。我们特别关注$θ(\log n)$维度中$n$个样本点的批量高斯核密度估计问题，误差为$δ= n^{-θ(1)}$。我们表明，可以实现的运行时间取决于点集 $B$ 直径的平方，$B = θ(\log n)$ 处的转换镜像 $d_{B; 中的相应转换； δ} (e^{-x})$: - 当 $B=o(\log n)$ 时，我们给出在 $n^{1 + o(1)}$ 时间内运行的第一个算法。 - 当 $B = κ\log n$ 对于小常数 $κ>0$ 时，我们给出一个在 $n^{1 + O(\log \log κ^{-1} /\log κ^{-1})}$ 时间内运行的算法。指数中的 $\log \log κ^{-1} /\log κ^{-1}$ 项来自分析 $d_{B 计算中前导常数的行为； δ} (e^{-x})$。 - 当 $B = ω(\log n)$ 时，我们证明假设 SETH 需要时间 $n^{2 - o(1)}$。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了指数函数 e^{-x} 和 e^{x} 在区间 [0, B] 上的最优多项式逼近度，并应用于批处理高斯核密度估计问题。
AI.motivation: 通过精确刻画指数函数多项式逼近的最小度数，揭示逼近能力的边界，从而为高斯核密度估计等算法设计提供理论指导，并确定不同参数下的算法性能极限。
AI.method: 采用理论分析方法，推导了 e^{-x} 和 e^{x} 在给定误差 δ 和区间范围 B 下所需多项式最小度数的精确渐近界，并利用这些界分析批处理高斯核密度估计问题的计算复杂度。
AI.result: 给出了 e^{-x} 和 e^{x} 多项式逼近度的最优上下界，并应用于批处理高斯核密度估计：当 B=o(log n) 时算法运行时间为 n^{1+o(1)}；当 B=κ log n 时运行时间为 n^{1+O(log log κ^{-1}/log κ^{-1})}；当 B=ω(log n) 时，基于 SETH 假设证明需要 n^{2-o(1)} 时间。
AI.conclusion: 指数函数多项式逼近的度数与点集直径 B 密切相关，并在 B=Θ(log n) 处存在阈值效应，这决定了高斯核密度估计算法的运行时间上下界，展示了多项式逼近方法的能力与局限性。

search_text: Optimal-Degree Polynomial Approximations for Exponentials and Gaussian Kernel Density Estimation 指数和高斯核密度估计的最优次数多项式近似 For any real numbers $B \ge 1$ and $δ\in (0, 1)$ and function $f: [0, B] \rightarrow \mathbb{R}$, let $d_{B; δ} (f) \in \mathbb{Z}_{> 0}$ denote the minimum degree of a polynomial $p(x)$ satisfying $\sup_{x \in [0, B]} \big| p(x) - f(x) \big| < δ$. In this paper, we provide precise asymptotics for $d_{B; δ} (e^{-x})$ and $d_{B; δ} (e^{x})$ in terms of both $B$ and $δ$, improving both the previously known upper bounds and lower bounds. In particular, we show $$d_{B; δ} (e^{-x}) = Θ\left( \max \left\{ \sqrt{B \log(δ^{-1})}, \frac{\log(δ^{-1}) }{ \log(B^{-1} \log(δ^{-1}))} \right\}\right), \text{ and}$$ $$d_{B; δ} (e^{x}) = Θ\left( \max \left\{ B, \frac{\log(δ^{-1}) }{ \log(B^{-1} \log(δ^{-1}))} \right\}\right).$$ Polynomial approximations for $e^{-x}$ and $e^x$ have applications to the design of algorithms for many problems, and our degree bounds show both the power and limitations of these algorithms. We focus in particular on the Batch Gaussian Kernel Density Estimation problem for $n$ sample points in $Θ(\log n)$ dimensions with error $δ= n^{-Θ(1)}$. We show that the running time one can achieve depends on the square of the diameter of the point set, $B$, with a transition at $B = Θ(\log n)$ mirroring the corresponding transition in $d_{B; δ} (e^{-x})$: - When $B=o(\log n)$, we give the first algorithm running in time $n^{1 + o(1)}$. - When $B = κ\log n$ for a small constant $κ>0$, we give an algorithm running in time $n^{1 + O(\log \log κ^{-1} /\log κ^{-1})}$. The $\log \log κ^{-1} /\log κ^{-1}$ term in the exponent comes from analyzing the behavior of the leading constant in our computation of $d_{B; δ} (e^{-x})$. - When $B = ω(\log n)$, we show that time $n^{2 - o(1)}$ is necessary assuming SETH. 对于任何实数 $B \ge 1$ 和 $δ\in (0, 1)$ 以及函数 $f: [0, B] \rightarrow \mathbb{R}$，令 $d_{B; δ} (f) \in \mathbb{Z}_{> 0}$ 表示满足 $\sup_{x \in [0, B]} \big| 的多项式 $p(x)$ 的最小次数p(x) - f(x) \big| <δ$。在本文中，我们为 $d_{B; 提供精确的渐近。 δ} (e^{-x})$ 和 $d_{B; δ} (e^{x})$ 就 $B$ 和 $δ$ 而言，改进了先前已知的上限和下限。特别是，我们显示 $$d_{B; δ} (e^{-x}) = θ\left( \max \left\{ \sqrt{B \log(δ^{-1})}, \frac{\log(δ^{-1}) }{ \log(B^{-1} \log(δ^{-1}))} \right\}\right), \text{ 和}$$ $$d_{B; δ} (e^{x}) = θ\left( \max \left\{ B, \frac{\log(δ^{-1}) }{ \log(B^{-1} \log(δ^{-1}))} \right\}\right)。$$ $e^{-x}$ 和 $e^x$ 的多项式近似可应用于许多问题的算法设计，我们的度界显示了这些算法的强大功能和局限性。我们特别关注$θ(\log n)$维度中$n$个样本点的批量高斯核密度估计问题，误差为$δ= n^{-θ(1)}$。我们表明，可以实现的运行时间取决于点集 $B$ 直径的平方，$B = θ(\log n)$ 处的转换镜像 $d_{B; 中的相应转换； δ} (e^{-x})$: - 当 $B=o(\log n)$ 时，我们给出在 $n^{1 + o(1)}$ 时间内运行的第一个算法。 - 当 $B = κ\log n$ 对于小常数 $κ>0$ 时，我们给出一个在 $n^{1 + O(\log \log κ^{-1} /\log κ^{-1})}$ 时间内运行的算法。指数中的 $\log \log κ^{-1} /\log κ^{-1}$ 项来自分析 $d_{B 计算中前导常数的行为； δ} (e^{-x})$。 - 当 $B = ω(\log n)$ 时，我们证明假设 SETH 需要时间 $n^{2 - o(1)}$。 本文研究了指数函数 e^{-x} 和 e^{x} 在区间 [0, B] 上的最优多项式逼近度，并应用于批处理高斯核密度估计问题。 Amol Aggarwal,Josh Alman cs.CC,cs.DS,math.CA

authors_text: Marko Tesic,Ulrike Hahn
title: Can counterfactual explanations of AI systems' predictions skew lay users' causal intuitions about the world? If so, can we correct for that?
title_zh: 人工智能系统预测的反事实解释是否会扭曲用户对世界的因果直觉？如果是这样，我们可以纠正吗？
abstract: Counterfactual (CF) explanations have been employed as one of the modes of explainability in explainable AI-both to increase the transparency of AI systems and to provide recourse. Cognitive science and psychology, however, have pointed out that people regularly use CFs to express causal relationships. Most AI systems are only able to capture associations or correlations in data so interpreting them as casual would not be justified. In this paper, we present two experiment (total N = 364) exploring the effects of CF explanations of AI system's predictions on lay people's causal beliefs about the real world. In Experiment 1 we found that providing CF explanations of an AI system's predictions does indeed (unjustifiably) affect people's causal beliefs regarding factors/features the AI uses and that people are more likely to view them as causal factors in the real world. Inspired by the literature on misinformation and health warning messaging, Experiment 2 tested whether we can correct for the unjustified change in causal beliefs. We found that pointing out that AI systems capture correlations and not necessarily causal relationships can attenuate the effects of CF explanations on people's causal beliefs.
summary: Counterfactual (CF) explanations have been employed as one of the modes of explainability in explainable AI-both to increase the transparency of AI systems and to provide recourse. Cognitive science and psychology, however, have pointed out that people regularly use CFs to express causal relationships. Most AI systems are only able to capture associations or correlations in data so interpreting them as casual would not be justified. In this paper, we present two experiment (total N = 364) exploring the effects of CF explanations of AI system's predictions on lay people's causal beliefs about the real world. In Experiment 1 we found that providing CF explanations of an AI system's predictions does indeed (unjustifiably) affect people's causal beliefs regarding factors/features the AI uses and that people are more likely to view them as causal factors in the real world. Inspired by the literature on misinformation and health warning messaging, Experiment 2 tested whether we can correct for the unjustified change in causal beliefs. We found that pointing out that AI systems capture correlations and not necessarily causal relationships can attenuate the effects of CF explanations on people's causal beliefs.
abstract_zh: 反事实（CF）解释已被用作可解释人工智能的可解释性模式之一，既可以提高人工智能系统的透明度，也可以提供追索权。然而，认知科学和心理学指出，人们经常使用 CF 来表达因果关系。大多数人工智能系统只能捕获数据中的关联或相关性，因此将它们解释为偶然是没有道理的。在本文中，我们提出了两个实验（总 N = 364），探索人工智能系统预测的 CF 解释对普通人对现实世界的因果信念的​​影响。在实验 1 中，我们发现对人工智能系统的预测提供 CF 解释确实（不合理地）影响人们对人工智能使用的因素/特征的因果信念，并且人们更有可能将它们视为现实世界中的因果因素。受到有关错误信息和健康警告消息的文献的启发，实验 2 测试了我们是否可以纠正因果信念的​​不合理改变。我们发现，指出人工智能系统捕获相关性而不一定是因果关系可以减弱 CF 解释对人们因果信念的​​影响。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨AI系统的反事实解释是否会影响普通用户的因果直觉，并研究纠正方法。
AI.motivation: AI系统的反事实解释可能使用户误将相关性视为因果关系，需验证其影响并寻找纠正方法。
AI.method: 通过两个实验（共364名参与者）验证反事实解释对因果信念的影响，并测试纠正措施的有效性。
AI.result: 实验1发现反事实解释会增强用户对AI因素的因果认知；实验2表明强调AI仅捕捉相关性可减轻这种影响。
AI.conclusion: 反事实解释可能误导用户因果认知，但通过明确AI仅反映相关性可减轻其影响。

authors_text: Félix Remigereau,Djebril Mekhazni,Sajjad Abdoli,Le Thanh Nguyen-Meidine,Rafael M. O. Cruz,Eric Granger
title: Knowledge Distillation for Multi-Target Domain Adaptation in Real-Time Person Re-Identification
title_zh: 实时行人重识别中多目标域适应的知识蒸馏
abstract: Despite the recent success of deep learning architectures, person re-identification (ReID) remains a challenging problem in real-word applications. Several unsupervised single-target domain adaptation (STDA) methods have recently been proposed to limit the decline in ReID accuracy caused by the domain shift that typically occurs between source and target video data. Given the multimodal nature of person ReID data (due to variations across camera viewpoints and capture conditions), training a common CNN backbone to address domain shifts across multiple target domains, can provide an efficient solution for real-time ReID applications. Although multi-target domain adaptation (MTDA) has not been widely addressed in the ReID literature, a straightforward approach consists in blending different target datasets, and performing STDA on the mixture to train a common CNN. However, this approach may lead to poor generalization, especially when blending a growing number of distinct target domains to train a smaller CNN. To alleviate this problem, we introduce a new MTDA method based on knowledge distillation (KD-ReID) that is suitable for real-time person ReID applications. Our method adapts a common lightweight student backbone CNN over the target domains by alternatively distilling from multiple specialized teacher CNNs, each one adapted on data from a specific target domain. Extensive experiments conducted on several challenging person ReID datasets indicate that our approach outperforms state-of-art methods for MTDA, including blending methods, particularly when training a compact CNN backbone like OSNet. Results suggest that our flexible MTDA approach can be employed to design cost-effective ReID systems for real-time video surveillance applications.

Several unsupervised single-target domain adaptation (STDA) methods have recently been proposed to limit the decline in ReID accuracy caused by the domain shift that typically occurs between source and target video data. Given the multimodal nature of person ReID data (due to variations across camera viewpoints and capture conditions), training a common CNN backbone to address domain shifts across multiple target domains, can provide an efficient solution for real-time ReID applications. Although multi-target domain adaptation (MTDA) has not been widely addressed in the ReID literature, a straightforward approach consists in blending different target datasets, and performing STDA on the mixture to train a common CNN. However, this approach may lead to poor generalization, especially when blending a growing number of distinct target domains to train a smaller CNN. To alleviate this problem, we introduce a new MTDA method based on knowledge distillation (KD-ReID) that is suitable for real-time person ReID applications. Our method adapts a common lightweight student backbone CNN over the target domains by alternatively distilling from multiple specialized teacher CNNs, each one adapted on data from a specific target domain. Extensive experiments conducted on several challenging person ReID datasets indicate that our approach outperforms state-of-art methods for MTDA, including blending methods, particularly when training a compact CNN backbone like OSNet. Results suggest that our flexible MTDA approach can be employed to design cost-effective ReID systems for real-time video surveillance applications.
abstract_zh: 尽管深度学习架构最近取得了成功，但人员重新识别（ReID）在实际应用中仍然是一个具有挑战性的问题。最近提出了几种无监督单目标域适应（STDA）方法，以限制通常在源视频数据和目标视频数据之间发生的域转移引起的 ReID 精度下降。考虑到行人 ReID 数据的多模态性质（由于摄像机视点和捕获条件的变化），训练通用 CNN 主干来解决跨多个目标域的域转移问题，可以为实时 ReID 应用提供有效的解决方案。尽管多目标域适应 (MTDA) 尚未在 ReID 文献中得到广泛讨论，但一种简单的方法是混合不同的目标数据集，并对混合物执行 STDA 以训练通用 CNN。然而，这种方法可能会导致泛化能力较差，尤其是在混合越来越多的不同目标域来训练较小的 CNN 时。为了缓解这个问题，我们引入了一种基于知识蒸馏（KD-ReID）的新MTDA方法，适用于实时行人ReID应用。我们的方法通过交替地从多个专业教师 CNN 中提取，在目标域上采用通用的轻量级学生主干 CNN，每个教师都适应来自特定目标域的数据。对几个具有挑战性的人员 ReID 数据集进行的广泛实验表明，我们的方法优于 MTDA 的最先进方法，包括混合方法，特别是在训练 OSNet 等紧凑型 CNN 主干网时。结果表明，我们灵活的 MTDA 方法可用于为实时视频监控应用设计经济高效的 ReID 系统。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于知识蒸馏的多目标域适应方法（KD-ReID），用于解决实时人重识别中的跨域适应问题。
AI.motivation: 现有单目标域适应方法在处理多目标域时存在泛化能力差的问题，尤其当目标域数量增加时，简单混合数据的方法会导致模型性能下降。
AI.method: 通过交替从多个针对不同目标域的专用教师网络中蒸馏知识，训练一个轻量级的学生网络，实现跨多目标域的适应。
AI.result: 在多个挑战性数据集上优于现有方法，尤其在训练紧凑型CNN（如OSNet）时表现更优，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为实时视频监控中的低成本、高效人重识别系统设计提供了可行方案。

search_text: Knowledge Distillation for Multi-Target Domain Adaptation in Real-Time Person Re-Identification 实时行人重识别中多目标域适应的知识蒸馏 Despite the recent success of deep learning architectures, person re-identification (ReID) remains a challenging problem in real-word applications. Several unsupervised single-target domain adaptation (STDA) methods have recently been proposed to limit the decline in ReID accuracy caused by the domain shift that typically occurs between source and target video data. Given the multimodal nature of person ReID data (due to variations across camera viewpoints and capture conditions), training a common CNN backbone to address domain shifts across multiple target domains, can provide an efficient solution for real-time ReID applications. Although multi-target domain adaptation (MTDA) has not been widely addressed in the ReID literature, a straightforward approach consists in blending different target datasets, and performing STDA on the mixture to train a common CNN. However, this approach may lead to poor generalization, especially when blending a growing number of distinct target domains to train a smaller CNN. To alleviate this problem, we introduce a new MTDA method based on knowledge distillation (KD-ReID) that is suitable for real-time person ReID applications. Our method adapts a common lightweight student backbone CNN over the target domains by alternatively distilling from multiple specialized teacher CNNs, each one adapted on data from a specific target domain. Extensive experiments conducted on several challenging person ReID datasets indicate that our approach outperforms state-of-art methods for MTDA, including blending methods, particularly when training a compact CNN backbone like OSNet. Results suggest that our flexible MTDA approach can be employed to design cost-effective ReID systems for real-time video surveillance applications. 尽管深度学习架构最近取得了成功，但人员重新识别（ReID）在实际应用中仍然是一个具有挑战性的问题。最近提出了几种无监督单目标域适应（STDA）方法，以限制通常在源视频数据和目标视频数据之间发生的域转移引起的 ReID 精度下降。考虑到行人 ReID 数据的多模态性质（由于摄像机视点和捕获条件的变化），训练通用 CNN 主干来解决跨多个目标域的域转移问题，可以为实时 ReID 应用提供有效的解决方案。尽管多目标域适应 (MTDA) 尚未在 ReID 文献中得到广泛讨论，但一种简单的方法是混合不同的目标数据集，并对混合物执行 STDA 以训练通用 CNN。然而，这种方法可能会导致泛化能力较差，尤其是在混合越来越多的不同目标域来训练较小的 CNN 时。为了缓解这个问题，我们引入了一种基于知识蒸馏（KD-ReID）的新MTDA方法，适用于实时行人ReID应用。我们的方法通过交替地从多个专业教师 CNN 中提取，在目标域上采用通用的轻量级学生主干 CNN，每个教师都适应来自特定目标域的数据。对几个具有挑战性的人员 ReID 数据集进行的广泛实验表明，我们的方法优于 MTDA 的最先进方法，包括混合方法，特别是在训练 OSNet 等紧凑型 CNN 主干网时。结果表明，我们灵活的 MTDA 方法可用于为实时视频监控应用设计经济高效的 ReID 系统。 本文提出一种基于知识蒸馏的多目标域适应方法（KD-ReID），用于解决实时人重识别中的跨域适应问题。 Félix Remigereau,Djebril Mekhazni,Sajjad Abdoli,Le Thanh Nguyen-Meidine,Rafael M. authors_text: Antonio Jesús Banegas-Luna,Horacio Pérez-Sánchez
title: SIBILA: A novel interpretable ensemble of general-purpose machine learning models applied to medical contexts
title_zh: SIBILA：应用于医疗环境的新型可解释通用机器学习模型集合
abstract: Personalized medicine remains a major challenge for scientists. The rapid growth of Machine learning and Deep learning has made them a feasible al- ternative for predicting the most appropriate therapy for individual patients. However, the need to develop a custom model for every dataset, the lack of interpretation of their results and high computational requirements make many reluctant to use these methods. Aiming to save time and bring light to the way models work internally, SIBILA has been developed. SIBILA is an ensemble of machine learning and deep learning models that applies a range of interpretability algorithms to identify the most relevant input features. Since the interpretability algo- rithms may not be in line with each other, a consensus stage has been imple- mented to estimate the global attribution of each variable to the predictions. SIBILA is containerized to be run on any high-performance computing plat- form. Although conceived as a command-line tool, it is also available to all users free of charge as a web server at https://bio-hpc.ucam.edu/sibila. Thus, even users with few technological skills can take advantage of it. SIBILA has been applied to two medical case studies to show its ability to predict in classification problems. Even though it is a general-purpose tool, it has been developed with the aim of becoming a powerful decision-making tool for clinicians, but can actually be used in many other domains. Thus, other two non-medical examples are supplied as supplementary material to prove that SIBILA still works well with noise and in regression problems.

abstract_zh: 个性化医疗仍然是科学家面临的重大挑战。机器学习和深度学习的快速发展使它们成为预测个体患者最合适治疗的可行替代方案。然而，由于需要为每个数据集开发自定义模型、缺乏对其结果的解释以及高计算要求，许多人不愿意使用这些方法。 SIBILA 的开发旨在节省时间并阐明模型内部的工作方式。 SIBILA 是机器学习和深度学习模型的集合，它应用一系列可解释性算法来识别最相关的输入特征。由于可解释性算法可能彼此不一致，因此实施了共识阶段来估计每个变量对预测的全局归因。 SIBILA 是容器化的，可以在任何高性能计算平台上运行。尽管它是一个命令行工具，但它也可以作为 Web 服务器免费提供给所有用户，网址为 https://bio-hpc.ucam.edu/sibila。因此，即使技术技能很少的用户也可以利用它。 SIBILA 已应用于两个医学案例研究，以展示其预测分类问题的能力。尽管它是一种通用工具，但其开发目的是成为临床医生强大的决策工具，但实际上可以用于许多其他领域。因此，提供了另外两个非医学示例作为补充材料，以证明 SIBILA 在处理噪声和回归问题时仍然表现良好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SIBILA，一种可解释的机器学习集成工具，旨在解决医疗领域个性化治疗预测中的模型可解释性和通用性问题。
AI.motivation: 传统机器学习模型在医疗场景中面临定制化开发成本高、结果不可解释及计算需求大的问题，限制了其临床应用。
AI.method: 构建包含多种机器学习和深度学习模型的集成框架，结合可解释性算法识别关键特征，并通过共识阶段整合不同算法的特征重要性评估。
AI.result: SIBILA在两个医疗分类案例和两个非医疗回归案例中均表现良好，验证了其在噪声数据下的鲁棒性及跨领域适用性。
AI.conclusion: SIBILA为临床决策提供了可解释的通用工具，同时适用于非医疗领域，降低了技术门槛并支持高通量计算平台部署。

authors_text: Kadierdan Kaheman,Urban Fasel,Jason J. Bramburger,Benjamin Strom,J. Nathan Kutz,Steven L. Brunton
title: The Experimental Multi-Arm Pendulum on a Cart: A Benchmark System for Chaos, Learning, and Control
title_zh: 推车上的实验性多臂摆：混沌、学习和控制的基准系统
abstract: The single, double, and triple pendulum has served as an illustrative experimental benchmark system for scientists to study dynamical behavior for more than four centuries. The pendulum system exhibits a wide range of interesting behaviors, from simple harmonic motion in the single pendulum to chaotic dynamics in multi-arm pendulums. Under forcing, even the single pendulum may exhibit chaos, providing a simple example of a damped-driven system. All multi-armed pendulums are characterized by the existence of index-one saddle points, which mediate the transport of trajectories in the system, providing a simple mechanical analog of various complex transport phenomena, from biolocomotion to transport within the solar system. Further, pendulum systems have long been used to design and test both linear and nonlinear control strategies, with the addition of more arms making the problem more challenging. In this work, we provide extensive designs for the construction and operation of a high-performance, multi-link pendulum on a cart system. Although many experimental setups have been built to study the behavior of pendulum systems, such an extensive documentation on the design, construction, and operation is missing from the literature. The resulting experimental system is highly flexible, enabling a wide range of benchmark problems in dynamical systems modeling, system identification and learning, and control. To promote reproducible research, we have made our entire system open-source, including 3D CAD drawings, basic tutorial code, and data. Moreover, we discuss the possibility of extending our system capability to be operated remotely to enable researchers all around the world to use it, thus increasing access.

abstract_zh: 四个多世纪以来，单摆、双摆和三摆一直是科学家研究动力学行为的说明性实验基准系统。摆系统表现出各种有趣的行为，从单摆的简谐振动到多臂摆的混沌动力学。在受力作用下，即使是单摆也可能表现出混沌，这是阻尼驱动系统的一个简单例子。所有多臂摆的特点是存在索引一鞍点，它调节系统中轨迹的传输，提供各种复杂传输现象的简单机械模拟，从生物运动到太阳系内的传输。此外，摆系统长期以来一直用于设计和测试线性和非线性控制策略，增加更多的臂使问题更具挑战性。在这项工作中，我们为推车系统上高性能多连杆摆的构造和操作提供了广泛的设计。尽管已经建立了许多实验装置来研究摆系统的行为，但文献中缺少有关设计、构造和操作的如此广泛的文档。由此产生的实验系统具有高度灵活性，可以在动力系统建模、系统识别和学习以及控制方面实现广泛的基准问题。为了促进可重复的研究，我们将整个系统开源，包括 3D CAD 绘图、基本教程代码和数据。此外，我们讨论了扩展我们的系统功能以进行远程操作的可能性，以使世界各地的研究人员能够使用它，从而增加访问权限。

AI.tldr: 本文设计并详细记录了一种高性能的多连杆摆动小车实验系统，用于混沌、学习和控制的基准测试。
AI.motivation: 摆动系统已被用于研究动力学行为四百余年，但现有实验装置缺乏全面的设计与操作文档，限制了其在控制策略和系统识别等领域的应用。
AI.method: 构建多臂摆动小车系统，提供3D CAD图纸、开源代码及数据，并探讨远程操作的可能性以提升全球研究人员的可及性。
AI.result: 开发出高度灵活的实验平台，支持动态系统建模、系统识别与控制等基准问题研究，并实现开源共享。
AI.conclusion: 该系统填补了实验装置文档化的空白，为可重复研究提供了标准化工具，推动了动力学与控制领域的研究进展。

authors_text: Matthias Minderer,Alexey Gritsenko,Austin Stone,Maxim Neumann,Dirk Weissenborn,Alexey Dosovitskiy,Aravindh Mahendran,Anurag Arnab,Mostafa Dehghani,Zhuoran Shen,Xiao Wang,Xiaohua Zhai,Thomas Kipf,Neil Houlsby
title: Simple Open-Vocabulary Object Detection with Vision Transformers
title_zh: 使用视觉转换器进行简单的开放词汇目标检测
abstract: Combining simple architectures with large-scale pre-training has led to massive improvements in image classification. For object detection, pre-training and scaling approaches are less well established, especially in the long-tailed and open-vocabulary setting, where training data is relatively scarce. In this paper, we propose a strong recipe for transferring image-text models to open-vocabulary object detection. We use a standard Vision Transformer architecture with minimal modifications, contrastive image-text pre-training, and end-to-end detection fine-tuning. Our analysis of the scaling properties of this setup shows that increasing image-level pre-training and model size yield consistent improvements on the downstream detection task. We provide the adaptation strategies and regularizations needed to attain very strong performance on zero-shot text-conditioned and one-shot image-conditioned object detection. Code and models are available on GitHub.
summary: Combining simple architectures with large-scale pre-training has led to massive improvements in image classification. For object detection, pre-training and scaling approaches are less well established, especially in the long-tailed and open-vocabulary setting, where training data is relatively scarce. In this paper, we propose a strong recipe for transferring image-text models to open-vocabulary object detection. We use a standard Vision Transformer architecture with minimal modifications, contrastive image-text pre-training, and end-to-end detection fine-tuning. Our analysis of the scaling properties of this setup shows that increasing image-level pre-training and model size yield consistent improvements on the downstream detection task. We provide the adaptation strategies and regularizations needed to attain very strong performance on zero-shot text-conditioned and one-shot image-conditioned object detection. Code and models are available on GitHub.
abstract_zh: 将简单的架构与大规模预训练相结合，使得图像分类取得了巨大的进步。对于目标检测，预训练和缩放方法还不太成熟，特别是在训练数据相对稀缺的长尾和开放词汇环境中。在本文中，我们提出了将图像文本模型转移到开放词汇对象检测的强大方法。我们使用标准的 Vision Transformer 架构，进行最少的修改、对比图像文本预训练和端到端检测微调。我们对该设置的缩放属性的分析表明，增加图像级预训练和模型大小可以对下游检测任务产生一致的改进。我们提供了在零样本文本条件和单样本图像条件对象检测上获得非常强大的性能所需的适应策略和正则化。代码和模型可在 GitHub 上获取。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于视觉Transformer的简单开放词汇对象检测方法
AI.motivation: 解决开放词汇和长尾场景下的对象检测挑战，利用预训练模型提升性能
AI.method: 采用标准Vision Transformer架构，结合对比图像-文本预训练和端到端微调，并引入适应策略与正则化技术
AI.result: 在零样本和单样本检测任务中取得优异性能，扩大预训练和模型规模显著提升检测效果
AI.conclusion: 证明了简单架构结合大规模预训练在开放词汇检测中的有效性，并提供可行的适应策略

authors_text: Kenny T. R. Voo,Liming Jiang,Chen Change Loy
title: Delving into High-Quality Synthetic Face Occlusion Segmentation Datasets
title_zh: 深入研究高质量的合成人脸遮挡分割数据集
comment: CVPR 2022 Workshop on Vision Datasets Understanding. Code and Datasets: https://github.com/kennyvoo/face-occlusion-generation
comments: CVPR 2022 Workshop on Vision Datasets Understanding. Code and Datasets: https://github.com/kennyvoo/face-occlusion-generation
abstract: This paper performs comprehensive analysis on datasets for occlusion-aware face segmentation, a task that is crucial for many downstream applications. The collection and annotation of such datasets are time-consuming and labor-intensive. Although some efforts have been made in synthetic data generation, the naturalistic aspect of data remains less explored. In our study, we propose two occlusion generation techniques, Naturalistic Occlusion Generation (NatOcc), for producing high-quality naturalistic synthetic occluded faces; and Random Occlusion Generation (RandOcc), a more general synthetic occluded data generation method. We empirically show the effectiveness and robustness of both methods, even for unseen occlusions. To facilitate model evaluation, we present two high-resolution real-world occluded face datasets with fine-grained annotations, RealOcc and RealOcc-Wild, featuring both careful alignment preprocessing and an in-the-wild setting for robustness test. We further conduct a comprehensive analysis on a newly introduced segmentation benchmark, offering insights for future exploration.
summary: This paper performs comprehensive analysis on datasets for occlusion-aware face segmentation, a task that is crucial for many downstream applications. The collection and annotation of such datasets are time-consuming and labor-intensive. Although some efforts have been made in synthetic data generation, the naturalistic aspect of data remains less explored. In our study, we propose two occlusion generation techniques, Naturalistic Occlusion Generation (NatOcc), for producing high-quality naturalistic synthetic occluded faces; and Random Occlusion Generation (RandOcc), a more general synthetic occluded data generation method. We empirically show the effectiveness and robustness of both methods, even for unseen occlusions. To facilitate model evaluation, we present two high-resolution real-world occluded face datasets with fine-grained annotations, RealOcc and RealOcc-Wild, featuring both careful alignment preprocessing and an in-the-wild setting for robustness test. We further conduct a comprehensive analysis on a newly introduced segmentation benchmark, offering insights for future exploration.
abstract_zh: 本文对遮挡感知人脸分割的数据集进行了全面分析，这项任务对于许多下游应用程序至关重要。此类数据集的收集和注释既费时又费力。尽管在合成数据生成方面已经做出了一些努力，但数据的自然方面仍然很少被探索。在我们的研究中，我们提出了两种遮挡生成技术，即自然遮挡生成（NatOcc），用于生成高质量的自然合成遮挡面；随机遮挡生成（RandOcc），一种更通用的合成遮挡数据生成方法。我们凭经验证明了这两种方法的有效性和鲁棒性，即使对于看不见的遮挡也是如此。为了便于模型评估，我们提供了两个具有细粒度注释的高分辨率真实世界遮挡人脸数据集：RealOcc 和 RealOcc-Wild，具有仔细的对齐预处理和用于鲁棒性测试的野外设置。我们进一步对新引入的细分基准进行全面分析，为未来的探索提供见解。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在分析并生成高质量的合成人脸遮挡分割数据集，提出两种遮挡生成技术及两个真实世界数据集，以提升模型的鲁棒性和评估能力。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集收集困难且自然性不足，需更高效生成方法与真实数据以提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.method: 提出自然遮挡生成（NatOcc）和随机遮挡生成（RandOcc）方法，构建高分辨率真实遮挡数据集RealOcc及野外观测数据集RealOcc-Wild，并在新基准上进行分析。
AI.result: 实验验证了两种生成方法在未知遮挡下的有效性，数据集有效提升模型评估与鲁棒性测试。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为遮挡分割领域提供高质量数据与基准，推动未来研究方向。

ai_content.tldr: 本文旨在分析并生成高质量的合成人脸遮挡分割数据集，提出两种遮挡生成技术及两个真实世界数据集，以提升模型的鲁棒性和评估能力。
ai_content.motivation: 现有数据集收集困难且自然性不足，需更高效生成方法与真实数据以提升模型鲁棒性。

ai_content.conclusion: 本研究为遮挡分割领域提供高质量数据与基准，推动未来研究方向。

search_text: Delving into High-Quality Synthetic Face Occlusion Segmentation Datasets 深入研究高质量的合成人脸遮挡分割数据集 This paper performs comprehensive analysis on datasets for occlusion-aware face segmentation, a task that is crucial for many downstream applications. The collection and annotation of such datasets are time-consuming and labor-intensive. Although some efforts have been made in synthetic data generation, the naturalistic aspect of data remains less explored. In our study, we propose two occlusion generation techniques, Naturalistic Occlusion Generation (NatOcc), for producing high-quality naturalistic synthetic occluded faces; and Random Occlusion Generation (RandOcc), a more general synthetic occluded data generation method. We empirically show the effectiveness and robustness of both methods, even for unseen occlusions. To facilitate model evaluation, we present two high-resolution real-world occluded face datasets with fine-grained annotations, RealOcc and RealOcc-Wild, featuring both careful alignment preprocessing and an in-the-wild setting for robustness test. We further conduct a comprehensive analysis on a newly introduced segmentation benchmark, offering insights for future exploration. 本文对遮挡感知人脸分割的数据集进行了全面分析，这项任务对于许多下游应用程序至关重要。此类数据集的收集和注释既费时又费力。尽管在合成数据生成方面已经做出了一些努力，但数据的自然方面仍然很少被探索。在我们的研究中，我们提出了两种遮挡生成技术，即自然遮挡生成（NatOcc），用于生成高质量的自然合成遮挡面；随机遮挡生成（RandOcc），一种更通用的合成遮挡数据生成方法。我们凭经验证明了这两种方法的有效性和鲁棒性，即使对于看不见的遮挡也是如此。为了便于模型评估，我们提供了两个具有细粒度注释的高分辨率真实世界遮挡人脸数据集：RealOcc 和 RealOcc-Wild，具有仔细的对齐预处理和用于鲁棒性测试的野外设置。我们进一步对新引入的细分基准进行全面分析，为未来的探索提供见解。 本文旨在分析并生成高质量的合成人脸遮挡分割数据集，提出两种遮挡生成技术及两个真实世界数据集，以提升模型的鲁棒性和评估能力。 Kenny T. R. Voo,Liming Jiang,Chen Change Loy cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Johannes Jakob Meyer,Marian Mularski,Elies Gil-Fuster,Antonio Anna Mele,Francesco Arzani,Alissa Wilms,Jens Eisert
title: Exploiting symmetry in variational quantum machine learning
title_zh: 在变分量子机器学习中利用对称性
abstract: Variational quantum machine learning is an extensively studied application of near-term quantum computers. The success of variational quantum learning models crucially depends on finding a suitable parametrization of the model that encodes an inductive bias relevant to the learning task. However, precious little is known about guiding principles for the construction of suitable parametrizations. In this work, we holistically explore when and how symmetries of the learning problem can be exploited to construct quantum learning models with outcomes invariant under the symmetry of the learning task. Building on tools from representation theory, we show how a standard gateset can be transformed into an equivariant gateset that respects the symmetries of the problem at hand through a process of gate symmetrization. We benchmark the proposed methods on two toy problems that feature a non-trivial symmetry and observe a substantial increase in generalization performance. As our tools can also be applied in a straightforward way to other variational problems with symmetric structure, we show how equivariant gatesets can be used in variational quantum eigensolvers.
summary: Variational quantum machine learning is an extensively studied application of near-term quantum computers. The success of variational quantum learning models crucially depends on finding a suitable parametrization of the model that encodes an inductive bias relevant to the learning task. However, precious little is known about guiding principles for the construction of suitable parametrizations. In this work, we holistically explore when and how symmetries of the learning problem can be exploited to construct quantum learning models with outcomes invariant under the symmetry of the learning task. Building on tools from representation theory, we show how a standard gateset can be transformed into an equivariant gateset that respects the symmetries of the problem at hand through a process of gate symmetrization. We benchmark the proposed methods on two toy problems that feature a non-trivial symmetry and observe a substantial increase in generalization performance. As our tools can also be applied in a straightforward way to other variational problems with symmetric structure, we show how equivariant gatesets can be used in variational quantum eigensolvers.
abstract_zh: 变分量子机器学习是近期量子计算机的一项广泛研究的应用。变分量子学习模型的成功关键取决于找到合适的模型参数化，该参数化编码与学习任务相关的归纳偏差。然而，人们对构建合适的参数化的指导原则知之甚少。在这项工作中，我们全面探索何时以及如何利用学习问题的对称性来构建在学习任务对称性下结果不变的量子学习模型。基于表示论的工具，我们展示了如何将标准门集转换为等变门集，通过门对称化过程尊重当前问题的对称性。我们在两个具有非平凡对称性的玩具问题上对所提出的方法进行了基准测试，并观察到泛化性能的大幅提高。由于我们的工具也可以以直接的方式应用于具有对称结构的其他变分问题，因此我们展示了如何在变分量子本征求解器中使用等变门集。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何利用学习问题的对称性构建具有不变性的量子学习模型，以提升变分量子机器学习的性能。
AI.motivation: 变分量子模型的性能依赖于合适的参数化，但缺乏指导原则，如何利用对称性构建有效模型是关键问题。
AI.method: 基于表示论，通过门对称化将标准门集转化为等变门集，以尊重问题对称性。
AI.result: 在具有非平凡对称性的两个玩具问题中，方法显著提升了模型的泛化性能。
AI.conclusion: 等变门集方法可有效应用于其他具有对称结构的变分问题，为量子机器学习提供新思路。

authors_text: Michael Eichelbeck,Hannah Markgraf,Matthias Althoff
title: Contingency-constrained economic dispatch with safe reinforcement learning
title_zh: 具有安全强化学习的应急约束经济调度
comment: ef:21st IEEE International Conference on Machine Learning and Applications (ICMLA), 2022, pp. 597-602
comments: ef:21st IEEE International Conference on Machine Learning and Applications (ICMLA), 2022, pp. 597-602
abstract: Future power systems will rely heavily on micro grids with a high share of decentralised renewable energy sources and energy storage systems. The high complexity and uncertainty in this context might make conventional power dispatch strategies infeasible. Reinforcement-learning based (RL) controllers can address this challenge, however, cannot themselves provide safety guarantees, preventing their deployment in practice. To overcome this limitation, we propose a formally validated RL controller for economic dispatch. We extend conventional constraints by a time-dependent constraint encoding the islanding contingency. The contingency constraint is computed using set-based backwards reachability analysis and actions of the RL agent are verified through a safety layer. Unsafe actions are projected into the safe action space while leveraging constrained zonotope set representations for computational efficiency. The developed approach is demonstrated on a residential use case using real-world measurements.
summary: Future power systems will rely heavily on micro grids with a high share of decentralised renewable energy sources and energy storage systems. The high complexity and uncertainty in this context might make conventional power dispatch strategies infeasible. Reinforcement-learning based (RL) controllers can address this challenge, however, cannot themselves provide safety guarantees, preventing their deployment in practice. To overcome this limitation, we propose a formally validated RL controller for economic dispatch. We extend conventional constraints by a time-dependent constraint encoding the islanding contingency. The contingency constraint is computed using set-based backwards reachability analysis and actions of the RL agent are verified through a safety layer. Unsafe actions are projected into the safe action space while leveraging constrained zonotope set representations for computational efficiency. The developed approach is demonstrated on a residential use case using real-world measurements.
abstract_zh: 未来的电力系统将严重依赖具有高比例分散式可再生能源和储能系统的微电网。这种情况下的高度复杂性和不确定性可能会使传统的电力调度策略变得不可行。基于强化学习 (RL) 的控制器可以应对这一挑战，但其本身无法提供安全保证，从而阻碍了其在实践中的部署。为了克服这一限制，我们提出了一种经过形式验证的 RL 控制器，用于经济调度。我们通过编码孤岛意外事件的时间相关约束来扩展传统约束。使用基于集合的向后可达性分析来计算偶发约束，并通过安全层验证 RL 代理的操作。不安全动作被投影到安全动作空间中，同时利用受限区域集表示来提高计算效率。所开发的方法通过实际测量在住宅用例中进行了演示。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合安全强化学习的经济调度方法，通过引入时间依赖的应急约束和安全验证层，解决微电网中高比例可再生能源和储能系统的调度安全问题。
AI.motivation: 传统调度策略难以应对微电网的复杂性和不确定性，而现有强化学习方法缺乏安全保证，无法实际部署。
AI.method: 扩展传统约束为时间依赖的岛状应急约束，利用集合反向可达性分析计算约束，并通过安全层验证RL动作，结合约束zonotope集提升计算效率。
AI.result: 在住宅场景的真实数据验证中，该方法有效确保了调度安全性和计算效率。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法为微电网经济调度提供了兼具安全性和适应性的解决方案，具备实际应用潜力。

authors_text: Xintian Wu,Qihang Zhang,Yiming Wu,Huanyu Wang,Songyuan Li,Lingyun Sun,Xi Li
title: F3A-GAN: Facial Flow for Face Animation with Generative Adversarial Networks
title_zh: F3A-GAN：使用生成对抗网络进行面部动画的面部流
abstract: Formulated as a conditional generation problem, face animation aims at synthesizing continuous face images from a single source image driven by a set of conditional face motion. Previous works mainly model the face motion as conditions with 1D or 2D representation (e.g., action units, emotion codes, landmark), which often leads to low-quality results in some complicated scenarios such as continuous generation and largepose transformation. To tackle this problem, the conditions are supposed to meet two requirements, i.e., motion information preserving and geometric continuity. To this end, we propose a novel representation based on a 3D geometric flow, termed facial flow, to represent the natural motion of the human face at any pose. Compared with other previous conditions, the proposed facial flow well controls the continuous changes to the face. After that, in order to utilize the facial flow for face editing, we build a synthesis framework generating continuous images with conditional facial flows. To fully take advantage of the motion information of facial flows, a hierarchical conditional framework is designed to combine the extracted multi-scale appearance features from images and motion features from flows in a hierarchical manner. The framework then decodes multiple fused features back to images progressively. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of our method compared to other state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Formulated as a conditional generation problem, face animation aims at synthesizing continuous face images from a single source image driven by a set of conditional face motion. Previous works mainly model the face motion as conditions with 1D or 2D representation (e.g., action units, emotion codes, landmark), which often leads to low-quality results in some complicated scenarios such as continuous generation and largepose transformation. To tackle this problem, the conditions are supposed to meet two requirements, i.e., motion information preserving and geometric continuity. To this end, we propose a novel representation based on a 3D geometric flow, termed facial flow, to represent the natural motion of the human face at any pose. Compared with other previous conditions, the proposed facial flow well controls the continuous changes to the face. After that, in order to utilize the facial flow for face editing, we build a synthesis framework generating continuous images with conditional facial flows. To fully take advantage of the motion information of facial flows, a hierarchical conditional framework is designed to combine the extracted multi-scale appearance features from images and motion features from flows in a hierarchical manner. The framework then decodes multiple fused features back to images progressively. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of our method compared to other state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 面部动画被表述为条件生成问题，旨在从由一组条件面部运动驱动的单个源图像合成连续的面部图像。以前的工作主要将面部运动建模为具有 1D 或 2D 表示的条件（例如动作单元、情感代码、地标），这通常会导致在一些复杂场景（例如连续生成和大姿势变换）中结果质量较低。为了解决这个问题，条件需要满足两个要求，即运动信息保存和几何连续性。为此，我们提出了一种基于 3D 几何流的新颖表示，称为面部流，来表示人脸在任何姿势下的自然运动。与之前的其他条件相比，所提出的面部流很好地控制了面部的连续变化。之后，为了利用面部流进行面部编辑，我们构建了一个合成框架，生成具有条件面部流的连续图像。为了充分利用面部流的运动信息，设计了分层条件框架，以分层方式组合从图像中提取的多尺度外观特征和从流中提取的运动特征。然后，该框架逐步将多个融合特征解码回图像。实验结果证明了我们的方法与其他最先进的方法相比的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出F3A-GAN方法，利用基于3D几何流的面部流表示，结合分层条件框架生成高质量连续面部动画。
AI.motivation: 传统条件表示（如动作单元、关键点）在连续生成和大姿态变换等复杂场景下难以保持运动信息与几何连续性，导致生成质量不足。
AI.method: 设计面部流表示捕捉自然面部运动，构建分层条件框架融合图像多尺度外观特征与流的运动特征，逐步解码生成连续图像。
AI.result: 实验表明，相比现有方法，F3A-GAN在连续生成和大姿态变换场景下生成的面部动画质量更优。
AI.conclusion: 面部流表示能有效控制面部连续变化，结合分层特征融合框架显著提升了复杂场景下的面部动画生成效果。

search_text: F3A-GAN: Facial Flow for Face Animation with Generative Adversarial Networks F3A-GAN：使用生成对抗网络进行面部动画的面部流 Formulated as a conditional generation problem, face animation aims at synthesizing continuous face images from a single source image driven by a set of conditional face motion. Previous works mainly model the face motion as conditions with 1D or 2D representation (e.g., action units, emotion codes, landmark), which often leads to low-quality results in some complicated scenarios such as continuous generation and largepose transformation. To tackle this problem, the conditions are supposed to meet two requirements, i.e., motion information preserving and geometric continuity. To this end, we propose a novel representation based on a 3D geometric flow, termed facial flow, to represent the natural motion of the human face at any pose. Compared with other previous conditions, the proposed facial flow well controls the continuous changes to the face. After that, in order to utilize the facial flow for face editing, we build a synthesis framework generating continuous images with conditional facial flows. To fully take advantage of the motion information of facial flows, a hierarchical conditional framework is designed to combine the extracted multi-scale appearance features from images and motion features from flows in a hierarchical manner. The framework then decodes multiple fused features back to images progressively. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of our method compared to other state-of-the-art methods. 面部动画被表述为条件生成问题，旨在从由一组条件面部运动驱动的单个源图像合成连续的面部图像。以前的工作主要将面部运动建模为具有 1D 或 2D 表示的条件（例如动作单元、情感代码、地标），这通常会导致在一些复杂场景（例如连续生成和大姿势变换）中结果质量较低。为了解决这个问题，条件需要满足两个要求，即运动信息保存和几何连续性。为此，我们提出了一种基于 3D 几何流的新颖表示，称为面部流，来表示人脸在任何姿势下的自然运动。与之前的其他条件相比，所提出的面部流很好地控制了面部的连续变化。之后，为了利用面部流进行面部编辑，我们构建了一个合成框架，生成具有条件面部流的连续图像。为了充分利用面部流的运动信息，设计了分层条件框架，以分层方式组合从图像中提取的多尺度外观特征和从流中提取的运动特征。然后，该框架逐步将多个融合特征解码回图像。实验结果证明了我们的方法与其他最先进的方法相比的有效性。 本文提出F3A-GAN方法，利用基于3D几何流的面部流表示，结合分层条件框架生成高质量连续面部动画。 Xintian Wu,Qihang Zhang,Yiming Wu,Huanyu Wang,Songyuan Li,Lingyun Sun,Xi Li cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Catherine Tony,Mohana Balasubramanian,Nicolás E. Díaz Ferreyra,Riccardo Scandariato
title: Conversational DevBots for Secure Programming: An Empirical Study on SKF Chatbot
title_zh: 用于安全编程的对话式开发机器人：SKF 聊天机器人的实证研究
comment: Accepted paper at the 2022 International Conference on Evaluation and Assessment in Software Engineering (EASE)
comments: Accepted paper at the 2022 International Conference on Evaluation and Assessment in Software Engineering (EASE)
abstract: Conversational agents or chatbots are widely investigated and used across different fields including healthcare, education, and marketing. Still, the development of chatbots for assisting secure coding practices is in its infancy. In this paper, we present the results of an empirical study on SKF chatbot, a software-development bot (DevBot) designed to answer queries about software security. To the best of our knowledge, SKF chatbot is one of the very few of its kind, thus a representative instance of conversational DevBots aiding secure software development. In this study, we collect and analyse empirical evidence on the effectiveness of SKF chatbot, while assessing the needs and expectations of its users (i.e., software developers). Furthermore, we explore the factors that may hinder the elaboration of more sophisticated conversational security DevBots and identify features for improving the efficiency of state-of-the-art solutions. All in all, our findings provide valuable insights pointing towards the design of more context-aware and personalized conversational DevBots for security engineering.
summary: Conversational agents or chatbots are widely investigated and used across different fields including healthcare, education, and marketing. Still, the development of chatbots for assisting secure coding practices is in its infancy. In this paper, we present the results of an empirical study on SKF chatbot, a software-development bot (DevBot) designed to answer queries about software security. To the best of our knowledge, SKF chatbot is one of the very few of its kind, thus a representative instance of conversational DevBots aiding secure software development. In this study, we collect and analyse empirical evidence on the effectiveness of SKF chatbot, while assessing the needs and expectations of its users (i.e., software developers). Furthermore, we explore the factors that may hinder the elaboration of more sophisticated conversational security DevBots and identify features for improving the efficiency of state-of-the-art solutions. All in all, our findings provide valuable insights pointing towards the design of more context-aware and personalized conversational DevBots for security engineering.
abstract_zh: 会话代理或聊天机器人在医疗保健、教育和营销等不同领域得到了广泛的研究和使用。尽管如此，用于协助安全编码实践的聊天机器人的开发仍处于起步阶段。在本文中，我们介绍了 SKF 聊天机器人的实证研究结果，这是一种软件开发机器人 (DevBot)，旨在回答有关软件安全的查询。据我们所知，SKF 聊天机器人是同类中极少数的机器人之一，因此是帮助安全软件开发的对话式 DevBot 的代表性实例。在本研究中，我们收集并分析有关 SKF 聊天机器人有效性的经验证据，同时评估其用户（即软件开发人员）的需求和期望。此外，我们还探讨了可能阻碍开发更复杂的会话安全 DevBot 的因素，并确定了提高最先进解决方案效率的功能。总而言之，我们的研究结果为安全工程设计更具上下文感知和个性化的对话式 DevBot 提供了宝贵的见解。

AI.tldr: 本文通过实证研究评估SKF聊天机器人的有效性，探讨其在安全编程中的应用及改进方向。
AI.motivation: 尽管聊天机器人在多个领域广泛应用，但针对安全编码实践的辅助型聊天机器人仍处于早期阶段，需探索其实际效果与用户需求。
AI.method: 通过收集和分析SKF聊天机器人的使用数据，评估其效果并调研开发者需求，同时探讨阻碍更复杂安全聊天机器人发展的因素。
AI.result: 研究发现SKF聊天机器人在辅助安全编码中具有一定效果，但存在局限性；用户对个性化与上下文感知功能有较高期待。
AI.conclusion: 未来需设计更智能、个性化的安全开发聊天机器人，以提升其在安全工程中的实用性与用户接受度。

authors_text: Arthur Aubret,Céline Teulière,Jochen Triesch
title: Embodied vision for learning object representations
title_zh: 用于学习对象表示的具身视觉
abstract: Recent time-contrastive learning approaches manage to learn invariant object representations without supervision. This is achieved by mapping successive views of an object onto close-by internal representations. When considering this learning approach as a model of the development of human object recognition, it is important to consider what visual input a toddler would typically observe while interacting with objects. First, human vision is highly foveated, with high resolution only available in the central region of the field of view. Second, objects may be seen against a blurry background due to infants' limited depth of field. Third, during object manipulation a toddler mostly observes close objects filling a large part of the field of view due to their rather short arms. Here, we study how these effects impact the quality of visual representations learnt through time-contrastive learning. To this end, we let a visually embodied agent "play" with objects in different locations of a near photo-realistic flat. During each play session the agent views an object in multiple orientations before turning its body to view another object. The resulting sequence of views feeds a time-contrastive learning algorithm. Our results show that visual statistics mimicking those of a toddler improve object recognition accuracy in both familiar and novel environments. We argue that this effect is caused by the reduction of features extracted in the background, a neural network bias for large features in the image and a greater similarity between novel and familiar background regions. We conclude that the embodied nature of visual learning may be crucial for understanding the development of human object perception.
summary: Recent time-contrastive learning approaches manage to learn invariant object representations without supervision. This is achieved by mapping successive views of an object onto close-by internal representations. When considering this learning approach as a model of the development of human object recognition, it is important to consider what visual input a toddler would typically observe while interacting with objects. First, human vision is highly foveated, with high resolution only available in the central region of the field of view. Second, objects may be seen against a blurry background due to infants' limited depth of field. Third, during object manipulation a toddler mostly observes close objects filling a large part of the field of view due to their rather short arms. Here, we study how these effects impact the quality of visual representations learnt through time-contrastive learning. To this end, we let a visually embodied agent "play" with objects in different locations of a near photo-realistic flat. During each play session the agent views an object in multiple orientations before turning its body to view another object. The resulting sequence of views feeds a time-contrastive learning algorithm. Our results show that visual statistics mimicking those of a toddler improve object recognition accuracy in both familiar and novel environments. We argue that this effect is caused by the reduction of features extracted in the background, a neural network bias for large features in the image and a greater similarity between novel and familiar background regions. We conclude that the embodied nature of visual learning may be crucial for understanding the development of human object perception.
abstract_zh: 最近的时间对比学习方法设法在没有监督的情况下学习不变的对象表示。这是通过将对象的连续视图映射到附近的内部表示来实现的。当将这种学习方法视为人类物体识别发展的模型时，重要的是要考虑幼儿在与物体互动时通常会观察到的视觉输入。首先，人类视觉高度集中，只有在视野的中心区域才能获得高分辨率。其次，由于婴儿的景深有限，可能会在模糊的背景下看到物体。第三，在物体操作过程中，幼儿由于手臂较短，通常会观察占据大部分视野的近距离物体。在这里，我们研究这些效应如何影响通过时间对比学习学习的视觉表征的质量。为此，我们让视觉体现的代理在近乎照片般真实的公寓的不同位置“玩”物体。在每个游戏会话期间，代理会以多个方向查看一个对象，然后再转动其身体以查看另一个对象。由此产生的视图序列提供时间对比学习算法。我们的结果表明，模仿幼儿的视觉统计数据可以提高熟悉和新环境中物体识别的准确性。我们认为，这种效应是由背景中提取的特征减少、神经网络对图像中大特征的偏差以及新的和熟悉的背景区域之间更大的相似性引起的。我们的结论是，视觉学习的具体本质对于理解人类物体感知的发展可能至关重要。

AI.tldr: 本论文研究具身视觉对时间对比学习方法中物体表示学习的影响，通过模拟婴儿视觉特征（如高聚焦、背景模糊等）优化物体识别效果。
AI.motivation: 尽管时间对比学习能无监督学习物体表示，但作为人类物体识别发展模型，需考虑婴儿实际视觉输入特点（如视野聚焦、背景模糊等）对学习效果的影响。
AI.method: 设计具身代理在近真实环境中与物体互动，生成多视角数据序列，通过时间对比学习算法训练模型，对比不同视觉条件下的表示质量。
AI.result: 模拟婴儿视觉统计的输入显著提升物体识别准确率，归因于背景特征减少、网络对大特征的偏好及新旧背景区域相似性增强。
AI.conclusion: 具身视觉的学习机制可能是理解人类物体感知发展的重要因素，强调视觉体验的物理交互特性对表征学习的关键作用。

ai_content.tldr: 本论文研究具身视觉对时间对比学习方法中物体表示学习的影响，通过模拟婴儿视觉特征（如高聚焦、背景模糊等）优化物体识别效果。

search_text: Embodied vision for learning object representations 用于学习对象表示的具身视觉 Recent time-contrastive learning approaches manage to learn invariant object representations without supervision. This is achieved by mapping successive views of an object onto close-by internal representations. When considering this learning approach as a model of the development of human object recognition, it is important to consider what visual input a toddler would typically observe while interacting with objects. First, human vision is highly foveated, with high resolution only available in the central region of the field of view. Second, objects may be seen against a blurry background due to infants' limited depth of field. Third, during object manipulation a toddler mostly observes close objects filling a large part of the field of view due to their rather short arms. Here, we study how these effects impact the quality of visual representations learnt through time-contrastive learning. To this end, we let a visually embodied agent "play" with objects in different locations of a near photo-realistic flat. During each play session the agent views an object in multiple orientations before turning its body to view another object. The resulting sequence of views feeds a time-contrastive learning algorithm. Our results show that visual statistics mimicking those of a toddler improve object recognition accuracy in both familiar and novel environments. We argue that this effect is caused by the reduction of features extracted in the background, a neural network bias for large features in the image and a greater similarity between novel and familiar background regions. We conclude that the embodied nature of visual learning may be crucial for understanding the development of human object perception. 最近的时间对比学习方法设法在没有监督的情况下学习不变的对象表示。这是通过将对象的连续视图映射到附近的内部表示来实现的。当将这种学习方法视为人类物体识别发展的模型时，重要的是要考虑幼儿在与物体互动时通常会观察到的视觉输入。首先，人类视觉高度集中，只有在视野的中心区域才能获得高分辨率。其次，由于婴儿的景深有限，可能会在模糊的背景下看到物体。第三，在物体操作过程中，幼儿由于手臂较短，通常会观察占据大部分视野的近距离物体。在这里，我们研究这些效应如何影响通过时间对比学习学习的视觉表征的质量。为此，我们让视觉体现的代理在近乎照片般真实的公寓的不同位置“玩”物体。在每个游戏会话期间，代理会以多个方向查看一个对象，然后再转动其身体以查看另一个对象。由此产生的视图序列提供时间对比学习算法。我们的结果表明，模仿幼儿的视觉统计数据可以提高熟悉和新环境中物体识别的准确性。我们认为，这种效应是由背景中提取的特征减少、神经网络对图像中大特征的偏差以及新的和熟悉的背景区域之间更大的相似性引起的。我们的结论是，视觉学习的具体本质对于理解人类物体感知的发展可能至关重要。 本论文研究具身视觉对时间对比学习方法中物体表示学习的影响，通过模拟婴儿视觉特征（如高聚焦、背景模糊等）优化物体识别效果。 Arthur Aubret,Céline Teulière,Jochen Triesch cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Shakir Showkat Sofi,Nadezhda Alsahanova
title: Image Segmentation with Topological Priors
title_zh: 使用拓扑先验进行图像分割
comment: ef:2023 IEEE High Performance Extreme Computing Conference (HPEC)
comments: ef:2023 IEEE High Performance Extreme Computing Conference (HPEC)
abstract: Solving segmentation tasks with topological priors proved to make fewer errors in fine-scale structures. In this work, we use topological priors both before and during the deep neural network training procedure. We compared the results of the two approaches with simple segmentation on various accuracy metrics and the Betti number error, which is directly related to topological correctness, and discovered that incorporating topological information into the classical UNet model performed significantly better. We conducted experiments on the ISBI EM segmentation dataset.
summary: Solving segmentation tasks with topological priors proved to make fewer errors in fine-scale structures. In this work, we use topological priors both before and during the deep neural network training procedure. We compared the results of the two approaches with simple segmentation on various accuracy metrics and the Betti number error, which is directly related to topological correctness, and discovered that incorporating topological information into the classical UNet model performed significantly better. We conducted experiments on the ISBI EM segmentation dataset.
abstract_zh: 事实证明，利用拓扑先验解决分割任务可以减少精细结构中的错误。在这项工作中，我们在深度神经网络训练过程之前和过程中都使用拓扑先验。我们比较了两种简单分割方法在各种精度指标和 Betti 数误差（与拓扑正确性直接相关）上的结果，发现将拓扑信息合并到经典 UNet 模型中表现明显更好。我们在 ISBI EM 分割数据集上进行了实验。

AI.tldr: 本文提出在图像分割任务中引入拓扑先验信息，以提升细小结构的分割精度。
AI.motivation: 传统分割方法在处理细小结构时容易产生误差，而拓扑先验能有效约束分割结果的拓扑正确性。
AI.method: 在UNet模型训练前和训练过程中均引入拓扑先验，并通过贝蒂数误差等指标与传统分割方法进行对比实验。
AI.result: 结合拓扑先验的UNet在ISBI EM数据集上显著优于传统方法，尤其在贝蒂数误差指标上表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 拓扑先验信息能有效提升分割模型的精度与拓扑正确性，为复杂结构分割提供新思路。

authors_text: Mingyu Yang,Yu Chen,Hun-Seok Kim
title: Efficient Deep Visual and Inertial Odometry with Adaptive Visual Modality Selection
title_zh: 具有自适应视觉模态选择的高效深度视觉和惯性里程计
abstract: In recent years, deep learning-based approaches for visual-inertial odometry (VIO) have shown remarkable performance outperforming traditional geometric methods. Yet, all existing methods use both the visual and inertial measurements for every pose estimation incurring potential computational redundancy. While visual data processing is much more expensive than that for the inertial measurement unit (IMU), it may not always contribute to improving the pose estimation accuracy. In this paper, we propose an adaptive deep-learning based VIO method that reduces computational redundancy by opportunistically disabling the visual modality. Specifically, we train a policy network that learns to deactivate the visual feature extractor on the fly based on the current motion state and IMU readings. A Gumbel-Softmax trick is adopted to train the policy network to make the decision process differentiable for end-to-end system training. The learned strategy is interpretable, and it shows scenario-dependent decision patterns for adaptive complexity reduction. Experiment results show that our method achieves a similar or even better performance than the full-modality baseline with up to 78.8% computational complexity reduction for KITTI dataset evaluation. The code is available at https://github.com/mingyuyng/Visual-Selective-VIO.
summary: In recent years, deep learning-based approaches for visual-inertial odometry (VIO) have shown remarkable performance outperforming traditional geometric methods. Yet, all existing methods use both the visual and inertial measurements for every pose estimation incurring potential computational redundancy. While visual data processing is much more expensive than that for the inertial measurement unit (IMU), it may not always contribute to improving the pose estimation accuracy. In this paper, we propose an adaptive deep-learning based VIO method that reduces computational redundancy by opportunistically disabling the visual modality. Specifically, we train a policy network that learns to deactivate the visual feature extractor on the fly based on the current motion state and IMU readings. A Gumbel-Softmax trick is adopted to train the policy network to make the decision process differentiable for end-to-end system training. The learned strategy is interpretable, and it shows scenario-dependent decision patterns for adaptive complexity reduction. Experiment results show that our method achieves a similar or even better performance than the full-modality baseline with up to 78.8% computational complexity reduction for KITTI dataset evaluation. The code is available at https://github.com/mingyuyng/Visual-Selective-VIO.
abstract_zh: 近年来，基于深度学习的视觉惯性里程计（VIO）方法表现出了优于传统几何方法的卓越性能。然而，所有现有方法都使用视觉和惯性测量来进行每个姿势估计，从而产生潜在的计算冗余。虽然视觉数据处理比惯性测量单元 (IMU) 昂贵得多，但它可能并不总是有助于提高姿态估计精度。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于自适应深度学习的 VIO 方法，该方法通过机会禁用视觉模态来减少计算冗余。具体来说，我们训练一个策略网络，该网络学习根据当前运动状态和 IMU 读数动态停用视觉特征提取器。采用 Gumbel-Softmax 技巧来训练策略网络，使决策过程可微分以进行端到端系统训练。学习到的策略是可解释的，并且它显示了用于自适应复杂性降低的依赖于场景的决策模式。实验结果表明，我们的方法实现了与全模态基线相似甚至更好的性能，KITTI 数据集评估的计算复杂度降低了高达 78.8%。代码可在 https://github.com/mingyuyng/Visual-Selective-VIO 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自适应深度学习视觉惯性里程计方法，通过动态关闭视觉模态减少计算冗余。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉惯性里程计方法始终同时使用视觉和惯性数据，导致计算冗余且视觉数据处理成本高。
AI.method: 训练策略网络根据当前运动状态和IMU数据动态关闭视觉模态，采用Gumbel-Softmax实现端到端可微决策。
AI.result: 在KITTI数据集上实现与全模态基线相当或更优的性能，计算复杂度降低78.8%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过可解释的自适应策略有效降低计算复杂度，且性能保持稳定，适用于不同场景。
