search_text: Sequential algorithms for testing identity and closeness of distributions 用于测试分布的同一性和接近性的顺序算法 What advantage do \emph{sequential} procedures provide over batch algorithms for testing properties of unknown distributions? Focusing on the problem of testing whether two distributions $\mathcal{D}_1$ and $\mathcal{D}_2$ on $\{1,\dots, n\}$ are equal or $ε$-far, we give several answers to this question. We show that for a small alphabet size $n$, there is a sequential algorithm that outperforms any batch algorithm by a factor of at least $4$ in terms sample complexity. For a general alphabet size $n$, we give a sequential algorithm that uses no more samples than its batch counterpart, and possibly fewer if the actual distance $TV(\mathcal{D}_1, \mathcal{D}_2)$ between $\mathcal{D}_1$ and $\mathcal{D}_2$ is larger than $ε$. As a corollary, letting $ε$ go to $0$, we obtain a sequential algorithm for testing closeness when no a priori bound on $TV(\mathcal{D}_1, \mathcal{D}_2)$ is given that has a sample complexity $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(\frac{n^{2/3}}{TV(\mathcal{D}_1, \mathcal{D}_2)^{4/3}})$: this improves over the $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(\frac{n/\log n}{TV(\mathcal{D}_1, \mathcal{D}_2)^{2} })$ tester of \cite{daskalakis2017optimal} and is optimal up to multiplicative constants. We also establish limitations of sequential algorithms for the problem of testing identity and closeness: they can improve the worst case number of samples by at most a constant factor. 与批处理算法相比，\emph{sequential} 过程在测试未知分布的属性方面具有哪些优势？着眼于测试 $\{1,\dots, n\}$ 上的两个分布 $\mathcal{D}_1$ 和 $\mathcal{D}_2$ 是否相等或 $ε$-far 的问题，我们给出了这个问题的几个答案。我们证明，对于较小的字母大小 $n$，有一种顺序算法在样本复杂度方面比任何批处理算法至少高出 $4$。对于一般字母表大小 $n$，我们给出一个顺序算法，该算法使用的样本数不超过其批量对应的样本数，并且如果 $\mathcal{D}_1$ 和 $\mathcal{D}_2$ 之间的实际距离 $TV(\mathcal{D}_1, \mathcal{D}_2)$ 大于 $ε$，则可能使用更少的样本。作为推论，让 $ε$ 转到 $0$，当 $TV(\mathcal{D}_1, \mathcal{D}_2)$ 上没有给定具有样本复杂度 $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(\frac{n^{2/3}}{TV(\mathcal{D}_1, \mathcal{D}_2)^{4/3}})$：这比 \cite{daskalakis2017optimal} 的 $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(\frac{n/\log n}{TV(\mathcal{D}_1, \mathcal{D}_2)^{2} })$ 测试器有所改进，并且在乘法常数范围内是最佳的。我们还针对测试同一性和接近性问题建立了顺序算法的局限性：它们最多可以将最坏情况下的样本数量提高一个常数因子。 本文研究了顺序算法在测试未知分布身份和接近性方面的优势，并与批量算法进行了比较。 Omar Fawzi,Nicolas Flammarion,Aurélien Garivier,Aadil Oufkir cs.DS,math.ST

authors_text: Kexin Li,Mandar Chitre
title: Data-aided Underwater Acoustic Ray Propagation Modeling
title_zh: 数据辅助水下声射线传播建模
comment: Accepted version in IEEE Journal of Oceanic Engineering
comments: Accepted version in IEEE Journal of Oceanic Engineering
abstract: Acoustic propagation models are widely used in numerous oceanic and other underwater applications. Most conventional models are approximate solutions of the acoustic wave equation, and require accurate environmental knowledge to be available beforehand. Environmental parameters may not always be easily or accurately measurable. While data-driven techniques might allow us to model acoustic propagation without the need for extensive prior environmental knowledge, such techniques tend to be data-hungry and often infeasible in oceanic applications where data collection is difficult and expensive. We propose a data-aided ray physics based high frequency acoustic propagation modeling approach that enables us to train models with only a small amount of data. The proposed framework is not only data-efficient, but also offers flexibility to incorporate varying degrees of environmental knowledge, and generalizes well to permit extrapolation beyond the area where data was collected. We demonstrate the feasibility and applicability of our method through four numerical case studies, and one controlled experiment. We also benchmark our method's performance against classical data-driven techniques.
summary: Acoustic propagation models are widely used in numerous oceanic and other underwater applications. Most conventional models are approximate solutions of the acoustic wave equation, and require accurate environmental knowledge to be available beforehand. Environmental parameters may not always be easily or accurately measurable. While data-driven techniques might allow us to model acoustic propagation without the need for extensive prior environmental knowledge, such techniques tend to be data-hungry and often infeasible in oceanic applications where data collection is difficult and expensive. We propose a data-aided ray physics based high frequency acoustic propagation modeling approach that enables us to train models with only a small amount of data. The proposed framework is not only data-efficient, but also offers flexibility to incorporate varying degrees of environmental knowledge, and generalizes well to permit extrapolation beyond the area where data was collected. We demonstrate the feasibility and applicability of our method through four numerical case studies, and one controlled experiment. We also benchmark our method's performance against classical data-driven techniques.
abstract_zh: 声学传播模型广泛应用于众多海洋和其他水下应用中。大多数传统模型都是声波方程的近似解，并且需要事先获得准确的环境知识。环境参数可能并不总是可以轻松或准确地测量。虽然数据驱动技术可能允许我们在不需要广泛的先验环境知识的情况下对声学传播进行建模，但此类技术往往需要大量数据，并且在数据收集困难且昂贵的海洋应用中通常不可行。我们提出了一种基于数据辅助射线物理的高频声传播建模方法，使我们能够仅使用少量数据来训练模型。所提出的框架不仅数据高效，而且还提供了纳入不同程度的环境知识的灵活性，并且具有良好的概括性，允许在数据收集范围之外进行推断。我们通过四个数值案例研究和一项对照实验证明了我们的方法的可行性和适用性。我们还根据经典数据驱动技术对我们的方法的性能进行了基准测试。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种数据辅助的射线物理高频水声传播建模方法，减少对环境数据的依赖。
AI.motivation: 传统声波传播模型依赖准确环境参数，但实际中参数难以获取；数据驱动方法需大量数据，而海洋数据收集困难且昂贵。
AI.method: 结合射线物理理论与少量数据训练模型，支持不同程度的环境知识输入，并具备跨区域泛化能力。
AI.result: 通过四个数值案例和受控实验验证方法可行性，性能优于经典数据驱动技术。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在数据效率与泛化能力上具有优势，适用于数据稀缺的海洋环境声学建模。

authors_text: Kaicheng Zhang,Ziyang Hong,Shida Xu,Sen Wang
title: CURL: Continuous, Ultra-compact Representation for LiDAR
title_zh: CURL：LiDAR 的连续、超紧凑表示
abstract: Increasing the density of the 3D LiDAR point cloud is appealing for many applications in robotics. However, high-density LiDAR sensors are usually costly and still limited to a level of coverage per scan (e.g., 128 channels). Meanwhile, denser point cloud scans and maps mean larger volumes to store and longer times to transmit. Existing works focus on either improving point cloud density or compressing its size. This paper aims to design a novel 3D point cloud representation that can continuously increase point cloud density while reducing its storage and transmitting size. The pipeline of the proposed Continuous, Ultra-compact Representation of LiDAR (CURL) includes four main steps: meshing, upsampling, encoding, and continuous reconstruction. It is capable of transforming a 3D LiDAR scan or map into a compact spherical harmonics representation which can be used or transmitted in low latency to continuously reconstruct a much denser 3D point cloud. Extensive experiments on four public datasets, covering college gardens, city streets, and indoor rooms, demonstrate that much denser 3D point clouds can be accurately reconstructed using the proposed CURL representation while achieving up to 80% storage space-saving. We open-source the CURL codes for the community.
summary: Increasing the density of the 3D LiDAR point cloud is appealing for many applications in robotics. However, high-density LiDAR sensors are usually costly and still limited to a level of coverage per scan (e.g., 128 channels). Meanwhile, denser point cloud scans and maps mean larger volumes to store and longer times to transmit. Existing works focus on either improving point cloud density or compressing its size. This paper aims to design a novel 3D point cloud representation that can continuously increase point cloud density while reducing its storage and transmitting size. The pipeline of the proposed Continuous, Ultra-compact Representation of LiDAR (CURL) includes four main steps: meshing, upsampling, encoding, and continuous reconstruction. It is capable of transforming a 3D LiDAR scan or map into a compact spherical harmonics representation which can be used or transmitted in low latency to continuously reconstruct a much denser 3D point cloud. Extensive experiments on four public datasets, covering college gardens, city streets, and indoor rooms, demonstrate that much denser 3D point clouds can be accurately reconstructed using the proposed CURL representation while achieving up to 80% storage space-saving. We open-source the CURL codes for the community.
abstract_zh: 增加 3D LiDAR 点云的密度对于机器人领域的许多应用都很有吸引力。然而，高密度 LiDAR 传感器通常价格昂贵，并且每次扫描的覆盖范围仍然有限（例如 128 个通道）。与此同时，更密集的点云扫描和地图意味着更大的存储量和更长的传输时间。现有的工作重点是提高点云密度或压缩其大小。本文旨在设计一种新颖的3D点云表示，可以不断增加点云密度，同时减少其存储和传输大小。所提出的激光雷达连续、超紧凑表示（CURL）的流程包括四个主要步骤：网格划分、上采样、编码和连续重建。它能够将 3D LiDAR 扫描或地图转换为紧凑的球谐函数表示，可以在低延迟下使用或传输，以连续重建更密集的 3D 点云。对四个公共数据集（涵盖大学花园、城市街道和室内房间）的广泛实验表明，使用所提出的 CURL 表示可以准确地重建更密集的 3D 点云，同时节省高达 80% 的存储空间。我们为社区开源了 CURL 代码。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CURL的新型三维点云表示方法，旨在通过连续增加点云密度同时减少存储和传输体积，以解决高密度LiDAR传感器成本高、覆盖有限以及数据存储和传输效率低的问题。
AI.motivation: 高密度LiDAR传感器成本高昂且扫描覆盖范围有限，而更密集的点云数据会导致存储和传输开销增大。现有方法仅侧重于提升密度或压缩体积，缺乏兼顾两者的解决方案。
AI.method: CURL方法包含四个步骤：网格化、上采样、编码和连续重建，通过将三维LiDAR数据转换为紧凑的球面谐波表示，实现低延迟的高密度点云重建。
AI.result: 在四个公开数据集（校园花园、城市街道、室内房间等）上的实验表明，CURL可准确重建更密集的点云，同时实现高达80%的存储空间节省。
AI.conclusion: CURL通过球面谐波表示有效平衡了点云密度与存储效率，为LiDAR数据的高效处理提供了新思路，并已开源代码供社区使用。

result: 在四个公开数据集（校园花园、城市街道、室内房间等）上的实验表明，CURL可准确重建更密集的点云，同时实现高达80%的存储空间节省。
conclusion: CURL通过球面谐波表示有效平衡了点云密度与存储效率，为LiDAR数据的高效处理提供了新思路，并已开源代码供社区使用。
search_text: CURL: Continuous, Ultra-compact Representation for LiDAR CURL：LiDAR 的连续、超紧凑表示 Increasing the density of the 3D LiDAR point cloud is appealing for many applications in robotics. However, high-density LiDAR sensors are usually costly and still limited to a level of coverage per scan (e.g., 128 channels). Meanwhile, denser point cloud scans and maps mean larger volumes to store and longer times to transmit. Existing works focus on either improving point cloud density or compressing its size. This paper aims to design a novel 3D point cloud representation that can continuously increase point cloud density while reducing its storage and transmitting size. The pipeline of the proposed Continuous, Ultra-compact Representation of LiDAR (CURL) includes four main steps: meshing, upsampling, encoding, and continuous reconstruction. It is capable of transforming a 3D LiDAR scan or map into a compact spherical harmonics representation which can be used or transmitted in low latency to continuously reconstruct a much denser 3D point cloud. Extensive experiments on four public datasets, covering college gardens, city streets, and indoor rooms, demonstrate that much denser 3D point clouds can be accurately reconstructed using the proposed CURL representation while achieving up to 80% storage space-saving. We open-source the CURL codes for the community. 增加 3D LiDAR 点云的密度对于机器人领域的许多应用都很有吸引力。然而，高密度 LiDAR 传感器通常价格昂贵，并且每次扫描的覆盖范围仍然有限（例如 128 个通道）。与此同时，更密集的点云扫描和地图意味着更大的存储量和更长的传输时间。现有的工作重点是提高点云密度或压缩其大小。本文旨在设计一种新颖的3D点云表示，可以不断增加点云密度，同时减少其存储和传输大小。所提出的激光雷达连续、超紧凑表示（CURL）的流程包括四个主要步骤：网格划分、上采样、编码和连续重建。它能够将 3D LiDAR 扫描或地图转换为紧凑的球谐函数表示，可以在低延迟下使用或传输，以连续重建更密集的 3D 点云。对四个公共数据集（涵盖大学花园、城市街道和室内房间）的广泛实验表明，使用所提出的 CURL 表示可以准确地重建更密集的 3D 点云，同时节省高达 80% 的存储空间。我们为社区开源了 CURL 代码。 本文提出了一种名为CURL的新型三维点云表示方法，旨在通过连续增加点云密度同时减少存储和传输体积，以解决高密度LiDAR传感器成本高、覆盖有限以及数据存储和传输效率低的问题。 Kaicheng Zhang,Ziyang Hong,Shida Xu,Sen Wang cs.RO

authors_text: Reo Yoneyama,Yi-Chiao Wu,Tomoki Toda
title: Unified Source-Filter GAN with Harmonic-plus-Noise Source Excitation Generation
title_zh: 具有谐波加噪声源激励生成的统一源滤波器 GAN
abstract: This paper introduces a unified source-filter network with a harmonic-plus-noise source excitation generation mechanism. In our previous work, we proposed unified Source-Filter GAN (uSFGAN) for developing a high-fidelity neural vocoder with flexible voice controllability using a unified source-filter neural network architecture. However, the capability of uSFGAN to model the aperiodic source excitation signal is insufficient, and there is still a gap in sound quality between the natural and generated speech. To improve the source excitation modeling and generated sound quality, a new source excitation generation network separately generating periodic and aperiodic components is proposed. The advanced adversarial training procedure of HiFiGAN is also adopted to replace that of Parallel WaveGAN used in the original uSFGAN. Both objective and subjective evaluation results show that the modified uSFGAN significantly improves the sound quality of the basic uSFGAN while maintaining the voice controllability.
summary: This paper introduces a unified source-filter network with a harmonic-plus-noise source excitation generation mechanism. In our previous work, we proposed unified Source-Filter GAN (uSFGAN) for developing a high-fidelity neural vocoder with flexible voice controllability using a unified source-filter neural network architecture. However, the capability of uSFGAN to model the aperiodic source excitation signal is insufficient, and there is still a gap in sound quality between the natural and generated speech. To improve the source excitation modeling and generated sound quality, a new source excitation generation network separately generating periodic and aperiodic components is proposed. The advanced adversarial training procedure of HiFiGAN is also adopted to replace that of Parallel WaveGAN used in the original uSFGAN. Both objective and subjective evaluation results show that the modified uSFGAN significantly improves the sound quality of the basic uSFGAN while maintaining the voice controllability.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了一种具有谐波加噪声源激励生成机制的统一源滤波器网络。在我们之前的工作中，我们提出了统一源过滤器 GAN（uSFGAN），用于使用统一源过滤器神经网络架构开发具有灵活语音可控性的高保真神经声码器。然而，uSFGAN 对非周期性源激励信号进行建模的能力不足，并且自然语音和生成语音之间的音质仍然存在差距。为了改善源激励建模和生成的声音质量，提出了一种新的源激励生成网络，分别生成周期和非周期分量。还采用 HiFiGAN 的先进对抗训练程序来取代原始 uSFGAN 中使用的 Parallel WaveGAN 的对抗训练程序。客观和主观评价结果均表明，改进后的uSFGAN在保持语音可控性的同时，显着提高了基本uSFGAN的音质。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的统一源-滤波器生成对抗网络（uSFGAN），通过引入谐波加噪声源激励生成机制，提升语音合成的音质和可控性。
AI.motivation: 原有uSFGAN在建模非周期性源激励信号时存在不足，导致生成语音与自然语音在音质上仍有差距，需改进源激励建模以提升音质。
AI.method: 设计新的源激励生成网络，分别生成周期性和非周期性成分，并采用HiFiGAN的对抗训练方法替代原uSFGAN中的Parallel WaveGAN训练策略。
AI.result: 客观和主观评估结果表明，改进后的uSFGAN显著提升了基础uSFGAN的音质，同时保持了语音可控性。
AI.conclusion: 通过改进源激励建模和对抗训练方法，新uSFGAN有效缩小了生成语音与自然语音的音质差距，实现了高质量且可控的语音合成。

authors_text: Mikhail Cherniavskii,Boris Goldengorin
title: An improved KTNS algorithm for the job sequencing and tool switching problem
title_zh: 针对作业排序和工具切换问题的改进 KTNS 算法
comment: Presented online at The 51st Annual Meeting of the Southeast Decision Sciences Institute, February 16 - 18, 2022 Jacksonville, FL
comments: Presented online at The 51st Annual Meeting of the Southeast Decision Sciences Institute, February 16 - 18, 2022 Jacksonville, FL
abstract: We outline a new Max Pipe Construction Algorithm (MPCA) with the purpose to reduce the CPU time for the classic Keep Tool Needed Soonest (KTNS) algorithm. The KTNS algorithm is applied to compute the objective function value for the given sequence of jobs in all exact and approximating algorithms for solving the Job Sequencing and Tool Switching Problem (SSP). Our MPCA outperforms the KTNS algorithm by at least an order of magnitude in terms of CPU times. Since all exact and heuristic algorithms for solving the SSP spend most of their CPU time on applying the KTNS algorithm we show that our MPCA solves the entire SSP on average 59 times faster for benchmark instances of D compared to current state of the art heuristics.
summary: We outline a new Max Pipe Construction Algorithm (MPCA) with the purpose to reduce the CPU time for the classic Keep Tool Needed Soonest (KTNS) algorithm. The KTNS algorithm is applied to compute the objective function value for the given sequence of jobs in all exact and approximating algorithms for solving the Job Sequencing and Tool Switching Problem (SSP). Our MPCA outperforms the KTNS algorithm by at least an order of magnitude in terms of CPU times. Since all exact and heuristic algorithms for solving the SSP spend most of their CPU time on applying the KTNS algorithm we show that our MPCA solves the entire SSP on average 59 times faster for benchmark instances of D compared to current state of the art heuristics.
abstract_zh: 我们概述了一种新的最大管道构造算法 (MPCA)，其目的是减少经典的保持工具需要尽快 (KTNS) 算法的 CPU 时间。 KTNS 算法用于计算所有精确和近似算法中给定作业序列的目标函数值，以解决作业排序和工具切换问题 (SSP)。我们的 MPCA 在 CPU 时间方面比 KTNS 算法至少高出一个数量级。由于用于求解 SSP 的所有精确启发式算法将大部分 CPU 时间都花在应用 KTNS 算法上，因此我们表明，与当前最先进的启发式算法相比，我们的 MPCA 对于 D 基准实例求解整个 SSP 的速度平均快 59 倍。

AI.tldr: 提出改进的KTNS算法以解决作业排序和工具切换问题，显著减少计算时间。
AI.motivation: KTNS算法在SSP求解中占用大量CPU时间，需优化以提高整体效率。
AI.method: 设计新的最大管道构造算法（MPCA）替代传统KTNS算法，优化目标函数计算过程。
AI.result: MPCA在CPU时间上比KTNS快10倍以上，使SSP求解速度提升59倍。
AI.conclusion: MPCA显著提升SSP求解效率，为实际应用提供更优解决方案。

authors_text: Xintian Wu,Huanyu Wang,Yiming Wu,Xi Li
title: D3T-GAN: Data-Dependent Domain Transfer GANs for Few-shot Image Generation
title_zh: D3T-GAN：用于少量图像生成的数据相关域传输 GAN
abstract: As an important and challenging problem, few-shot image generation aims at generating realistic images through training a GAN model given few samples. A typical solution for few-shot generation is to transfer a well-trained GAN model from a data-rich source domain to the data-deficient target domain. In this paper, we propose a novel self-supervised transfer scheme termed D3T-GAN, addressing the cross-domain GANs transfer in few-shot image generation. Specifically, we design two individual strategies to transfer knowledge between generators and discriminators, respectively. To transfer knowledge between generators, we conduct a data-dependent transformation, which projects and reconstructs the target samples into the source generator space. Then, we perform knowledge transfer from transformed samples to generated samples. To transfer knowledge between discriminators, we design a multi-level discriminant knowledge distillation from the source discriminator to the target discriminator on both the real and fake samples. Extensive experiments show that our method improve the quality of generated images and achieves the state-of-the-art FID scores on commonly used datasets.
summary: As an important and challenging problem, few-shot image generation aims at generating realistic images through training a GAN model given few samples. A typical solution for few-shot generation is to transfer a well-trained GAN model from a data-rich source domain to the data-deficient target domain. In this paper, we propose a novel self-supervised transfer scheme termed D3T-GAN, addressing the cross-domain GANs transfer in few-shot image generation. Specifically, we design two individual strategies to transfer knowledge between generators and discriminators, respectively. To transfer knowledge between generators, we conduct a data-dependent transformation, which projects and reconstructs the target samples into the source generator space. Then, we perform knowledge transfer from transformed samples to generated samples. To transfer knowledge between discriminators, we design a multi-level discriminant knowledge distillation from the source discriminator to the target discriminator on both the real and fake samples. Extensive experiments show that our method improve the quality of generated images and achieves the state-of-the-art FID scores on commonly used datasets.
abstract_zh: 作为一个重要且具有挑战性的问题，少样本图像生成旨在通过给定少量样本训练 GAN 模型来生成逼真的图像。少样本生成的典型解决方案是将训练有素的 GAN 模型从数据丰富的源域转移到数据缺乏的目标域。在本文中，我们提出了一种称为 D3T-GAN 的新型自监督传输方案，解决少镜头图像生成中的跨域 GAN 传输问题。具体来说，我们设计了两种单独的策略，分别在生成器和鉴别器之间传递知识。为了在生成器之间传递知识，我们进行了数据相关的转换，将目标样本投影并重建到源生成器空间中。然后，我们执行从转换后的样本到生成的样本的知识迁移。为了在判别器之间传递知识，我们设计了对真样本和假样本从源判别器到目标判别器的多级判别知识蒸馏。大量实验表明，我们的方法提高了生成图像的质量，并在常用数据集上实现了最先进的 FID 分数。

AI.tldr: 本文提出D3T-GAN方法，通过领域迁移解决小样本图像生成问题，提升生成图像质量。
AI.motivation: 现有小样本图像生成方法在跨领域迁移时效果不佳，需设计有效知识传递机制以提升生成质量。
AI.method: 设计生成器间数据依赖变换策略和判别器多级知识蒸馏策略，分别实现生成器与判别器的跨领域知识迁移。
AI.result: 在常用数据集上取得最先进的FID分数，生成图像质量显著提升。
AI.conclusion: D3T-GAN通过双策略协同的领域迁移方案，有效解决了小样本图像生成中的跨领域知识传递难题。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出D3T-GAN方法，通过领域迁移解决小样本图像生成问题，提升生成图像质量。
ai_content.motivation: 现有小样本图像生成方法在跨领域迁移时效果不佳，需设计有效知识传递机制以提升生成质量。

search_text: D3T-GAN: Data-Dependent Domain Transfer GANs for Few-shot Image Generation D3T-GAN：用于少量图像生成的数据相关域传输 GAN As an important and challenging problem, few-shot image generation aims at generating realistic images through training a GAN model given few samples. A typical solution for few-shot generation is to transfer a well-trained GAN model from a data-rich source domain to the data-deficient target domain. In this paper, we propose a novel self-supervised transfer scheme termed D3T-GAN, addressing the cross-domain GANs transfer in few-shot image generation. Specifically, we design two individual strategies to transfer knowledge between generators and discriminators, respectively. To transfer knowledge between generators, we conduct a data-dependent transformation, which projects and reconstructs the target samples into the source generator space. Then, we perform knowledge transfer from transformed samples to generated samples. To transfer knowledge between discriminators, we design a multi-level discriminant knowledge distillation from the source discriminator to the target discriminator on both the real and fake samples. Extensive experiments show that our method improve the quality of generated images and achieves the state-of-the-art FID scores on commonly used datasets. 作为一个重要且具有挑战性的问题，少样本图像生成旨在通过给定少量样本训练 GAN 模型来生成逼真的图像。少样本生成的典型解决方案是将训练有素的 GAN 模型从数据丰富的源域转移到数据缺乏的目标域。在本文中，我们提出了一种称为 D3T-GAN 的新型自监督传输方案，解决少镜头图像生成中的跨域 GAN 传输问题。具体来说，我们设计了两种单独的策略，分别在生成器和鉴别器之间传递知识。为了在生成器之间传递知识，我们进行了数据相关的转换，将目标样本投影并重建到源生成器空间中。然后，我们执行从转换后的样本到生成的样本的知识迁移。为了在判别器之间传递知识，我们设计了对真样本和假样本从源判别器到目标判别器的多级判别知识蒸馏。大量实验表明，我们的方法提高了生成图像的质量，并在常用数据集上实现了最先进的 FID 分数。 本文提出D3T-GAN方法，通过领域迁移解决小样本图像生成问题，提升生成图像质量。 Xintian Wu,Huanyu Wang,Yiming Wu,Xi Li cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Simon Ståhlberg,Blai Bonet,Hector Geffner
title: Learning Generalized Policies Without Supervision Using GNNs
title_zh: 使用 GNN 在没有监督的情况下学习广义策略
comment: Proceedings of the 19th International Conference on Principles of Knowledge Representation and Reasoning (KR-22)
comments: Proceedings of the 19th International Conference on Principles of Knowledge Representation and Reasoning (KR-22)
abstract: We consider the problem of learning generalized policies for classical planning domains using graph neural networks from small instances represented in lifted STRIPS. The problem has been considered before but the proposed neural architectures are complex and the results are often mixed. In this work, we use a simple and general GNN architecture and aim at obtaining crisp experimental results and a deeper understanding: either the policy greedy in the learned value function achieves close to 100% generalization over instances larger than those used in training, or the failure must be understood, and possibly fixed, logically. For this, we exploit the relation established between the expressive power of GNNs and the $C_{2}$ fragment of first-order logic (namely, FOL with 2 variables and counting quantifiers). We find for example that domains with general policies that require more expressive features can be solved with GNNs once the states are extended with suitable "derived atoms" encoding role compositions and transitive closures that do not fit into $C_{2}$. The work follows the GNN approach for learning optimal general policies in a supervised fashion (Stahlberg, Bonet, Geffner, 2022); but the learned policies are no longer required to be optimal (which expands the scope, as many planning domains do not have general optimal policies) and are learned without supervision. Interestingly, value-based reinforcement learning methods that aim to produce optimal policies, do not always yield policies that generalize, as the goals of optimality and generality are in conflict in domains where optimal planning is NP-hard.
summary: We consider the problem of learning generalized policies for classical planning domains using graph neural networks from small instances represented in lifted STRIPS. The problem has been considered before but the proposed neural architectures are complex and the results are often mixed. In this work, we use a simple and general GNN architecture and aim at obtaining crisp experimental results and a deeper understanding: either the policy greedy in the learned value function achieves close to 100% generalization over instances larger than those used in training, or the failure must be understood, and possibly fixed, logically. For this, we exploit the relation established between the expressive power of GNNs and the $C_{2}$ fragment of first-order logic (namely, FOL with 2 variables and counting quantifiers). We find for example that domains with general policies that require more expressive features can be solved with GNNs once the states are extended with suitable "derived atoms" encoding role compositions and transitive closures that do not fit into $C_{2}$. The work follows the GNN approach for learning optimal general policies in a supervised fashion (Stahlberg, Bonet, Geffner, 2022); but the learned policies are no longer required to be optimal (which expands the scope, as many planning domains do not have general optimal policies) and are learned without supervision. Interestingly, value-based reinforcement learning methods that aim to produce optimal policies, do not always yield policies that generalize, as the goals of optimality and generality are in conflict in domains where optimal planning is NP-hard.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑使用图神经网络从提升的 STRIPS 中表示的小实例学习经典规划领域的广义策略的问题。这个问题之前已经被考虑过，但所提出的神经架构很复杂，而且结果往往是好坏参半。在这项工作中，我们使用简单而通用的 GNN 架构，旨在获得清晰的实验结果和更深入的理解：要么学习值函数中的贪婪策略在比训练中使用的实例更大的实例上实现接近 100% 的泛化，要么必须从逻辑上理解并可能修复失败。为此，我们利用 GNN 的表达能力与一阶逻辑的 $C_{2}$ 片段（即具有 2 个变量和计数量词的 FOL）之间建立的关系。例如，我们发现，一旦使用合适的“派生原子”编码角色组合和不适合 $C_{2}$ 的传递闭包来扩展状态，就可以使用 GNN 来解决具有需要更多表达特征的一般策略的域。这项工作遵循 GNN 方法，以监督方式学习最优一般策略（Stahlberg、Bonet、Geffner，2022）；但学习的策略不再需要是最优的（这扩大了范围，因为许多规划领域没有通用的最优策略）并且是在没有监督的情况下学习的。有趣的是，旨在产生最优策略的基于价值的强化学习方法并不总是产生泛化策略，因为在最优规划是 NP 困难的领域，最优性和泛化的目标是冲突的。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何利用图神经网络（GNN）在无监督条件下学习经典规划领域的通用策略，以解决小规模实例并推广到更大规模实例的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖复杂神经架构且结果不稳定，且许多规划领域不存在通用最优策略。需探索更简单方法并理解泛化限制，同时解决监督学习对最优性的依赖问题。
AI.method: 采用简单通用的GNN架构，结合C2片段（二变量计数量化一阶逻辑）的表达能力分析，通过添加编码角色组合和传递闭包的‘派生原子’扩展状态表示，实现无监督策略学习。
AI.result: 当领域策略需求符合C2片段时，策略可泛化至训练外的大规模实例；若需更高表达性，则需通过派生原子扩展状态。无监督方法扩展了传统监督学习的适用范围。
AI.conclusion: GNN可在无监督条件下学习通用策略，但需适配领域表达需求。最优性与泛化性存在冲突，无监督方法更适用于缺乏通用最优策略的复杂规划领域。

search_text: Learning Generalized Policies Without Supervision Using GNNs 使用 GNN 在没有监督的情况下学习广义策略 We consider the problem of learning generalized policies for classical planning domains using graph neural networks from small instances represented in lifted STRIPS. The problem has been considered before but the proposed neural architectures are complex and the results are often mixed. In this work, we use a simple and general GNN architecture and aim at obtaining crisp experimental results and a deeper understanding: either the policy greedy in the learned value function achieves close to 100% generalization over instances larger than those used in training, or the failure must be understood, and possibly fixed, logically. For this, we exploit the relation established between the expressive power of GNNs and the $C_{2}$ fragment of first-order logic (namely, FOL with 2 variables and counting quantifiers). We find for example that domains with general policies that require more expressive features can be solved with GNNs once the states are extended with suitable "derived atoms" encoding role compositions and transitive closures that do not fit into $C_{2}$. The work follows the GNN approach for learning optimal general policies in a supervised fashion (Stahlberg, Bonet, Geffner, 2022); but the learned policies are no longer required to be optimal (which expands the scope, as many planning domains do not have general optimal policies) and are learned without supervision. Interestingly, value-based reinforcement learning methods that aim to produce optimal policies, do not always yield policies that generalize, as the goals of optimality and generality are in conflict in domains where optimal planning is NP-hard. 我们考虑使用图神经网络从提升的 STRIPS 中表示的小实例学习经典规划领域的广义策略的问题。这个问题之前已经被考虑过，但所提出的神经架构很复杂，而且结果往往是好坏参半。在这项工作中，我们使用简单而通用的 GNN 架构，旨在获得清晰的实验结果和更深入的理解：要么学习值函数中的贪婪策略在比训练中使用的实例更大的实例上实现接近 100% 的泛化，要么必须从逻辑上理解并可能修复失败。为此，我们利用 GNN 的表达能力与一阶逻辑的 $C_{2}$ 片段（即具有 2 个变量和计数量词的 FOL）之间建立的关系。例如，我们发现，一旦使用合适的“派生原子”编码角色组合和不适合 $C_{2}$ 的传递闭包来扩展状态，就可以使用 GNN 来解决具有需要更多表达特征的一般策略的域。这项工作遵循 GNN 方法，以监督方式学习最优一般策略（Stahlberg、Bonet、Geffner，2022）；但学习的策略不再需要是最优的（这扩大了范围，因为许多规划领域没有通用的最优策略）并且是在没有监督的情况下学习的。有趣的是，旨在产生最优策略的基于价值的强化学习方法并不总是产生泛化策略，因为在最优规划是 NP 困难的领域，最优性和泛化的目标是冲突的。 本文研究如何利用图神经网络（GNN）在无监督条件下学习经典规划领域的通用策略，以解决小规模实例并推广到更大规模实例的问题。 Simon Ståhlberg,Blai Bonet,Hector Geffner cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Nathan Michlo,Devon Jarvis,Richard Klein,Steven James
title: Accounting for the Sequential Nature of States to Learn Features for Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 考虑状态的顺序性质来学习强化学习的特征
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2202.13341
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2202.13341
abstract: In this work, we investigate the properties of data that cause popular representation learning approaches to fail. In particular, we find that in environments where states do not significantly overlap, variational autoencoders (VAEs) fail to learn useful features. We demonstrate this failure in a simple gridworld domain, and then provide a solution in the form of metric learning. However, metric learning requires supervision in the form of a distance function, which is absent in reinforcement learning. To overcome this, we leverage the sequential nature of states in a replay buffer to approximate a distance metric and provide a weak supervision signal, under the assumption that temporally close states are also semantically similar. We modify a VAE with triplet loss and demonstrate that this approach is able to learn useful features for downstream tasks, without additional supervision, in environments where standard VAEs fail.
summary: In this work, we investigate the properties of data that cause popular representation learning approaches to fail. In particular, we find that in environments where states do not significantly overlap, variational autoencoders (VAEs) fail to learn useful features. We demonstrate this failure in a simple gridworld domain, and then provide a solution in the form of metric learning. However, metric learning requires supervision in the form of a distance function, which is absent in reinforcement learning. To overcome this, we leverage the sequential nature of states in a replay buffer to approximate a distance metric and provide a weak supervision signal, under the assumption that temporally close states are also semantically similar. We modify a VAE with triplet loss and demonstrate that this approach is able to learn useful features for downstream tasks, without additional supervision, in environments where standard VAEs fail.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们研究了导致流行的表示学习方法失败的数据属性。特别是，我们发现在状态没有显着重叠的环境中，变分自动编码器（VAE）无法学习有用的特征。我们在一个简单的网格世界域中演示了这种失败，然后以度量学习的形式提供了解决方案。然而，度量学习需要距离函数形式的监督，这在强化学习中是不存在的。为了克服这个问题，我们利用重播缓冲区中状态的顺序性质来近似距离度量并提供弱监督信号，假设时间上接近的状态在语义上也相似。我们修改了具有三重态损失的 VAE，并证明这种方法能够在标准 VAE 失败的环境中学习下游任务的有用特征，而无需额外的监督。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在状态不重叠的环境中变分自编码器（VAEs）学习特征失败的问题，并提出利用状态序列信息改进特征学习的方法。
AI.motivation: 传统表征学习方法如VAEs在状态不重叠的强化学习环境中无法学习有效特征，而度量学习需要监督的度量函数，但强化学习中缺乏此类监督。
AI.method: 通过利用经验回放缓冲区中状态的时序性，假设时间接近的状态语义相似，将三元组损失与VAE结合，构建弱监督信号。
AI.result: 改进后的模型在标准VAEs失败的环境中成功学习到有用特征，且无需额外监督。
AI.conclusion: 利用状态序列信息可有效提升强化学习中的特征学习能力，为无监督表征学习提供新思路。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 利用状态序列信息可有效提升强化学习中的特征学习能力，为无监督表征学习提供新思路。

tldr: 本文研究了在状态不重叠的环境中变分自编码器（VAEs）学习特征失败的问题，并提出利用状态序列信息改进特征学习的方法。
motivation: 传统表征学习方法如VAEs在状态不重叠的强化学习环境中无法学习有效特征，而度量学习需要监督的度量函数，但强化学习中缺乏此类监督。
method: 通过利用经验回放缓冲区中状态的时序性，假设时间接近的状态语义相似，将三元组损失与VAE结合，构建弱监督信号。
result: 改进后的模型在标准VAEs失败的环境中成功学习到有用特征，且无需额外监督。
conclusion: 利用状态序列信息可有效提升强化学习中的特征学习能力，为无监督表征学习提供新思路。
search_text: Accounting for the Sequential Nature of States to Learn Features for Reinforcement Learning 考虑状态的顺序性质来学习强化学习的特征 In this work, we investigate the properties of data that cause popular representation learning approaches to fail. In particular, we find that in environments where states do not significantly overlap, variational autoencoders (VAEs) fail to learn useful features. We demonstrate this failure in a simple gridworld domain, and then provide a solution in the form of metric learning. However, metric learning requires supervision in the form of a distance function, which is absent in reinforcement learning. To overcome this, we leverage the sequential nature of states in a replay buffer to approximate a distance metric and provide a weak supervision signal, under the assumption that temporally close states are also semantically similar. We modify a VAE with triplet loss and demonstrate that this approach is able to learn useful features for downstream tasks, without additional supervision, in environments where standard VAEs fail. 在这项工作中，我们研究了导致流行的表示学习方法失败的数据属性。特别是，我们发现在状态没有显着重叠的环境中，变分自动编码器（VAE）无法学习有用的特征。我们在一个简单的网格世界域中演示了这种失败，然后以度量学习的形式提供了解决方案。然而，度量学习需要距离函数形式的监督，这在强化学习中是不存在的。为了克服这个问题，我们利用重播缓冲区中状态的顺序性质来近似距离度量并提供弱监督信号，假设时间上接近的状态在语义上也相似。我们修改了具有三重态损失的 VAE，并证明这种方法能够在标准 VAE 失败的环境中学习下游任务的有用特征，而无需额外的监督。 本文研究了在状态不重叠的环境中变分自编码器（VAEs）学习特征失败的问题，并提出利用状态序列信息改进特征学习的方法。 Nathan Michlo,Devon Jarvis,Richard Klein,Steven James cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Zheyuan Li,Yingqi Liu,Xiangyu Chen,Haoming Cai,Jinjin Gu,Yu Qiao,Chao Dong
title: Blueprint Separable Residual Network for Efficient Image Super-Resolution
title_zh: 用于高效图像超分辨率的蓝图可分离残差网络
abstract: Recent advances in single image super-resolution (SISR) have achieved extraordinary performance, but the computational cost is too heavy to apply in edge devices. To alleviate this problem, many novel and effective solutions have been proposed. Convolutional neural network (CNN) with the attention mechanism has attracted increasing attention due to its efficiency and effectiveness. However, there is still redundancy in the convolution operation. In this paper, we propose Blueprint Separable Residual Network (BSRN) containing two efficient designs. One is the usage of blueprint separable convolution (BSConv), which takes place of the redundant convolution operation. The other is to enhance the model ability by introducing more effective attention modules. The experimental results show that BSRN achieves state-of-the-art performance among existing efficient SR methods. Moreover, a smaller variant of our model BSRN-S won the first place in model complexity track of NTIRE 2022 Efficient SR Challenge. The code is available at https://github.com/xiaom233/BSRN.
summary: Recent advances in single image super-resolution (SISR) have achieved extraordinary performance, but the computational cost is too heavy to apply in edge devices. To alleviate this problem, many novel and effective solutions have been proposed. Convolutional neural network (CNN) with the attention mechanism has attracted increasing attention due to its efficiency and effectiveness. However, there is still redundancy in the convolution operation. In this paper, we propose Blueprint Separable Residual Network (BSRN) containing two efficient designs. One is the usage of blueprint separable convolution (BSConv), which takes place of the redundant convolution operation. The other is to enhance the model ability by introducing more effective attention modules. The experimental results show that BSRN achieves state-of-the-art performance among existing efficient SR methods. Moreover, a smaller variant of our model BSRN-S won the first place in model complexity track of NTIRE 2022 Efficient SR Challenge. The code is available at https://github.com/xiaom233/BSRN.
abstract_zh: 单图像超分辨率（SISR）的最新进展取得了非凡的性能，但计算成本太高，无法应用于边缘设备。为了缓解这个问题，已经提出了许多新颖且有效的解决方案。具有注意力机制的卷积神经网络（CNN）因其效率和有效性而受到越来越多的关注。然而，卷积运算仍然存在冗余。在本文中，我们提出了包含两种有效设计的蓝图可分离残差网络（BSRN）。一种是使用蓝图可分离卷积（BSConv），它取代了冗余的卷积运算。二是通过引入更有效的注意力模块来增强模型能力。实验结果表明，BSRN 在现有高效 SR 方法中实现了最先进的性能。此外，我们模型 BSRN-S 的一个较小变体在 NTIRE 2022 高效 SR 挑战赛的模型复杂性赛道中获得了第一名。代码可在 https://github.com/xiaom233/BSRN 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Blueprint Separable Residual Network (BSRN)的高效图像超分辨率网络，旨在解决现有方法在边缘设备上计算成本过高的问题。
AI.motivation: 尽管单图像超分辨率(SISR)取得显著进展，但传统方法计算量大，难以在边缘设备部署。现有卷积神经网络存在冗余操作，需设计更高效的结构。
AI.method: 提出两种高效设计：1) 用蓝图分离卷积(BSConv)替代冗余卷积操作；2) 引入更有效的注意力模块增强模型能力。
AI.result: BSRN在现有高效超分方法中达到最先进性能，其轻量版本BSRN-S在NTIRE 2022高效超分挑战赛复杂度赛道夺冠，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: BSRN通过分离卷积与注意力机制的结合，在保证性能的同时显著降低计算复杂度，为边缘设备的超分应用提供了有效方案。

authors_text: Yejin Bang,Nayeon Lee,Tiezheng Yu,Leila Khalatbari,Yan Xu,Samuel Cahyawijaya,Dan Su,Bryan Wilie,Romain Barraud,Elham J. Barezi,Andrea Madotto,Hayden Kee,Pascale Fung
title: Towards Answering Open-ended Ethical Quandary Questions
title_zh: 回答开放式道德困境问题
abstract: Considerable advancements have been made in various NLP tasks based on the impressive power of large language models (LLMs) and many NLP applications are deployed in our daily lives. In this work, we challenge the capability of LLMs with the new task of Ethical Quandary Generative Question Answering. Ethical quandary questions are more challenging to address because multiple conflicting answers may exist to a single quandary. We explore the current capability of LLMs in providing an answer with a deliberative exchange of different perspectives to an ethical quandary, in the approach of Socratic philosophy, instead of providing a closed answer like an oracle. We propose a model that searches for different ethical principles applicable to the ethical quandary and generates an answer conditioned on the chosen principles through prompt-based few-shot learning. We also discuss the remaining challenges and ethical issues involved in this task and suggest the direction toward developing responsible NLP systems by incorporating human values explicitly.
summary: Considerable advancements have been made in various NLP tasks based on the impressive power of large language models (LLMs) and many NLP applications are deployed in our daily lives. In this work, we challenge the capability of LLMs with the new task of Ethical Quandary Generative Question Answering. Ethical quandary questions are more challenging to address because multiple conflicting answers may exist to a single quandary. We explore the current capability of LLMs in providing an answer with a deliberative exchange of different perspectives to an ethical quandary, in the approach of Socratic philosophy, instead of providing a closed answer like an oracle. We propose a model that searches for different ethical principles applicable to the ethical quandary and generates an answer conditioned on the chosen principles through prompt-based few-shot learning. We also discuss the remaining challenges and ethical issues involved in this task and suggest the direction toward developing responsible NLP systems by incorporating human values explicitly.
abstract_zh: 基于大语言模型 (LLM) 的强大功能，各种 NLP 任务已经取得了相当大的进步，并且许多 NLP 应用程序已部署在我们的日常生活中。在这项工作中，我们通过道德困境生成问答的新任务挑战法学硕士的能力。道德困境问题更难解决，因为一个困境可能存在多个相互矛盾的答案。我们探讨了法学硕士目前的能力，即以苏格拉底哲学的方式，通过不同观点的深思熟虑地交换道德困境来提供答案，而不是像神谕那样提供封闭的答案。我们提出了一种模型，该模型搜索适用于道德困境的不同道德原则，并通过基于提示的小样本学习生成以所选原则为条件的答案。我们还讨论了这项任务中涉及的剩余挑战和伦理问题，并提出了通过明确纳入人类价值观来开发负责任的 NLP 系统的方向。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于苏格拉底哲学方法的伦理困境生成式问答模型，通过多视角辩论而非单一答案来处理伦理问题。
AI.motivation: 现有大语言模型在伦理问题上常提供片面答案，而实际伦理困境需权衡冲突原则，需开发更符合人类价值观的问答系统。
AI.method: 通过提示工程实现少样本学习，搜索适用伦理原则并生成基于所选原则的条件化答案。
AI.result: 验证了模型在伦理困境任务中的可行性，同时指出当前在原则冲突处理和伦理风险控制方面的技术局限。
AI.conclusion: 应通过显式整合人类价值观来构建负责任的NLP系统，未来需解决伦理原则动态权衡与系统可靠性问题。

authors_text: Peter Hardy,Srinandan Dasmahapatra,Hansung Kim
title: "Teaching Independent Parts Separately" (TIPSy-GAN) : Improving Accuracy and Stability in Unsupervised Adversarial 2D to 3D Pose Estimation
title_zh: “单独教授独立部分”（TIPSy-GAN）：提高无监督对抗性 2D 到 3D 姿势估计的准确性和稳定性
comment: Paper is being replaced by another piece of similar work
comments: Paper is being replaced by another piece of similar work
abstract: We present TIPSy-GAN, a new approach to improve the accuracy and stability in unsupervised adversarial 2D to 3D human pose estimation. In our work we demonstrate that the human kinematic skeleton should not be assumed as a single spatially codependent structure; in fact, we posit when a full 2D pose is provided during training, there is an inherent bias learned where the 3D coordinate of a keypoint is spatially codependent on the 2D coordinates of all other keypoints. To investigate our hypothesis we follow previous adversarial approaches but train two generators on spatially independent parts of the kinematic skeleton, the torso and the legs. We find that improving the self-consistency cycle is key to lowering the evaluation error and therefore introduce new consistency constraints during training. A TIPSy model is produced via knowledge distillation from these generators which can predict the 3D ordinates for the entire 2D pose with improved results. Furthermore, we address an unanswered question in prior work of how long to train in a truly unsupervised scenario. We show that for two independent generators training adversarially has improved stability than that of a solo generator which collapses. TIPSy decreases the average error by 17\% when compared to that of a baseline solo generator on the Human3.6M dataset. TIPSy improves upon other unsupervised approaches while also performing strongly against supervised and weakly-supervised approaches during evaluation on both the Human3.6M and MPI-INF-3DHP datasets.
summary: We present TIPSy-GAN, a new approach to improve the accuracy and stability in unsupervised adversarial 2D to 3D human pose estimation. In our work we demonstrate that the human kinematic skeleton should not be assumed as a single spatially codependent structure; in fact, we posit when a full 2D pose is provided during training, there is an inherent bias learned where the 3D coordinate of a keypoint is spatially codependent on the 2D coordinates of all other keypoints. To investigate our hypothesis we follow previous adversarial approaches but train two generators on spatially independent parts of the kinematic skeleton, the torso and the legs. We find that improving the self-consistency cycle is key to lowering the evaluation error and therefore introduce new consistency constraints during training. A TIPSy model is produced via knowledge distillation from these generators which can predict the 3D ordinates for the entire 2D pose with improved results. Furthermore, we address an unanswered question in prior work of how long to train in a truly unsupervised scenario. We show that for two independent generators training adversarially has improved stability than that of a solo generator which collapses. TIPSy decreases the average error by 17\% when compared to that of a baseline solo generator on the Human3.6M dataset. TIPSy improves upon other unsupervised approaches while also performing strongly against supervised and weakly-supervised approaches during evaluation on both the Human3.6M and MPI-INF-3DHP datasets.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 TIPSy-GAN，这是一种提高无监督对抗 2D 到 3D 人体姿态估计的准确性和稳定性的新方法。在我们的工作中，我们证明了人体运动骨架不应被假设为单个空间相互依赖的结构；事实上，我们假设在训练期间提供完整的 2D 姿势时，会学习到固有的偏差，其中关键点的 3D 坐标在空间上与所有其他关键点的 2D 坐标相互依赖。为了研究我们的假设，我们遵循之前的对抗方法，但在运动骨架的空间独立部分（躯干和腿部）上训练两个生成器。我们发现改善自我一致性循环是降低评估误差的关键，因此在训练期间引入新的一致性约束。 TIPSy 模型是通过这些生成器的知识蒸馏生成的，它可以预测整个 2D 姿势的 3D 坐标，并获得改进的结果。此外，我们还解决了之前工作中一个悬而未决的问题，即在真正无人监督的场景中训练多长时间。我们表明，对于两个独立的生成器来说，对抗性训练比单个生成器崩溃的稳定性更高。与 Human3.6M 数据集上的基线单独生成器相比，TIPSy 的平均误差降低了 17%。 TIPSy 改进了其他无监督方法，同时在 Human3.6M 和 MPI-INF-3DHP 数据集评估期间也比监督和弱监督方法表现出色。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TIPSy-GAN方法，通过分离训练人体骨骼的独立部分（躯干和腿部）以提升无监督对抗2D到3D姿态估计的准确性和稳定性。
AI.motivation: 传统方法假设人体骨骼为整体空间依赖结构，但作者认为2D姿态中各关键点的3D坐标存在固有偏差。通过独立训练骨骼部分可降低这种偏差，并解决无监督训练中生成器崩溃的问题。
AI.method: 采用两个独立生成器分别训练躯干和腿部，引入自一致性约束优化训练过程，通过知识蒸馏整合生成器结果。对比单生成器训练，验证多生成器对抗训练的稳定性优势。
AI.result: 在Human3.6M数据集上平均误差降低17%，在Human3.6M和MPI-INF-3DHP数据集上优于其他无监督、监督及弱监督方法。
AI.conclusion: 分离训练骨骼独立部分并强化一致性约束能有效提升无监督2D到3D姿态估计性能，为对抗生成模型的稳定性提供了新思路。

authors_text: Xuesong Chen,Shaoshuai Shi,Benjin Zhu,Ka Chun Cheung,Hang Xu,Hongsheng Li
title: MPPNet: Multi-Frame Feature Intertwining with Proxy Points for 3D Temporal Object Detection
title_zh: MPPNet：多帧特征与代理点交织，用于 3D 时间对象检测
abstract: Accurate and reliable 3D detection is vital for many applications including autonomous driving vehicles and service robots. In this paper, we present a flexible and high-performance 3D detection framework, named MPPNet, for 3D temporal object detection with point cloud sequences. We propose a novel three-hierarchy framework with proxy points for multi-frame feature encoding and interactions to achieve better detection. The three hierarchies conduct per-frame feature encoding, short-clip feature fusion, and whole-sequence feature aggregation, respectively. To enable processing long-sequence point clouds with reasonable computational resources, intra-group feature mixing and inter-group feature attention are proposed to form the second and third feature encoding hierarchies, which are recurrently applied for aggregating multi-frame trajectory features. The proxy points not only act as consistent object representations for each frame, but also serve as the courier to facilitate feature interaction between frames. The experiments on large Waymo Open dataset show that our approach outperforms state-of-the-art methods with large margins when applied to both short (e.g., 4-frame) and long (e.g., 16-frame) point cloud sequences. Code is available at https://github.com/open-mmlab/OpenPCDet.
summary: Accurate and reliable 3D detection is vital for many applications including autonomous driving vehicles and service robots. In this paper, we present a flexible and high-performance 3D detection framework, named MPPNet, for 3D temporal object detection with point cloud sequences. We propose a novel three-hierarchy framework with proxy points for multi-frame feature encoding and interactions to achieve better detection. The three hierarchies conduct per-frame feature encoding, short-clip feature fusion, and whole-sequence feature aggregation, respectively. To enable processing long-sequence point clouds with reasonable computational resources, intra-group feature mixing and inter-group feature attention are proposed to form the second and third feature encoding hierarchies, which are recurrently applied for aggregating multi-frame trajectory features. The proxy points not only act as consistent object representations for each frame, but also serve as the courier to facilitate feature interaction between frames. The experiments on large Waymo Open dataset show that our approach outperforms state-of-the-art methods with large margins when applied to both short (e.g., 4-frame) and long (e.g., 16-frame) point cloud sequences. Code is available at https://github.com/open-mmlab/OpenPCDet.
abstract_zh: 准确可靠的 3D 检测对于自动驾驶车辆和服务机器人等许多应用至关重要。在本文中，我们提出了一种灵活且高性能的 3D 检测框架，名为 MPPNet，用于使用点云序列进行 3D 时间对象检测。我们提出了一种新颖的三层次框架，具有用于多帧特征编码和交互的代理点，以实现更好的检测。这三个层次分别进行每帧特征编码、短剪辑特征融合和全序列特征聚合。为了能够利用合理的计算资源处理长序列点云，提出了组内特征混合和组间特征注意以形成第二和第三特征编码层次结构，这些层次结构被循环地应用于聚合多帧轨迹特征。代理点不仅充当每个帧的一致对象表示，而且还充当促进帧之间特征交互的信使。在大型 Waymo 开放数据集上进行的实验表明，当应用于短（例如 4 帧）和长（例如 16 帧）点云序列时，我们的方法在大范围内优于最先进的方法。代码可在 https://github.com/open-mmlab/OpenPCDet 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MPPNet框架，通过多帧特征交织与代理点机制，实现点云序列的高效三维时序目标检测。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理长序列点云时计算资源消耗大，且难以有效融合多帧特征，需设计兼顾效率与性能的时序检测框架。
AI.method: 构建三层框架：单帧特征编码、短时序特征融合、全序列特征聚合，结合组内特征混合与组间注意力机制，并利用代理点实现跨帧特征交互。
AI.result: 在Waymo数据集上，MPPNet在4帧和16帧序列检测任务中均显著优于现有方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: MPPNet通过代理点与分层特征交互机制，有效解决了长序列点云检测的计算与性能矛盾，为时序三维检测提供了新思路。

authors_text: Quynh Nguyen,Dac H. Nguyen,Son T. Huynh,Hoa K. Dam,Binh T. Nguyen
title: TaDeR: A New Task Dependency Recommendation for Project Management Platform
title_zh: TaDeR：项目管理平台的新任务依赖关系建议
abstract: Many startups and companies worldwide have been using project management software and tools to monitor, track and manage their projects. For software projects, the number of tasks from the beginning to the end is quite a large number that sometimes takes a lot of time and effort to search and link the current task to a group of previous ones for further references. This paper proposes an efficient task dependency recommendation algorithm to suggest tasks dependent on a given task that the user has just created. We present an efficient feature engineering step and construct a deep neural network to this aim. We performed extensive experiments on two different large projects (MDLSITE from moodle.org and FLUME from apache.org) to find the best features in 28 combinations of features and the best performance model using two embedding methods (GloVe and FastText). We consider three types of models (GRU, CNN, LSTM) using Accuracy@K, MRR@K, and Recall@K (where K = 1, 2, 3, and 5) and baseline models using traditional methods: TF-IDF with various matching score calculating such as cosine similarity, Euclidean distance, Manhattan distance, and Chebyshev distance. After many experiments, the GloVe Embedding and CNN model reached the best result in our dataset, so we chose this model as our proposed method. In addition, adding the time filter in the post-processing step can significantly improve the recommendation system's performance. The experimental results show that our proposed method can reach 0.2335 in Accuracy@1 and MRR@1 and 0.2011 in Recall@1 of dataset FLUME. With the MDLSITE dataset, we obtained 0.1258 in Accuracy@1 and MRR@1 and 0.1141 in Recall@1. In the top 5, our model reached 0.3040 in Accuracy@5, 0.2563 MRR@5, and 0.2651 Recall@5 in FLUME. In the MDLSITE dataset, our model got 0.5270 Accuracy@5, 0.2689 MRR@5, and 0.2651 Recall@5.
summary: Many startups and companies worldwide have been using project management software and tools to monitor, track and manage their projects. For software projects, the number of tasks from the beginning to the end is quite a large number that sometimes takes a lot of time and effort to search and link the current task to a group of previous ones for further references. This paper proposes an efficient task dependency recommendation algorithm to suggest tasks dependent on a given task that the user has just created. We present an efficient feature engineering step and construct a deep neural network to this aim. We performed extensive experiments on two different large projects (MDLSITE from moodle.org and FLUME from apache.org) to find the best features in 28 combinations of features and the best performance model using two embedding methods (GloVe and FastText). We consider three types of models (GRU, CNN, LSTM) using Accuracy@K, MRR@K, and Recall@K (where K = 1, 2, 3, and 5) and baseline models using traditional methods: TF-IDF with various matching score calculating such as cosine similarity, Euclidean distance, Manhattan distance, and Chebyshev distance. After many experiments, the GloVe Embedding and CNN model reached the best result in our dataset, so we chose this model as our proposed method. In addition, adding the time filter in the post-processing step can significantly improve the recommendation system's performance. The experimental results show that our proposed method can reach 0.2335 in Accuracy@1 and MRR@1 and 0.2011 in Recall@1 of dataset FLUME. With the MDLSITE dataset, we obtained 0.1258 in Accuracy@1 and MRR@1 and 0.1141 in Recall@1. In the top 5, our model reached 0.3040 in Accuracy@5, 0.2563 MRR@5, and 0.2651 Recall@5 in FLUME. In the MDLSITE dataset, our model got 0.5270 Accuracy@5, 0.2689 MRR@5, and 0.2651 Recall@5.
abstract_zh: 全球许多初创公司和公司一直在使用项目管理软件和工具来监控、跟踪和管理他们的项目。对于软件项目来说，从开始到结束的任务数量相当大，有时需要花费大量时间和精力来搜索当前任务并将其链接到一组先前的任务以供进一步参考。本文提出了一种有效的任务依赖性推荐算法来建议依赖于用户刚刚创建的给定任务的任务。我们提出了一个有效的特征工程步骤，并为此构建了一个深度神经网络。我们对两个不同的大型项目（moodle.org 的 MDLSITE 和 apache.org 的 FLUME）进行了广泛的实验，以找到 28 种特征组合中的最佳特征以及使用两种嵌入方法（GloVe 和 FastText）的最佳性能模型。我们考虑使用 Accuracy@K、MRR@K 和 Recall@K（其中 K = 1、2、3 和 5）的三种类型的模型（GRU、CNN、LSTM）和使用传统方法的基线模型：具有各种匹配分数计算的 TF-IDF，例如余弦相似度、欧几里得距离、曼哈顿距离和切比雪夫距离。经过多次实验，GloVe Embedding 和 CNN 模型在我们的数据集中达到了最佳结果，因此我们选择该模型作为我们提出的方法。此外，在后处理步骤中添加时间过滤器可以显着提高推荐系统的性能。实验结果表明，我们提出的方法在数据集FLUME的Accuracy@1和MRR@1上可以达到0.2335，在Recall@1上可以达到0.2011。通过 MDLSITE 数据集，我们在 Accuracy@1 和 MRR@1 中获得 0.1258，在 Recall@1 中获得 0.1141。在前 5 名中，我们的模型在 FLUME 中的 Accuracy@5 达到 0.3040、MRR@5 达到 0.2563、Recall@5 达到 0.2651。在 MDLSITE 数据集中，我们的模型获得了 0.5270 Accuracy@5、0.2689 MRR@5 和 0.2651 Recall@5。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为TaDeR的任务依赖推荐算法，用于项目管理平台中高效推荐与当前任务相关的先前任务。
AI.motivation: 软件项目中任务数量庞大，手动搜索和关联任务依赖关系耗时费力，需自动化方法提升效率。
AI.method: 通过特征工程构建深度神经网络，结合GloVe和FastText嵌入方法，对比GRU、CNN、LSTM等模型，并引入时间过滤器优化推荐结果。
AI.result: 在FLUME数据集上，Accuracy@1达0.2335，Recall@5达0.2651；在MDLSITE数据集上，Accuracy@5达0.5270，验证了GloVe+CNN模型的有效性。
AI.conclusion: GloVe嵌入与CNN模型结合并加入时间过滤器的推荐方法显著优于传统TF-IDF等基线模型，有效提升任务依赖推荐性能。

authors_text: Daniel Adolfsson,Manuel Castellano-Quero,Martin Magnusson,Achim J. Lilienthal,Henrik Andreasson
title: CorAl: Introspection for Robust Radar and Lidar Perception in Diverse Environments Using Differential Entropy
title_zh: CorAl：使用微分熵在不同环境中进行鲁棒雷达和激光雷达感知的内省
comment: Accepted for Robotics and Autonomous Systems, Selected papers from the 9th European Conference on Mobile Robots (ECMR 2021) https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S0921889022000768. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2109.09820
comments: Accepted for Robotics and Autonomous Systems, Selected papers from the 9th European Conference on Mobile Robots (ECMR 2021) https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S0921889022000768. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2109.09820
abstract: Robust perception is an essential component to enable long-term operation of mobile robots. It depends on failure resilience through reliable sensor data and preprocessing, as well as failure awareness through introspection, for example the ability to self-assess localization performance. This paper presents CorAl: a principled, intuitive, and generalizable method to measure the quality of alignment between pairs of point clouds, which learns to detect alignment errors in a self-supervised manner. CorAl compares the differential entropy in the point clouds separately with the entropy in their union to account for entropy inherent to the scene. By making use of dual entropy measurements, we obtain a quality metric that is highly sensitive to small alignment errors and still generalizes well to unseen environments. In this work, we extend our previous work on lidar-only CorAl to radar data by proposing a two-stage filtering technique that produces high-quality point clouds from noisy radar scans. Thus we target robust perception in two ways: by introducing a method that introspectively assesses alignment quality, and applying it to an inherently robust sensor modality. We show that our filtering technique combined with CorAl can be applied to the problem of alignment classification, and that it detects small alignment errors in urban settings with up to 98% accuracy, and with up to 96% if trained only in a different environment. Our lidar and radar experiments demonstrate that CorAl outperforms previous methods both on the ETH lidar benchmark, which includes several indoor and outdoor environments, and the large-scale Oxford and MulRan radar data sets for urban traffic scenarios The results also demonstrate that CorAl generalizes very well across substantially different environments without the need of retraining.
summary: Robust perception is an essential component to enable long-term operation of mobile robots. It depends on failure resilience through reliable sensor data and preprocessing, as well as failure awareness through introspection, for example the ability to self-assess localization performance. This paper presents CorAl: a principled, intuitive, and generalizable method to measure the quality of alignment between pairs of point clouds, which learns to detect alignment errors in a self-supervised manner. CorAl compares the differential entropy in the point clouds separately with the entropy in their union to account for entropy inherent to the scene. By making use of dual entropy measurements, we obtain a quality metric that is highly sensitive to small alignment errors and still generalizes well to unseen environments. In this work, we extend our previous work on lidar-only CorAl to radar data by proposing a two-stage filtering technique that produces high-quality point clouds from noisy radar scans. Thus we target robust perception in two ways: by introducing a method that introspectively assesses alignment quality, and applying it to an inherently robust sensor modality. We show that our filtering technique combined with CorAl can be applied to the problem of alignment classification, and that it detects small alignment errors in urban settings with up to 98% accuracy, and with up to 96% if trained only in a different environment. Our lidar and radar experiments demonstrate that CorAl outperforms previous methods both on the ETH lidar benchmark, which includes several indoor and outdoor environments, and the large-scale Oxford and MulRan radar data sets for urban traffic scenarios The results also demonstrate that CorAl generalizes very well across substantially different environments without the need of retraining.
abstract_zh: 鲁棒的感知是移动机器人长期运行的重要组成部分。它取决于通过可靠的传感器数据和预处理实现的故障恢复能力，以及通过内省实现的故障意识，例如自我评估定位性能的能力。本文提出了 CorAl：一种原理性、直观且可推广的方法，用于测量点云对之间的对齐质量，它学会以自我监督的方式检测对齐错误。 CorAl 将点云中的微分熵分别与它们并集中的熵进行比较，以解释场景固有的熵。通过使用双熵测量，我们获得了一个质量度量，该度量对小对齐误差高度敏感，并且仍然可以很好地推广到不可见的环境。在这项工作中，我们通过提出一种两级滤波技术，从噪声雷达扫描中生成高质量的点云，将之前仅使用激光雷达的 CorAl 工作扩展到雷达数据。因此，我们以两种方式瞄准稳健的感知：引入一种内省评估对准质量的方法，并将其应用于本质上稳健的传感器模态。我们证明，我们的过滤技术与 CorAl 相结合可以应用于对齐分类问题，并且它可以检测城市环境中的小对齐错误，准确率高达 98%，如果仅在不同的环境中训练，准确率高达 96%。我们的激光雷达和雷达实验表明，CorAl 在 ETH 激光雷达基准（包括多个室内和室外环境）以及针对城市交通场景的大规模 Oxford 和 MulRan 雷达数据集上均优于以前的方法。结果还表明，CorAl 在不同的环境中都能很好地泛化，无需重新训练。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CorAl方法，通过微分熵测量点云对齐质量，提升雷达和激光雷达在复杂环境中的感知鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有传感器感知系统在复杂或未见过的环境中易出现对齐错误，需通过自省机制提升故障意识和鲁棒性。
AI.method: 基于微分熵比较点云及其并集的熵值，结合自监督学习检测对齐误差；针对雷达数据设计两阶段过滤技术生成高质量点云。
AI.result: 在城市场景中检测对齐误差准确率达98%，跨环境训练下仍达96%；在ETH、Oxford等数据集上优于现有方法且无需重新训练。
AI.conclusion: CorAl通过熵度量与传感器适配技术，有效提升了多模态感知的鲁棒性与环境泛化能力，具有实际应用价值。

Thus we target robust perception in two ways: by introducing a method that introspectively assesses alignment quality, and applying it to an inherently robust sensor modality. We show that our filtering technique combined with CorAl can be applied to the problem of alignment classification, and that it detects small alignment errors in urban settings with up to 98% accuracy, and with up to 96% if trained only in a different environment. Our lidar and radar experiments demonstrate that CorAl outperforms previous methods both on the ETH lidar benchmark, which includes several indoor and outdoor environments, and the large-scale Oxford and MulRan radar data sets for urban traffic scenarios The results also demonstrate that CorAl generalizes very well across substantially different environments without the need of retraining. 鲁棒的感知是移动机器人长期运行的重要组成部分。它取决于通过可靠的传感器数据和预处理实现的故障恢复能力，以及通过内省实现的故障意识，例如自我评估定位性能的能力。本文提出了 CorAl：一种原理性、直观且可推广的方法，用于测量点云对之间的对齐质量，它学会以自我监督的方式检测对齐错误。 CorAl 将点云中的微分熵分别与它们并集中的熵进行比较，以解释场景固有的熵。通过使用双熵测量，我们获得了一个质量度量，该度量对小对齐误差高度敏感，并且仍然可以很好地推广到不可见的环境。在这项工作中，我们通过提出一种两级滤波技术，从噪声雷达扫描中生成高质量的点云，将之前仅使用激光雷达的 CorAl 工作扩展到雷达数据。因此，我们以两种方式瞄准稳健的感知：引入一种内省评估对准质量的方法，并将其应用于本质上稳健的传感器模态。我们证明，我们的过滤技术与 CorAl 相结合可以应用于对齐分类问题，并且它可以检测城市环境中的小对齐错误，准确率高达 98%，如果仅在不同的环境中训练，准确率高达 96%。我们的激光雷达和雷达实验表明，CorAl 在 ETH 激光雷达基准（包括多个室内和室外环境）以及针对城市交通场景的大规模 Oxford 和 MulRan 雷达数据集上均优于以前的方法。结果还表明，CorAl 在不同的环境中都能很好地泛化，无需重新训练。 本文提出CorAl方法，通过微分熵测量点云对齐质量，提升雷达和激光雷达在复杂环境中的感知鲁棒性。 Daniel Adolfsson,Manuel Castellano-Quero,Martin Magnusson,Achim J. Lilienthal,Henrik Andreasson cs.RO

authors_text: S. H. Shabbeer Basha,Debapriya Tula,Sravan Kumar Vinakota,Shiv Ram Dubey
title: Target Aware Network Architecture Search and Compression for Efficient Knowledge Transfer
title_zh: 目标感知网络架构搜索和压缩，实现高效知识传输
comment: This paper is accepted for publication in Multimedia Systems Journal
comments: This paper is accepted for publication in Multimedia Systems Journal
abstract: Transfer Learning enables Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) to acquire knowledge from a source domain and transfer it to a target domain, where collecting large-scale annotated examples is time-consuming and expensive. Conventionally, while transferring the knowledge learned from one task to another task, the deeper layers of a pre-trained CNN are finetuned over the target dataset. However, these layers are originally designed for the source task which may be over-parameterized for the target task. Thus, finetuning these layers over the target dataset may affect the generalization ability of the CNN due to high network complexity. To tackle this problem, we propose a two-stage framework called TASCNet which enables efficient knowledge transfer. In the first stage, the configuration of the deeper layers is learned automatically and finetuned over the target dataset. Later, in the second stage, the redundant filters are pruned from the fine-tuned CNN to decrease the network's complexity for the target task while preserving the performance. This two-stage mechanism finds a compact version of the pre-trained CNN with optimal structure (number of filters in a convolutional layer, number of neurons in a dense layer, and so on) from the hypothesis space. The efficacy of the proposed method is evaluated using VGG-16, ResNet-50, and DenseNet-121 on CalTech-101, CalTech-256, and Stanford Dogs datasets. Similar to computer vision tasks, we have also conducted experiments on Movie Review Sentiment Analysis task. The proposed TASCNet reduces the computational complexity of pre-trained CNNs over the target task by reducing both trainable parameters and FLOPs which enables resource-efficient knowledge transfer. The source code is available at: https://github.com/Debapriya-Tula/TASCNet.

Conventionally, while transferring the knowledge learned from one task to another task, the deeper layers of a pre-trained CNN are finetuned over the target dataset. However, these layers are originally designed for the source task which may be over-parameterized for the target task. Thus, finetuning these layers over the target dataset may affect the generalization ability of the CNN due to high network complexity. To tackle this problem, we propose a two-stage framework called TASCNet which enables efficient knowledge transfer. In the first stage, the configuration of the deeper layers is learned automatically and finetuned over the target dataset. Later, in the second stage, the redundant filters are pruned from the fine-tuned CNN to decrease the network's complexity for the target task while preserving the performance. This two-stage mechanism finds a compact version of the pre-trained CNN with optimal structure (number of filters in a convolutional layer, number of neurons in a dense layer, and so on) from the hypothesis space. The efficacy of the proposed method is evaluated using VGG-16, ResNet-50, and DenseNet-121 on CalTech-101, CalTech-256, and Stanford Dogs datasets. Similar to computer vision tasks, we have also conducted experiments on Movie Review Sentiment Analysis task. The proposed TASCNet reduces the computational complexity of pre-trained CNNs over the target task by reducing both trainable parameters and FLOPs which enables resource-efficient knowledge transfer. The source code is available at: https://github.com/Debapriya-Tula/TASCNet.
abstract_zh: 迁移学习使卷积神经网络 (CNN) 能够从源域获取知识并将其迁移到目标域，而在目标域中收集大规模带注释的示例既耗时又昂贵。传统上，当将从一项任务学到的知识转移到另一项任务时，预训练的 CNN 的更深层次会在目标数据集上进行微调。然而，这些层最初是为源任务设计的，可能会针对目标任务过度参数化。因此，由于网络复杂性较高，在目标数据集上微调这些层可能会影响 CNN 的泛化能力。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一个名为 TASCNet 的两阶段框架，它可以实现高效的知识转移。在第一阶段，更深层的配置是自动学习的，并在目标数据集上进行微调。随后，在第二阶段，从微调后的 CNN 中修剪冗余滤波器，以降低目标任务的网络复杂性，同时保持性能。这种两阶段机制从假设空间中找到具有最佳结构（卷积层中的滤波器数量、密集层中的神经元数量等）的预训练 CNN 的紧凑版本。使用VGG-16、ResNet-50和DenseNet-121在CalTech-101、CalTech-256和Stanford Dogs数据集上评估所提出方法的有效性。与计算机视觉任务类似，我们也对电影评论情感分析任务进行了实验。所提出的 TASCNet 通过减少可训练参数和 FLOP 来降低目标任务上预训练 CNN 的计算复杂性，从而实现资源高效的知识转移。源代码位于：https://github.com/Debapriya-Tula/TASCNet。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为TASCNet的两阶段框架，用于在目标任务中高效压缩预训练CNN结构，以提升知识迁移效率。
AI.motivation: 传统知识迁移方法通过微调源任务预训练的深层网络参数，可能导致网络复杂度过高，影响目标任务的泛化能力。
AI.method: TASCNet分两阶段优化：第一阶段自动学习并微调深层网络结构配置；第二阶段通过剪枝冗余滤波器降低网络复杂度，从假设空间中寻找目标任务的最优结构。
AI.result: 在CalTech、Stanford Dogs等数据集及电影评论情感分析任务中，TASCNet显著减少参数量和FLOPs，验证了其资源高效的知识迁移能力。
AI.conclusion: TASCNet通过结构化压缩有效平衡了网络复杂度与性能，为跨领域知识迁移提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Son T. Huynh,Nhi Dang,Dac H. Nguyen,Phong T. Huynh,Binh T. Nguyen
title: FPSRS: A Fusion Approach for Paper Submission Recommendation System
title_zh: FPSRS：论文提交推荐系统的融合方法
abstract: Recommender systems have been increasingly popular in entertainment and consumption and are evident in academics, especially for applications that suggest submitting scientific articles to scientists. However, because of the various acceptance rates, impact factors, and rankings in different publishers, searching for a proper venue or journal to submit a scientific work usually takes a lot of time and effort. In this paper, we aim to present two newer approaches extended from our paper [13] presented at the conference IAE/AIE 2021 by employing RNN structures besides using Conv1D. In addition, we also introduce a new method, namely DistilBertAims, using DistillBert for two cases of uppercase and lower-case words to vectorize features such as Title, Abstract, and Keywords, and then use Conv1d to perform feature extraction. Furthermore, we propose a new calculation method for similarity score for Aim & Scope with other features; this helps keep the weights of similarity score calculation continuously updated and then continue to fit more data. The experimental results show that the second approach could obtain a better performance, which is 62.46% and 12.44% higher than the best of the previous study [13] in terms of the Top 1 accuracy.
summary: Recommender systems have been increasingly popular in entertainment and consumption and are evident in academics, especially for applications that suggest submitting scientific articles to scientists. However, because of the various acceptance rates, impact factors, and rankings in different publishers, searching for a proper venue or journal to submit a scientific work usually takes a lot of time and effort. In this paper, we aim to present two newer approaches extended from our paper [13] presented at the conference IAE/AIE 2021 by employing RNN structures besides using Conv1D. In addition, we also introduce a new method, namely DistilBertAims, using DistillBert for two cases of uppercase and lower-case words to vectorize features such as Title, Abstract, and Keywords, and then use Conv1d to perform feature extraction. Furthermore, we propose a new calculation method for similarity score for Aim & Scope with other features; this helps keep the weights of similarity score calculation continuously updated and then continue to fit more data. The experimental results show that the second approach could obtain a better performance, which is 62.46% and 12.44% higher than the best of the previous study [13] in terms of the Top 1 accuracy.
abstract_zh: 推荐系统在娱乐和消费领域越来越受欢迎，并且在学术领域也很明显，特别是对于建议向科学家提交科学文章的应用程序。然而，由于不同出版商的接受率、影响因子和排名各不相同，寻找合适的地点或期刊来提交科学作品通常需要花费大量的时间和精力。在本文中，我们的目标是提出两种更新的方法，这些方法是从我们在 IAE/AIE 2021 会议上发表的论文 [13] 中扩展出来的，除了使用 Conv1D 之外，还采用了 RNN 结构。此外，我们还引入了一种新方法，即DistilBertAims，利用DistillBert针对大小写单词两种情况对Title、Abstract、Keywords等特征进行向量化，然后使用Conv1d进行特征提取。此外，我们提出了一种新的 Aim & Scope 与其他特征相似度得分的计算方法；这有助于保持相似度得分计算的权重不断更新，然后继续拟合更多的数据。实验结果表明，第二种方法可以获得更好的性能，在Top 1准确率方面比之前研究[13]的最佳方法高出62.46%和12.44%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FPSRS系统，通过融合RNN、Conv1D和DistilBertAims方法，改进学术论文投稿推荐系统的性能。
AI.motivation: 由于不同期刊的接受率、影响因子和排名差异，研究人员难以高效选择合适的投稿目标，传统方法存在性能局限。
AI.method: 在原有研究基础上引入RNN与Conv1D结构，设计DistilBertAims方法利用小写和大写文本向量化标题、摘要等特征，并提出动态更新相似度计算权重的新机制。
AI.result: 第二方法在Top 1准确率上较前作提升62.46%和12.44%，验证了改进的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 融合多模型架构与动态权重机制显著提升了推荐系统性能，为学术投稿推荐提供了新思路。

In addition, we also introduce a new method, namely DistilBertAims, using DistillBert for two cases of uppercase and lower-case words to vectorize features such as Title, Abstract, and Keywords, and then use Conv1d to perform feature extraction. Furthermore, we propose a new calculation method for similarity score for Aim & Scope with other features; this helps keep the weights of similarity score calculation continuously updated and then continue to fit more data. The experimental results show that the second approach could obtain a better performance, which is 62.46% and 12.44% higher than the best of the previous study [13] in terms of the Top 1 accuracy. 推荐系统在娱乐和消费领域越来越受欢迎，并且在学术领域也很明显，特别是对于建议向科学家提交科学文章的应用程序。然而，由于不同出版商的接受率、影响因子和排名各不相同，寻找合适的地点或期刊来提交科学作品通常需要花费大量的时间和精力。在本文中，我们的目标是提出两种更新的方法，这些方法是从我们在 IAE/AIE 2021 会议上发表的论文 [13] 中扩展出来的，除了使用 Conv1D 之外，还采用了 RNN 结构。此外，我们还引入了一种新方法，即DistilBertAims，利用DistillBert针对大小写单词两种情况对Title、Abstract、Keywords等特征进行向量化，然后使用Conv1d进行特征提取。此外，我们提出了一种新的 Aim & Scope 与其他特征相似度得分的计算方法；这有助于保持相似度得分计算的权重不断更新，然后继续拟合更多的数据。实验结果表明，第二种方法可以获得更好的性能，在Top 1准确率方面比之前研究[13]的最佳方法高出62.46%和12.44%。 本文提出FPSRS系统，通过融合RNN、Conv1D和DistilBertAims方法，改进学术论文投稿推荐系统的性能。 Son T. Huynh,Nhi Dang,Dac H. Nguyen,Phong T. Huynh,Binh T. Nguyen cs.IR,cs.CV

authors_text: Yiwen Chen,Sheng Guo,Zedong Zhang,Lei Zhou,Xian Yao Ng,Marcelo H. Ang Jr
title: Economical Precise Manipulation and Auto Eye-Hand Coordination with Binocular Visual Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 经济的精确操纵和自动眼手协调与双目视觉强化学习
abstract: Precision robotic manipulation tasks (insertion, screwing, precisely pick, precisely place) are required in many scenarios. Previous methods achieved good performance on such manipulation tasks. However, such methods typically require tedious calibration or expensive sensors. 3D/RGB-D cameras and torque/force sensors add to the cost of the robotic application and may not always be economical. In this work, we aim to solve these but using only weak-calibrated and low-cost webcams. We propose Binocular Alignment Learning (BAL), which could automatically learn the eye-hand coordination and points alignment capabilities to solve the four tasks. Our work focuses on working with unknown eye-hand coordination and proposes different ways of performing eye-in-hand camera calibration automatically. The algorithm was trained in simulation and used a practical pipeline to achieve sim2real and test it on the real robot. Our method achieves a competitively good result with minimal cost on the four tasks.
summary: Precision robotic manipulation tasks (insertion, screwing, precisely pick, precisely place) are required in many scenarios. Previous methods achieved good performance on such manipulation tasks. However, such methods typically require tedious calibration or expensive sensors. 3D/RGB-D cameras and torque/force sensors add to the cost of the robotic application and may not always be economical. In this work, we aim to solve these but using only weak-calibrated and low-cost webcams. We propose Binocular Alignment Learning (BAL), which could automatically learn the eye-hand coordination and points alignment capabilities to solve the four tasks. Our work focuses on working with unknown eye-hand coordination and proposes different ways of performing eye-in-hand camera calibration automatically. The algorithm was trained in simulation and used a practical pipeline to achieve sim2real and test it on the real robot. Our method achieves a competitively good result with minimal cost on the four tasks.
abstract_zh: 许多场景都需要精密的机器人操作任务（插入、拧紧、精确拾取、精确放置）。以前的方法在此类操作任务上取得了良好的性能。然而，此类方法通常需要繁琐的校准或昂贵的传感器。 3D/RGB-D 相机和扭矩/力传感器会增加机器人应用的成本，并且可能并不总是经济的。在这项工作中，我们的目标是解决这些问题，但仅使用弱校准和低成本的网络摄像头。我们提出了双目对齐学习（BAL），它可以自动学习眼手协调和点对齐能力来解决这四个任务。我们的工作重点是处理未知的眼手协调，并提出自动执行眼手相机校准的不同方法。该算法在仿真中进行训练，并使用实际管道实现 sim2real 并在真实机器人上进行测试。我们的方法在四项任务上以最低的成本取得了具有竞争力的良好结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于双目视觉强化学习的经济型精确机械臂操作方法，无需昂贵传感器即可完成插拔、拧螺丝等精细任务。
AI.motivation: 传统精密机械臂操作方法依赖高成本的3D/RGB-D摄像头和力传感器，且需要繁琐校准，导致应用成本过高。
AI.method: 提出双目对齐学习（BAL）算法，通过模拟训练实现眼手协调自动校准，结合sim2real技术在真实机械臂上验证，无需预先标定。
AI.result: 在四个精细操作任务中，该方法以低成本硬件实现了与传统方法相当的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: 本文证明了通过双目视觉强化学习可实现经济高效的机械臂精确操作，为低成本工业自动化提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Junjia Liu,Yiting Chen,Zhipeng Dong,Shixiong Wang,Sylvain Calinon,Miao Li,Fei Chen
title: Robot Cooking with Stir-fry: Bimanual Non-prehensile Manipulation of Semi-fluid Objects
title_zh: 机器人炒菜：半流体物体的双手非抓握操纵
abstract: This letter describes an approach to achieve well-known Chinese cooking art stir-fry on a bimanual robot system. Stir-fry requires a sequence of highly dynamic coordinated movements, which is usually difficult to learn for a chef, let alone transfer to robots. In this letter, we define a canonical stir-fry movement, and then propose a decoupled framework for learning this deformable object manipulation from human demonstration. First, the dual arms of the robot are decoupled into different roles (a leader and follower) and learned with classical and neural network-based methods separately, then the bimanual task is transformed into a coordination problem. To obtain general bimanual coordination, we secondly propose a Graph and Transformer based model -- Structured-Transformer, to capture the spatio-temporal relationship between dual-arm movements. Finally, by adding visual feedback of content deformation, our framework can adjust the movements automatically to achieve the desired stir-fry effect. We verify the framework by a simulator and deploy it on a real bimanual Panda robot system. The experimental results validate our framework can realize the bimanual robot stir-fry motion and have the potential to extend to other deformable objects with bimanual coordination.
summary: This letter describes an approach to achieve well-known Chinese cooking art stir-fry on a bimanual robot system. Stir-fry requires a sequence of highly dynamic coordinated movements, which is usually difficult to learn for a chef, let alone transfer to robots. In this letter, we define a canonical stir-fry movement, and then propose a decoupled framework for learning this deformable object manipulation from human demonstration. First, the dual arms of the robot are decoupled into different roles (a leader and follower) and learned with classical and neural network-based methods separately, then the bimanual task is transformed into a coordination problem. To obtain general bimanual coordination, we secondly propose a Graph and Transformer based model -- Structured-Transformer, to capture the spatio-temporal relationship between dual-arm movements. Finally, by adding visual feedback of content deformation, our framework can adjust the movements automatically to achieve the desired stir-fry effect. We verify the framework by a simulator and deploy it on a real bimanual Panda robot system. The experimental results validate our framework can realize the bimanual robot stir-fry motion and have the potential to extend to other deformable objects with bimanual coordination.
abstract_zh: 这封信描述了一种在双手机器人系统上实现著名的中国烹饪艺术炒菜的方法。炒菜需要一系列高度动态协调的动作，这对于厨师来说通常很难学会，更不用说转移到机器人身上了。在这封信中，我们定义了一个规范的炒菜运动，然后提出了一个解耦框架，用于从人类演示中学习这种可变形对象的操作。首先，将机器人的双臂解耦为不同的角色（领导者和跟随者），并分别使用经典方法和基于神经网络的方法进行学习，然后将双手任务转化为协调问题。为了获得一般的双手协调性，我们其次提出了一种基于图和变压器的模型——Structured-Transformer，来捕获双臂运动之间的时空关系。最后，通过添加内容变形的视觉反馈，我们的框架可以自动调整动作以达到所需的炒菜效果。我们通过模拟器验证了该框架，并将其部署在真实的双手熊猫机器人系统上。实验结果验证了我们的框架可以实现双手机器人炒菜运动，并且有潜力扩展到其他具有双手协调的变形物体。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种双臂机器人系统实现炒菜的框架，通过解耦学习和时空关系建模来处理半流体食材的非抓取操作。
AI.motivation: 炒菜需要高度动态的协调动作，对人类厨师本身难度较大，更难以转化为机器人操作，尤其涉及半流体食材的非抓取控制问题。
AI.method: 将双臂解耦为领导者与跟随者角色，分别用经典方法和神经网络学习；提出基于图与Transformer的Structured-Transformer模型捕捉双臂时空关系，并通过视觉反馈调整动作。
AI.result: 在模拟器和真实双臂Panda机器人上验证了框架有效性，实现了双臂炒菜动作，并具备扩展至其他变形物体的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为双臂机器人操作半流体物体提供了可行方案，通过解耦学习与结构化建模解决了复杂协调问题。
