authors_text: Pablo Pérez,Ester Gonzalez-Sosa,Jesús Gutiérrez,Narciso García
title: Emerging Immersive Communication Systems: Overview, Taxonomy, and Good Practises for QoE Assessment
title_zh: 新兴的沉浸式通信系统：QoE 评估的概述、分类和良好实践
abstract: Several technological and scientific advances have been achieved recently in the fields of immersive systems, which are offering new possibilities to applications and services in different communication domains, such as entertainment, virtual conferencing, working meetings, social relations, healthcare, and industry. Users of these immersive technologies can explore and experience the stimuli in a more interactive and personalized way than previous technologies. Thus, considering the new technological challenges related to these systems and the new perceptual dimensions and interaction behaviors involved, a deep understanding of the users' Quality of Experience is required to satisfy their demands and expectations. In this sense, it is essential to foster the research on evaluating the QoE of immersive communication systems, since this will provide useful outcomes to optimize them and to identify the factors that can deteriorate the user experience. With this aim, subjective tests are usually performed following standard methodologies, which are designed for specific technologies and services. Although numerous user studies have been already published, there are no recommendations or standards that define common testing methodologies to be applied to evaluate immersive communication systems, such as those developed for images and video. Therefore, a revision of the QoE evaluation methods designed for previous technologies is required to develop robust and reliable methodologies for immersive communication systems. Thus, the objective of this paper is to provide an overview of existing immersive communication systems and related user studies, which can help on the definition of basic guidelines and testing methodologies to be used when performing user tests of immersive communication systems, such as 360-degree video-based telepresence, avatar-based social VR, cooperative AR, etc.
summary: Several technological and scientific advances have been achieved recently in the fields of immersive systems, which are offering new possibilities to applications and services in different communication domains, such as entertainment, virtual conferencing, working meetings, social relations, healthcare, and industry. Users of these immersive technologies can explore and experience the stimuli in a more interactive and personalized way than previous technologies. Thus, considering the new technological challenges related to these systems and the new perceptual dimensions and interaction behaviors involved, a deep understanding of the users' Quality of Experience is required to satisfy their demands and expectations. In this sense, it is essential to foster the research on evaluating the QoE of immersive communication systems, since this will provide useful outcomes to optimize them and to identify the factors that can deteriorate the user experience. With this aim, subjective tests are usually performed following standard methodologies, which are designed for specific technologies and services. Although numerous user studies have been already published, there are no recommendations or standards that define common testing methodologies to be applied to evaluate immersive communication systems, such as those developed for images and video. Therefore, a revision of the QoE evaluation methods designed for previous technologies is required to develop robust and reliable methodologies for immersive communication systems. Thus, the objective of this paper is to provide an overview of existing immersive communication systems and related user studies, which can help on the definition of basic guidelines and testing methodologies to be used when performing user tests of immersive communication systems, such as 360-degree video-based telepresence, avatar-based social VR, cooperative AR, etc.
abstract_zh: 最近，沉浸式系统领域取得了多项技术和科学进步，为娱乐、虚拟会议、工作会议、社会关系、医疗保健和工业等不同通信领域的应用和服务提供了新的可能性。这些沉浸式技术的用户可以比以前的技术以更具互动性和个性化的方式探索和体验刺激。因此，考虑到与这些系统相关的新技术挑战以及涉及的新感知维度和交互行为，需要深入了解用户的体验质量以满足他们的需求和期望。从这个意义上说，有必要促进沉浸式通信系统 QoE 评估的研究，因为这将为优化沉浸式通信系统并识别可能恶化用户体验的因素提供有用的结果。为此，主观测试通常按照针对特定技术和服务设计的标准方法进行。尽管已经发表了大量的用户研究，但还没有定义用于评估沉浸式通信系统（例如为图像和视频开发的系统）的通用测试方法的建议或标准。因此，需要对针对先前技术设计的 QoE 评估方法进行修订，以便为沉浸式通信系统开发稳健可靠的方法。因此，本文的目的是概述现有的沉浸式通信系统和相关的用户研究，这有助于定义在进行沉浸式通信系统的用户测试时使用的基本准则和测试方法，例如基于360度视频的临场感、基于头像的社交VR、合作AR等。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在概述现有沉浸式通信系统及其用户研究，为评估沉浸式通信系统的QoE提供基本指导和测试方法。
AI.motivation: 现有QoE评估方法无法满足新兴沉浸式通信系统（如360度视频、社交VR等）的测试需求，缺乏统一标准和指南。
AI.method: 通过综述现有沉浸式系统及用户研究，分析其技术特点和QoE影响因素，提出适用于沉浸式通信系统的测试方法框架。
AI.result: 总结了沉浸式通信系统的分类及QoE评估现状，提出了针对不同场景（如远程协作、医疗等）的测试方法建议。
AI.conclusion: 建立标准化的QoE评估方法对优化沉浸式系统体验至关重要，未来需结合主观测试与客观指标进行深入研究。

search_text: Emerging Immersive Communication Systems: Overview, Taxonomy, and Good Practises for QoE Assessment 新兴的沉浸式通信系统：QoE 评估的概述、分类和良好实践 Several technological and scientific advances have been achieved recently in the fields of immersive systems, which are offering new possibilities to applications and services in different communication domains, such as entertainment, virtual conferencing, working meetings, social relations, healthcare, and industry. Users of these immersive technologies can explore and experience the stimuli in a more interactive and personalized way than previous technologies. Thus, considering the new technological challenges related to these systems and the new perceptual dimensions and interaction behaviors involved, a deep understanding of the users' Quality of Experience is required to satisfy their demands and expectations. In this sense, it is essential to foster the research on evaluating the QoE of immersive communication systems, since this will provide useful outcomes to optimize them and to identify the factors that can deteriorate the user experience. With this aim, subjective tests are usually performed following standard methodologies, which are designed for specific technologies and services. Although numerous user studies have been already published, there are no recommendations or standards that define common testing methodologies to be applied to evaluate immersive communication systems, such as those developed for images and video. Therefore, a revision of the QoE evaluation methods designed for previous technologies is required to develop robust and reliable methodologies for immersive communication systems. Thus, the objective of this paper is to provide an overview of existing immersive communication systems and related user studies, which can help on the definition of basic guidelines and testing methodologies to be used when performing user tests of immersive communication systems, such as 360-degree video-based telepresence, avatar-based social VR, cooperative AR, etc. 最近，沉浸式系统领域取得了多项技术和科学进步，为娱乐、虚拟会议、工作会议、社会关系、医疗保健和工业等不同通信领域的应用和服务提供了新的可能性。这些沉浸式技术的用户可以比以前的技术以更具互动性和个性化的方式探索和体验刺激。因此，考虑到与这些系统相关的新技术挑战以及涉及的新感知维度和交互行为，需要深入了解用户的体验质量以满足他们的需求和期望。从这个意义上说，有必要促进沉浸式通信系统 QoE 评估的研究，因为这将为优化沉浸式通信系统并识别可能恶化用户体验的因素提供有用的结果。为此，主观测试通常按照针对特定技术和服务设计的标准方法进行。尽管已经发表了大量的用户研究，但还没有定义用于评估沉浸式通信系统（例如为图像和视频开发的系统）的通用测试方法的建议或标准。因此，需要对针对先前技术设计的 QoE 评估方法进行修订，以便为沉浸式通信系统开发稳健可靠的方法。因此，本文的目的是概述现有的沉浸式通信系统和相关的用户研究，这有助于定义在进行沉浸式通信系统的用户测试时使用的基本准则和测试方法，例如基于360度视频的临场感、基于头像的社交VR、合作AR等。 本文旨在概述现有沉浸式通信系统及其用户研究，为评估沉浸式通信系统的QoE提供基本指导和测试方法。 Pablo Pérez,Ester Gonzalez-Sosa,Jesús Gutiérrez,Narciso García cs.HC,cs.MM

authors_text: Xinhao Mei,Xubo Liu,Mark D. Plumbley,Wenwu Wang
title: Automated Audio Captioning: An Overview of Recent Progress and New Challenges
title_zh: 自动音频字幕：最新进展和新挑战概述
comment: Accepted by EURASIP Journal on Audio Speech and Music Processing
comments: Accepted by EURASIP Journal on Audio Speech and Music Processing
abstract: Automated audio captioning is a cross-modal translation task that aims to generate natural language descriptions for given audio clips. This task has received increasing attention with the release of freely available datasets in recent years. The problem has been addressed predominantly with deep learning techniques. Numerous approaches have been proposed, such as investigating different neural network architectures, exploiting auxiliary information such as keywords or sentence information to guide caption generation, and employing different training strategies, which have greatly facilitated the development of this field. In this paper, we present a comprehensive review of the published contributions in automated audio captioning, from a variety of existing approaches to evaluation metrics and datasets. We also discuss open challenges and envisage possible future research directions.
summary: Automated audio captioning is a cross-modal translation task that aims to generate natural language descriptions for given audio clips. This task has received increasing attention with the release of freely available datasets in recent years. The problem has been addressed predominantly with deep learning techniques. Numerous approaches have been proposed, such as investigating different neural network architectures, exploiting auxiliary information such as keywords or sentence information to guide caption generation, and employing different training strategies, which have greatly facilitated the development of this field. In this paper, we present a comprehensive review of the published contributions in automated audio captioning, from a variety of existing approaches to evaluation metrics and datasets. We also discuss open challenges and envisage possible future research directions.
abstract_zh: 自动音频字幕是一种跨模式翻译任务，旨在为给定的音频剪辑生成自然语言描述。近年来，随着免费数据集的发布，这项任务受到了越来越多的关注。该问题主要通过深度学习技术得到解决。人们提出了许多方法，例如研究不同的神经网络架构，利用关键字或句子信息等辅助信息来指导字幕生成，以及采用不同的训练策略，这些都极大地促进了该领域的发展。在本文中，我们从各种现有的评估指标和数据集方法，对自动音频字幕领域已发表的贡献进行了全面回顾。我们还讨论了开放的挑战并设想了未来可能的研究方向。

AI.tldr: 本文全面综述了自动音频字幕生成领域的最新进展，涵盖方法、评估指标、数据集，并讨论了当前挑战与未来方向。
AI.motivation: 随着公开数据集的增多，自动音频字幕生成任务受到广泛关注，但缺乏系统性总结与未来研究方向的探讨。
AI.method: 通过文献综述方法，分类分析现有神经网络架构、辅助信息利用策略及训练方法，比较不同评估指标与数据集特点。
AI.result: 梳理了主流技术路线，总结了常用数据集与评估指标，指出数据不足、模型泛化能力弱及多模态对齐困难等核心挑战。
AI.conclusion: 需构建更多样化的数据集，提升模型跨场景适应性，并探索更高效的多模态表征学习方法以推动领域发展。

authors_text: Duc H. Le,Tram T. Doan,Son T. Huynh,Binh T. Nguyen
title: SimCPSR: Simple Contrastive Learning for Paper Submission Recommendation System
title_zh: SimCPSR：论文提交推荐系统的简单对比学习
abstract: The recommendation system plays a vital role in many areas, especially academic fields, to support researchers in submitting and increasing the acceptance of their work through the conference or journal selection process. This study proposes a transformer-based model using transfer learning as an efficient approach for the paper submission recommendation system. By combining essential information (such as the title, the abstract, and the list of keywords) with the aims and scopes of journals, the model can recommend the Top K journals that maximize the acceptance of the paper. Our model had developed through two states: (i) Fine-tuning the pre-trained language model (LM) with a simple contrastive learning framework. We utilized a simple supervised contrastive objective to fine-tune all parameters, encouraging the LM to learn the document representation effectively. (ii) The fine-tuned LM was then trained on different combinations of the features for the downstream task. This study suggests a more advanced method for enhancing the efficiency of the paper submission recommendation system compared to previous approaches when we respectively achieve 0.5173, 0.8097, 0.8862, 0.9496 for Top 1, 3, 5, and 10 accuracies on the test set for combining the title, abstract, and keywords as input features. Incorporating the journals' aims and scopes, our model shows an exciting result by getting 0.5194, 0.8112, 0.8866, and 0.9496 respective to Top 1, 3, 5, and 10.
summary: The recommendation system plays a vital role in many areas, especially academic fields, to support researchers in submitting and increasing the acceptance of their work through the conference or journal selection process. This study proposes a transformer-based model using transfer learning as an efficient approach for the paper submission recommendation system. By combining essential information (such as the title, the abstract, and the list of keywords) with the aims and scopes of journals, the model can recommend the Top K journals that maximize the acceptance of the paper. Our model had developed through two states: (i) Fine-tuning the pre-trained language model (LM) with a simple contrastive learning framework. We utilized a simple supervised contrastive objective to fine-tune all parameters, encouraging the LM to learn the document representation effectively. (ii) The fine-tuned LM was then trained on different combinations of the features for the downstream task. This study suggests a more advanced method for enhancing the efficiency of the paper submission recommendation system compared to previous approaches when we respectively achieve 0.5173, 0.8097, 0.8862, 0.9496 for Top 1, 3, 5, and 10 accuracies on the test set for combining the title, abstract, and keywords as input features. Incorporating the journals' aims and scopes, our model shows an exciting result by getting 0.5194, 0.8112, 0.8866, and 0.9496 respective to Top 1, 3, 5, and 10.
abstract_zh: 推荐系统在许多领域，特别是学术领域发挥着至关重要的作用，支持研究人员通过会议或期刊选择过程提交其作品并提高其接受度。本研究提出了一种基于变压器的模型，使用迁移学习作为论文提交推荐系统的有效方法。通过将基本信息（例如标题、摘要和关键词列表）与期刊的目标和范围相结合，该模型可以推荐 Top K 期刊，从而最大限度地提高论文的接受度。我们的模型经历了两个阶段的发展：（i）使用简单的对比学习框架微调预训练的语言模型（LM）。我们利用一个简单的监督对比目标来微调所有参数，鼓励 LM 有效地学习文档表示。 (ii) 然后针对下游任务的不同特征组合对经过微调的 LM 进行训练。与以前的方法相比，本研究提出了一种更先进的方法来提高论文提交推荐系统的效率，当我们在测试集上将标题、摘要和关键词组合为输入特征时，前 1、3、5 和 10 的准确率分别达到 0.5173、0.8097、0.8862、0.9496。结合期刊的目标和范围，我们的模型显示了令人兴奋的结果，前 1、3、5 和 10 名分别为 0.5194、0.8112、0.8866 和 0.9496。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于对比学习的论文投稿推荐系统SimCPSR，通过结合论文内容和期刊信息提升推荐准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有推荐系统在学术领域效率不足，需更高效方法帮助研究人员选择合适期刊以提高论文接受率。
AI.method: 采用两阶段方法：首先用简单对比学习微调预训练语言模型，再结合论文标题、摘要、关键词及期刊目标训练下游任务。
AI.result: 在测试集上，结合期刊信息的Top1-Top10准确率分别为0.5194、0.8112、0.8866、0.9496，优于仅使用论文内容的基线结果。
AI.conclusion: SimCPSR通过整合多源信息和对比学习框架，显著提升了论文投稿推荐系统的效率与准确性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于对比学习的论文投稿推荐系统SimCPSR，通过结合论文内容和期刊信息提升推荐准确性。
ai_content.motivation: 现有推荐系统在学术领域效率不足，需更高效方法帮助研究人员选择合适期刊以提高论文接受率。
ai_content.method: 采用两阶段方法：首先用简单对比学习微调预训练语言模型，再结合论文标题、摘要、关键词及期刊目标训练下游任务。
ai_content.result: 在测试集上，结合期刊信息的Top1-Top10准确率分别为0.5194、0.8112、0.8866、0.9496，优于仅使用论文内容的基线结果。
ai_content.conclusion: SimCPSR通过整合多源信息和对比学习框架，显著提升了论文投稿推荐系统的效率与准确性。

search_text: SimCPSR: Simple Contrastive Learning for Paper Submission Recommendation System SimCPSR：论文提交推荐系统的简单对比学习 The recommendation system plays a vital role in many areas, especially academic fields, to support researchers in submitting and increasing the acceptance of their work through the conference or journal selection process. This study proposes a transformer-based model using transfer learning as an efficient approach for the paper submission recommendation system. By combining essential information (such as the title, the abstract, and the list of keywords) with the aims and scopes of journals, the model can recommend the Top K journals that maximize the acceptance of the paper. Our model had developed through two states: (i) Fine-tuning the pre-trained language model (LM) with a simple contrastive learning framework. We utilized a simple supervised contrastive objective to fine-tune all parameters, encouraging the LM to learn the document representation effectively. (ii) The fine-tuned LM was then trained on different combinations of the features for the downstream task. This study suggests a more advanced method for enhancing the efficiency of the paper submission recommendation system compared to previous approaches when we respectively achieve 0.5173, 0.8097, 0.8862, 0.9496 for Top 1, 3, 5, and 10 accuracies on the test set for combining the title, abstract, and keywords as input features. Incorporating the journals' aims and scopes, our model shows an exciting result by getting 0.5194, 0.8112, 0.8866, and 0.9496 respective to Top 1, 3, 5, and 10. 推荐系统在许多领域，特别是学术领域发挥着至关重要的作用，支持研究人员通过会议或期刊选择过程提交其作品并提高其接受度。本研究提出了一种基于变压器的模型，使用迁移学习作为论文提交推荐系统的有效方法。通过将基本信息（例如标题、摘要和关键词列表）与期刊的目标和范围相结合，该模型可以推荐 Top K 期刊，从而最大限度地提高论文的接受度。我们的模型经历了两个阶段的发展：（i）使用简单的对比学习框架微调预训练的语言模型（LM）。我们利用一个简单的监督对比目标来微调所有参数，鼓励 LM 有效地学习文档表示。 (ii) 然后针对下游任务的不同特征组合对经过微调的 LM 进行训练。与以前的方法相比，本研究提出了一种更先进的方法来提高论文提交推荐系统的效率，当我们在测试集上将标题、摘要和关键词组合为输入特征时，前 1、3、5 和 10 的准确率分别达到 0.5173、0.8097、0.8862、0.9496。结合期刊的目标和范围，我们的模型显示了令人兴奋的结果，前 1、3、5 和 10 名分别为 0.5194、0.8112、0.8866 和 0.9496。 本文提出一种基于对比学习的论文投稿推荐系统SimCPSR，通过结合论文内容和期刊信息提升推荐准确性。 Duc H. Le,Tram T. Doan,Son T. Huynh,Binh T. Nguyen cs.IR,cs.CV

authors_text: Pourya Shamsolmoali,Masoumeh Zareapoor,Eric Granger,Jocelyn Chanussot,Jie Yang
title: Enhanced Single-shot Detector for Small Object Detection in Remote Sensing Images
title_zh: 用于遥感图像中小物体检测的增强型单次探测器
comment: ef:42 IEEE INTERNATIONAL GEOSCIENCE AND REMOTE SENSING SYMPOSIUM (IGARSS), 2022
comments: ef:42 IEEE INTERNATIONAL GEOSCIENCE AND REMOTE SENSING SYMPOSIUM (IGARSS), 2022
abstract: Small-object detection is a challenging problem. In the last few years, the convolution neural networks methods have been achieved considerable progress. However, the current detectors struggle with effective features extraction for small-scale objects. To address this challenge, we propose image pyramid single-shot detector (IPSSD). In IPSSD, single-shot detector is adopted combined with an image pyramid network to extract semantically strong features for generating candidate regions. The proposed network can enhance the small-scale features from a feature pyramid network. We evaluated the performance of the proposed model on two public datasets and the results show the superior performance of our model compared to the other state-of-the-art object detectors.
summary: Small-object detection is a challenging problem. In the last few years, the convolution neural networks methods have been achieved considerable progress. However, the current detectors struggle with effective features extraction for small-scale objects. To address this challenge, we propose image pyramid single-shot detector (IPSSD). In IPSSD, single-shot detector is adopted combined with an image pyramid network to extract semantically strong features for generating candidate regions. The proposed network can enhance the small-scale features from a feature pyramid network. We evaluated the performance of the proposed model on two public datasets and the results show the superior performance of our model compared to the other state-of-the-art object detectors.
abstract_zh: 小物体检测是一个具有挑战性的问题。近年来，卷积神经网络方法取得了长足的进步。然而，当前的检测器难以有效提取小规模物体的特征。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了图像金字塔单次检测器（IPSSD）。在IPSSD中，采用单次检测器与图像金字塔网络相结合来提取语义上强的特征来生成候选区域。所提出的网络可以增强特征金字塔网络的小规模特征。我们在两个公共数据集上评估了所提出的模型的性能，结果表明与其他最先进的目标检测器相比，我们的模型具有优越的性能。

AI.tldr: 提出一种增强的单次检测器（IPSSD），用于改进遥感图像中小目标的检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有检测器难以有效提取小目标的语义特征，导致检测效果不佳。
AI.method: 提出图像金字塔单次检测器（IPSSD），结合单次检测器与图像金字塔网络，增强特征金字塔网络中的小尺度特征。
AI.result: 在两个公开数据集上的实验结果表明，IPSSD优于其他先进检测器，检测性能更优。
AI.conclusion: IPSSD有效提升了遥感图像中小目标检测的准确性和鲁棒性，为相关研究提供了新思路。

authors_text: Jian Zhang,Yuanqing Zhang,Huan Fu,Xiaowei Zhou,Bowen Cai,Jinchi Huang,Rongfei Jia,Binqiang Zhao,Xing Tang
title: Ray Priors through Reprojection: Improving Neural Radiance Fields for Novel View Extrapolation
title_zh: 通过重投影的射线先验：改善神经辐射场以实现新颖的视图外推
abstract: Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF) have emerged as a potent paradigm for representing scenes and synthesizing photo-realistic images. A main limitation of conventional NeRFs is that they often fail to produce high-quality renderings under novel viewpoints that are significantly different from the training viewpoints. In this paper, instead of exploiting few-shot image synthesis, we study the novel view extrapolation setting that (1) the training images can well describe an object, and (2) there is a notable discrepancy between the training and test viewpoints' distributions. We present RapNeRF (RAy Priors) as a solution. Our insight is that the inherent appearances of a 3D surface's arbitrary visible projections should be consistent. We thus propose a random ray casting policy that allows training unseen views using seen views. Furthermore, we show that a ray atlas pre-computed from the observed rays' viewing directions could further enhance the rendering quality for extrapolated views. A main limitation is that RapNeRF would remove the strong view-dependent effects because it leverages the multi-view consistency property.
summary: Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF) have emerged as a potent paradigm for representing scenes and synthesizing photo-realistic images. A main limitation of conventional NeRFs is that they often fail to produce high-quality renderings under novel viewpoints that are significantly different from the training viewpoints. In this paper, instead of exploiting few-shot image synthesis, we study the novel view extrapolation setting that (1) the training images can well describe an object, and (2) there is a notable discrepancy between the training and test viewpoints' distributions. We present RapNeRF (RAy Priors) as a solution. Our insight is that the inherent appearances of a 3D surface's arbitrary visible projections should be consistent. We thus propose a random ray casting policy that allows training unseen views using seen views. Furthermore, we show that a ray atlas pre-computed from the observed rays' viewing directions could further enhance the rendering quality for extrapolated views. A main limitation is that RapNeRF would remove the strong view-dependent effects because it leverages the multi-view consistency property.
abstract_zh: 神经辐射场 (NeRF) 已成为表示场景和合成逼真图像的有效范例。传统 NeRF 的一个主要限制是它们通常无法在与训练视点显着不同的新视点下生成高质量的渲染。在本文中，我们没有利用少镜头图像合成，而是研究了新颖的视图外推设置：（1）训练图像可以很好地描述对象，（2）训练和测试视点分布之间存在显着差异。我们提出 RapNeRF（RAy Priors）作为解决方案。我们的见解是，3D 表面的任意可见投影的固有外观应该是一致的。因此，我们提出了一种随机光线投射策略，允许使用已见视图来训练未见视图。此外，我们表明，根据观察到的光线的观察方向预先计算的光线图集可以进一步提高外推视图的渲染质量。主要限制是 RapNeRF 会消除强烈的视图相关效应，因为它利用了多视图一致性属性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RapNeRF方法，通过随机射线投射和预计算射线图谱，提升神经辐射场（NeRF）在新视角外推任务中的渲染质量。
AI.motivation: 传统NeRF在训练视角分布与测试视角差异较大时表现不佳，尤其在新视角外推场景下难以生成高质量图像，需解决此限制。
AI.method: 设计随机射线投射策略，利用已见视角训练未见视角；通过预计算观察射线方向的射线图谱增强外推视角的渲染效果。
AI.result: RapNeRF显著提升新视角外推的渲染质量，但因依赖多视角一致性，削弱了强视角相关效果。
AI.conclusion: RapNeRF通过射线先验有效解决NeRF的新视角外推问题，但需权衡视角相关性与一致性之间的矛盾。

authors_text: Shilong Zhang,Zhuoran Yu,Liyang Liu,Xinjiang Wang,Aojun Zhou,Kai Chen
title: Group R-CNN for Weakly Semi-supervised Object Detection with Points
title_zh: 用于弱半监督点目标检测的 R-CNN 组
comment: Accepted to CVPR2022. Code has been released at https://github.com/jshilong/GroupRCNN
comments: Accepted to CVPR2022. Code has been released at https://github.com/jshilong/GroupRCNN
abstract: We study the problem of weakly semi-supervised object detection with points (WSSOD-P), where the training data is combined by a small set of fully annotated images with bounding boxes and a large set of weakly-labeled images with only a single point annotated for each instance. The core of this task is to train a point-to-box regressor on well-labeled images that can be used to predict credible bounding boxes for each point annotation. We challenge the prior belief that existing CNN-based detectors are not compatible with this task. Based on the classic R-CNN architecture, we propose an effective point-to-box regressor: Group R-CNN. Group R-CNN first uses instance-level proposal grouping to generate a group of proposals for each point annotation and thus can obtain a high recall rate. To better distinguish different instances and improve precision, we propose instance-level proposal assignment to replace the vanilla assignment strategy adopted in the original R-CNN methods. As naive instance-level assignment brings converging difficulty, we propose instance-aware representation learning which consists of instance-aware feature enhancement and instance-aware parameter generation to overcome this issue. Comprehensive experiments on the MS-COCO benchmark demonstrate the effectiveness of our method. Specifically, Group R-CNN significantly outperforms the prior method Point DETR by 3.9 mAP with 5% well-labeled images, which is the most challenging scenario. The source code can be found at https://github.com/jshilong/GroupRCNN
summary: We study the problem of weakly semi-supervised object detection with points (WSSOD-P), where the training data is combined by a small set of fully annotated images with bounding boxes and a large set of weakly-labeled images with only a single point annotated for each instance. The core of this task is to train a point-to-box regressor on well-labeled images that can be used to predict credible bounding boxes for each point annotation. We challenge the prior belief that existing CNN-based detectors are not compatible with this task. Based on the classic R-CNN architecture, we propose an effective point-to-box regressor: Group R-CNN. Group R-CNN first uses instance-level proposal grouping to generate a group of proposals for each point annotation and thus can obtain a high recall rate. To better distinguish different instances and improve precision, we propose instance-level proposal assignment to replace the vanilla assignment strategy adopted in the original R-CNN methods. As naive instance-level assignment brings converging difficulty, we propose instance-aware representation learning which consists of instance-aware feature enhancement and instance-aware parameter generation to overcome this issue. Comprehensive experiments on the MS-COCO benchmark demonstrate the effectiveness of our method. Specifically, Group R-CNN significantly outperforms the prior method Point DETR by 3.9 mAP with 5% well-labeled images, which is the most challenging scenario. The source code can be found at https://github.com/jshilong/GroupRCNN
abstract_zh: 我们研究了弱半监督点目标检测（WSSOD-P）问题，其中训练数据由一小组带有边界框的完全注释图像和一大组弱标记图像（每个实例仅注释一个点）组合而成。该任务的核心是在标记良好的图像上训练点到框回归器，该回归器可用于预测每个点注释的可信边界框。我们挑战了先前的信念，即现有的基于 CNN 的检测器与此任务不兼容。基于经典的 R-CNN 架构，我们提出了一种有效的点对框回归器：Group R-CNN。 Group R-CNN首先使用实例级提案分组为每个点标注生成一组提案，从而可以获得较高的召回率。为了更好地区分不同实例并提高精度，我们提出实例级提案分配来取代原始 R-CNN 方法中采用的普通分配策略。由于朴素的实例级分配带来了收敛困难，我们提出了实例感知表示学习，其中包括实例感知特征增强和实例感知参数生成来克服这个问题。 MS-COCO 基准的综合实验证明了我们方法的有效性。具体来说，Group R-CNN 在具有 5% 良好标记图像的情况下，显着优于现有方法 Point DETR 3.9 mAP，这是最具挑战性的场景。源代码可以在https://github.com/jshilong/GroupRCNN找到

AI.tldr: 本文研究了弱半监督点标注目标检测任务（WSSOD-P），旨在利用少量全标注图像和大量单点标注图像训练高效的目标检测模型。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN检测器难以处理仅含单点标注的弱监督数据，而现有方法在标注数据稀缺时性能不足，需探索更有效的半监督学习框架。
AI.method: 基于R-CNN架构提出Group R-CNN，包含实例级提议分组、实例级提议分配策略及实例感知表示学习，通过特征增强与参数生成解决收敛难题。
AI.result: 在MS-COCO数据集上，Group R-CNN在5%全标注图像条件下较Point DETR提升3.9 mAP，显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: Group R-CNN通过创新的实例级处理机制，有效解决了弱半监督点标注检测的挑战，为数据稀缺场景提供了新思路。

authors_text: Thao V. Ha,Hoang Nguyen,Son T. Huynh,Trung T. Nguyen,Binh T. Nguyen
title: Fall detection using multimodal data
title_zh: 使用多模态数据进行跌倒检测
abstract: In recent years, the occurrence of falls has increased and has had detrimental effects on older adults. Therefore, various machine learning approaches and datasets have been introduced to construct an efficient fall detection algorithm for the social community. This paper studies the fall detection problem based on a large public dataset, namely the UP-Fall Detection Dataset. This dataset was collected from a dozen of volunteers using different sensors and two cameras. We propose several techniques to obtain valuable features from these sensors and cameras and then construct suitable models for the main problem. The experimental results show that our proposed methods can bypass the state-of-the-art methods on this dataset in terms of accuracy, precision, recall, and F1 score.
summary: In recent years, the occurrence of falls has increased and has had detrimental effects on older adults. Therefore, various machine learning approaches and datasets have been introduced to construct an efficient fall detection algorithm for the social community. This paper studies the fall detection problem based on a large public dataset, namely the UP-Fall Detection Dataset. This dataset was collected from a dozen of volunteers using different sensors and two cameras. We propose several techniques to obtain valuable features from these sensors and cameras and then construct suitable models for the main problem. The experimental results show that our proposed methods can bypass the state-of-the-art methods on this dataset in terms of accuracy, precision, recall, and F1 score.
abstract_zh: 近年来，跌倒的发生率有所增加，对老年人造成了不利影响。因此，引入了各种机器学习方法和数据集来为社交社区构建有效的跌倒检测算法。本文基于大型公共数据集（UP-Fall Inspection Dataset）研究跌倒检测问题。该数据集是使用不同的传感器和两个摄像头从十几名志愿者收集的。我们提出了几种技术来从这些传感器和相机中获取有价值的特征，然后针对主要问题构建合适的模型。实验结果表明，我们提出的方法可以在准确度、精确度、召回率和 F1 分数方面绕过该数据集上最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文基于UP-Fall Detection数据集，研究利用多模态数据（传感器和摄像头）进行跌倒检测的算法构建。
AI.motivation: 老年人跌倒事件增加带来严重健康风险，需开发高效跌倒检测算法以提升社区安全与医疗响应效率。
AI.method: 提出多传感器与摄像头数据的特征提取技术，结合机器学习构建适配模型，利用多模态数据融合提升检测性能。
AI.result: 实验表明，所提方法在准确率、精确率、召回率和F1分数等指标上均优于现有最佳方法。
AI.conclusion: 多模态数据融合方法能显著提升跌倒检测效果，为智能健康监护系统提供有效技术支撑。

authors_text: Shihao Shen,Yilin Cai,Jiayi Qiu,Guangzhao Li
title: Dynamic Dense RGB-D SLAM using Learning-based Visual Odometry
title_zh: 使用基于学习的视觉里程计的动态密集 RGB-D SLAM
comment: The report was withdrawn due to improper citation
comments: The report was withdrawn due to improper citation
abstract: We propose a dense dynamic RGB-D SLAM pipeline based on a learning-based visual odometry, TartanVO. TartanVO, like other direct methods rather than feature-based, estimates camera pose through dense optical flow, which only applies to static scenes and disregards dynamic objects. Due to the color constancy assumption, optical flow is not able to differentiate between dynamic and static pixels. Therefore, to reconstruct a static map through such direct methods, our pipeline resolves dynamic/static segmentation by leveraging the optical flow output, and only fuse static points into the map. Moreover, we rerender the input frames such that the dynamic pixels are removed and iteratively pass them back into the visual odometry to refine the pose estimate.
summary: We propose a dense dynamic RGB-D SLAM pipeline based on a learning-based visual odometry, TartanVO. TartanVO, like other direct methods rather than feature-based, estimates camera pose through dense optical flow, which only applies to static scenes and disregards dynamic objects. Due to the color constancy assumption, optical flow is not able to differentiate between dynamic and static pixels. Therefore, to reconstruct a static map through such direct methods, our pipeline resolves dynamic/static segmentation by leveraging the optical flow output, and only fuse static points into the map. Moreover, we rerender the input frames such that the dynamic pixels are removed and iteratively pass them back into the visual odometry to refine the pose estimate.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种基于基于学习的视觉里程计 TartanVO 的密集动态 RGB-D SLAM 管道。 TartanVO 与其他直接方法一样，不是基于特征的，通过密集光流估计相机姿态，仅适用于静态场景，而忽略动态物体。由于颜色恒常性假设，光流无法区分动态和静态像素。因此，为了通过这种直接方法重建静态地图，我们的管道通过利用光流输出来解决动态/静态分割，并且仅将静态点融合到地图中。此外，我们重新渲染输入帧，以便删除动态像素，并将它们迭代地传递回视觉里程计以细化姿势估计。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合学习视觉里程计的密集动态RGB-D SLAM方法，通过动态/静态分割提升地图重建精度。
AI.motivation: 传统直接法在动态场景下无法区分动态与静态像素，导致地图包含运动物体干扰，影响重建质量。
AI.method: 基于TartanVO光流输出进行动态静态分割，剔除动态点云后迭代优化相机位姿估计，并重绘帧数据以消除动态影响。
AI.result: 在动态场景中实现鲁棒的静态地图重建，提升SLAM系统对运动物体的适应能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过动态像素分离与迭代优化，有效解决了密集RGB-D SLAM在动态环境下的地图准确性问题。

method: 基于TartanVO光流输出进行动态静态分割，剔除动态点云后迭代优化相机位姿估计，并重绘帧数据以消除动态影响。
result: 在动态场景中实现鲁棒的静态地图重建，提升SLAM系统对运动物体的适应能力。
conclusion: 通过动态像素分离与迭代优化，有效解决了密集RGB-D SLAM在动态环境下的地图准确性问题。
search_text: Dynamic Dense RGB-D SLAM using Learning-based Visual Odometry 使用基于学习的视觉里程计的动态密集 RGB-D SLAM We propose a dense dynamic RGB-D SLAM pipeline based on a learning-based visual odometry, TartanVO. TartanVO, like other direct methods rather than feature-based, estimates camera pose through dense optical flow, which only applies to static scenes and disregards dynamic objects. Due to the color constancy assumption, optical flow is not able to differentiate between dynamic and static pixels. Therefore, to reconstruct a static map through such direct methods, our pipeline resolves dynamic/static segmentation by leveraging the optical flow output, and only fuse static points into the map. Moreover, we rerender the input frames such that the dynamic pixels are removed and iteratively pass them back into the visual odometry to refine the pose estimate. 我们提出了一种基于基于学习的视觉里程计 TartanVO 的密集动态 RGB-D SLAM 管道。 TartanVO 与其他直接方法一样，不是基于特征的，通过密集光流估计相机姿态，仅适用于静态场景，而忽略动态物体。由于颜色恒常性假设，光流无法区分动态和静态像素。因此，为了通过这种直接方法重建静态地图，我们的管道通过利用光流输出来解决动态/静态分割，并且仅将静态点融合到地图中。此外，我们重新渲染输入帧，以便删除动态像素，并将它们迭代地传递回视觉里程计以细化姿势估计。 本文提出一种结合学习视觉里程计的密集动态RGB-D SLAM方法，通过动态/静态分割提升地图重建精度。 Shihao Shen,Yilin Cai,Jiayi Qiu,Guangzhao Li cs.RO,cs.CV

authors_text: Sijie Wang,Qiyu Kang,Rui She,Wee Peng Tay,Diego Navarro Navarro,Andreas Hartmannsgruber
title: Building Facade Parsing R-CNN
title_zh: 建筑立面解析 R-CNN
abstract: Building facade parsing, which predicts pixel-level labels for building facades, has applications in computer vision perception for autonomous vehicle (AV) driving. However, instead of a frontal view, an on-board camera of an AV captures a deformed view of the facade of the buildings on both sides of the road the AV is travelling on, due to the camera perspective. We propose Facade R-CNN, which includes a transconv module, generalized bounding box detection, and convex regularization, to perform parsing of deformed facade views. Experiments demonstrate that Facade R-CNN achieves better performance than the current state-of-the-art facade parsing models, which are primarily developed for frontal views. We also publish a new building facade parsing dataset derived from the Oxford RobotCar dataset, which we call the Oxford RobotCar Facade dataset. This dataset contains 500 street-view images from the Oxford RobotCar dataset augmented with accurate annotations of building facade objects. The published dataset is available at https://github.com/sijieaaa/Oxford-RobotCar-Facade
summary: Building facade parsing, which predicts pixel-level labels for building facades, has applications in computer vision perception for autonomous vehicle (AV) driving. However, instead of a frontal view, an on-board camera of an AV captures a deformed view of the facade of the buildings on both sides of the road the AV is travelling on, due to the camera perspective. We propose Facade R-CNN, which includes a transconv module, generalized bounding box detection, and convex regularization, to perform parsing of deformed facade views. Experiments demonstrate that Facade R-CNN achieves better performance than the current state-of-the-art facade parsing models, which are primarily developed for frontal views. We also publish a new building facade parsing dataset derived from the Oxford RobotCar dataset, which we call the Oxford RobotCar Facade dataset. This dataset contains 500 street-view images from the Oxford RobotCar dataset augmented with accurate annotations of building facade objects. The published dataset is available at https://github.com/sijieaaa/Oxford-RobotCar-Facade
abstract_zh: 建筑物立面解析可预测建筑物立面的像素级标签，可应用于自动驾驶车辆 (AV) 的计算机视觉感知。然而，由于摄像头视角的原因，自动驾驶汽车的车载摄像头捕捉到的不是正面视图，而是自动驾驶汽车行驶道路两侧建筑物正面的变形视图。我们提出了 Facade R-CNN，其中包括 transconv 模块、广义边界框检测和凸正则化，以执行变形立面视图的解析。实验表明，Facade R-CNN 比当前最先进的立面解析模型（主要针对正面视图开发）取得了更好的性能。我们还发布了一个源自 Oxford RobotCar 数据集的新建筑立面解析数据集，我们将其称为 Oxford RobotCar Facade 数据集。该数据集包含来自 Oxford RobotCar 数据集的 500 张街景图像，并添加了建筑物立面对象的准确注释。已发布的数据集可在 https://github.com/sijieaaa/Oxford-RobotCar-Facade 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Facade R-CNN的模型，用于解析自动驾驶车辆摄像头拍摄的变形建筑立面图像，并发布了一个新的数据集。
AI.motivation: 现有建筑立面解析模型主要针对正面视角，而自动驾驶车辆摄像头因透视关系捕获的是变形视角，需解决视角变形带来的解析难题。
AI.method: 方法包含转置卷积模块（transconv）、广义边界框检测和凸正则化技术，以处理变形视角下的立面解析任务。
AI.result: 实验表明，Facade R-CNN在变形视角解析任务中优于现有前沿模型，并基于Oxford RobotCar数据集构建了包含500张标注图像的新数据集。
AI.conclusion: 该模型有效解决了变形视角下的建筑立面解析问题，新数据集为相关研究提供了重要资源。
